modules.name: ai
modules.description: `lurek.ai` - Lua bindings for AI worlds, agents, blackboards, behavior trees, steering, planning, learning, and simulation helpers.

functions.name: newWorld
functions.description: Creates an isolated AI world for agents, blackboards, and custom decision callbacks.

functions.name: newBlackboard
functions.description: Creates an empty AI blackboard for typed local facts.

functions.name: newStateMachine
functions.description: Creates an empty finite state machine with Lua-backed states and transitions.

functions.name: newBehaviorTree
functions.description: Creates an empty behavior tree that can receive a root node.

functions.name: newSelector
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree selector node with no children.

functions.name: newSequence
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree sequence node with no children.

functions.name: newParallel
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree parallel node with optional success and failure policies.

parameters.name: sp
parameters.description: Success policy name; defaults to the engine's require-one policy.

parameters.name: fp
parameters.description: Failure policy name; defaults to the engine's require-one policy.

functions.name: newInverter
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree inverter decorator with an empty sequence child.

functions.name: newRepeater
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree repeater decorator with an optional repeat count.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Repeat count stored on the node; defaults to zero.

functions.name: newSucceeder
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree succeeder decorator with an empty sequence child.

functions.name: newAction
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree action leaf backed by a Lua callback.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the action node ticks.

functions.name: newCondition
functions.description: Creates a behavior tree condition leaf backed by a Lua callback.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the condition node ticks.

functions.name: newGuard
functions.description: Creates a guard decorator that runs a predicate before ticking its child.

parameters.name: predicate
parameters.description: Callback that decides whether the child may run.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: Child node handle consumed by the guard.

functions.name: newSteeringManager
functions.description: Creates an empty steering manager with support for built-in and custom behaviors.

functions.name: newQLearner
functions.description: Creates a Q-learner with fixed state and action counts.

functions.name: newUtilityAI
functions.description: Creates an empty utility AI action scorer.

functions.name: newDialogueAI
functions.description: Creates an empty dialogue selector for weighted topics and branches.

functions.name: newGOAPPlanner
functions.description: Creates an empty GOAP planner for boolean world-state planning.

functions.name: newInfluenceMap
functions.description: Creates a grid influence map with the supplied cell dimensions and world cell size.

functions.name: newSquad
functions.description: Creates an empty named squad. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Squad name stored on the handle.

functions.name: newCommandQueue
functions.description: Creates an empty command queue for callback-backed AI commands.

functions.name: newTraitProfile
functions.description: Creates an empty trait profile with modifier support.

functions.name: newStimulusWorld
functions.description: Creates an empty stimulus world for visual and auditory stimulus records.

functions.name: newContextSteering
functions.description: Creates a context steering model with the requested directional slot count.

parameters.name: slots
parameters.description: Directional slot count; zero selects the engine default of 16.

functions.name: newNeedSystem
functions.description: Creates an empty need system for decaying named needs.

functions.name: newAIDirector
functions.description: Creates an AI director for tension, phase, and pacing factor calculations.

functions.name: newHTNDomain
functions.description: Creates an empty hierarchical task network domain.

functions.name: newMCTSEngine
functions.description: Creates a Monte Carlo tree search engine with deterministic configuration.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed used by the engine.

functions.name: newEmotionModel
functions.description: Creates an empty emotion model for named decaying emotion values.

functions.name: newORCASolver
functions.description: Creates an ORCA avoidance solver with the supplied prediction horizon.

parameters.name: time_horizon
parameters.description: Time horizon used when computing collision avoidance velocities.

functions.name: newNeuralNet
functions.description: Creates an empty feed-forward neural network.

functions.name: newGeneticAlgorithm
functions.description: Creates a genetic algorithm population with fixed chromosome length.

parameters.name: pop_size
parameters.description: Number of chromosomes in the population.

parameters.name: gene_count
parameters.description: Number of floating-point genes per chromosome.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed used for population initialization and evolution.

functions.name: newBandit
functions.description: Creates a multi-armed bandit with a named selection strategy.

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: Strategy name such as `ucb1`, `thompson`, or an epsilon-greedy fallback.

parameters.name: epsilon
parameters.description: Exploration probability used by epsilon-greedy strategy and clamped to `[0, 1]`.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed used by the bandit.

functions.name: newNeuroevolution
functions.description: Creates a neuroevolution population from a layer specification table.

parameters.name: layer_spec
parameters.description: Array of layer tables with `inputs`, `outputs`, and optional `activation` fields.

parameters.name: pop_size
parameters.description: Number of chromosomes in the population.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed used for population initialization and evolution.

functions.name: newStrategyAI
functions.description: Creates a strategy AI that reevaluates goals on a fixed interval.

functions.name: newAILod
functions.description: Creates a default AI level-of-detail tier selector.

modules.name: animation
modules.description: `lurek.animation` -- Animation bindings for sprite clips, state machines, blend layers, curves, sync groups, and Aseprite import helpers.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Creates an empty animation with no frames or clips.

functions.name: fromAseprite
functions.description: Loads an animation from an Aseprite JSON export string.

functions.name: newStateMachine
functions.description: Creates an animation state machine by consuming an animation handle.

parameters.name: anim_ud
parameters.description: Animation handle moved into the state machine.

parameters.name: initial
parameters.description: Initial state name stored in the state machine.

functions.name: newCurve
functions.description: Creates an empty animation curve. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newSyncGroup
functions.description: Creates an empty animation synchronization group.

functions.name: newBlendLayerSet
functions.description: Creates an empty blend layer set for layered animation playback.

functions.name: buildCharacter
functions.description: Builds a character animation bundle from grid frame and clip configuration.

parameters.name: cfg
parameters.description: Configuration table with texture size, frame size, clips, optional states, and optional transitions.

modules.name: audio
modules.description: `lurek.audio` - Audio playback, mixing, spatial sound, MIDI, and DSP processing for 2D games.

functions.name: newSource
functions.description: Creates a new audio source from a file path, either fully loaded or streaming.

functions.name: play
functions.description: Starts playback of a source by handle, optionally routing through a named bus.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Optional table with "bus" field for bus routing.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops playback of a source and resets its position to the beginning.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setVolume
functions.description: Sets the volume of a source by handle.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getVolume
functions.description: Returns the current volume of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pauses playback of a source at its current position.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: resume
functions.description: Resumes playback of a paused source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setPitch
functions.description: Sets the pitch multiplier of a source, affecting playback speed and tone.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getPitch
functions.description: Returns the current pitch multiplier of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: isPlaying
functions.description: Returns whether a source is currently playing.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Returns whether a source is currently paused.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: isStopped
functions.description: Returns whether a source is currently stopped.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setLooping
functions.description: Enables or disables looping for a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: True to loop, false to play once.

functions.name: isLooping
functions.description: Returns whether a source has looping enabled.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: playLooping
functions.description: Starts playback of a source with looping enabled in one call.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setPan
functions.description: Sets the stereo panning of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getPan
functions.description: Returns the current stereo pan position of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setMasterVolume
functions.description: Sets the global master volume affecting all audio output.

functions.name: getMasterVolume
functions.description: Returns the current global master volume level.

functions.name: getActiveSourceCount
functions.description: Returns the number of sources currently playing audio.

functions.name: getSourceCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of loaded audio sources (playing or idle).

functions.name: getSourceType
functions.description: Returns whether a source is static or streaming.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: clone
functions.description: Creates an independent copy of a source sharing the same audio data.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID to clone.

functions.name: pauseAll
functions.description: Pauses all currently playing audio sources.

functions.name: stopAll
functions.description: Stops all audio sources and resets their positions.

functions.name: resumeAll
functions.description: Resumes all paused audio sources. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: release
functions.description: Releases an audio source, freeing its memory and stopping playback.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID to release.

functions.name: newBus
functions.description: Creates a new audio mixing bus for grouping and controlling sources.

functions.name: setSourceBus
functions.description: Routes a source through a specific audio bus for grouped mixing.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getSourceBus
functions.description: Returns the bus a source is routed through.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getMaxSources
functions.description: Returns the maximum number of simultaneous audio sources supported.

functions.name: getDuration
functions.description: Returns the total duration of a source in seconds.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: tell
functions.description: Returns the current playback position of a source in seconds.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: seek
functions.description: Seeks a source to a specific position in seconds.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setLowpass
functions.description: Applies a lowpass filter to a source, attenuating high frequencies.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setHighpass
functions.description: Applies a highpass filter to a source, attenuating low frequencies.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getLowpass
functions.description: Returns the current lowpass filter cutoff of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getHighpass
functions.description: Returns the current highpass filter cutoff of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: clearFilter
functions.description: Removes all frequency filters from a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: fadeIn
functions.description: Sets the fade-in duration for a source so it ramps from silence on play.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getFadeIn
functions.description: Returns the configured fade-in duration of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setListener2D
functions.description: Sets the 2D listener position for spatial audio calculations.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Listener X position in world units.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Listener Y position in world units.

functions.name: getListener2D
functions.description: Returns the current 2D listener position.

functions.name: setListener
functions.description: Sets the 3D listener position for spatial audio (Z defaults to 0 for 2D games).

functions.name: getListener
functions.description: Returns the current 3D listener position.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.description: Sets the 3D position of a source for spatial audio panning and attenuation.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.description: Returns the 3D position of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setVelocity
functions.description: Sets the velocity of a source for Doppler effect calculations.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getVelocity
functions.description: Returns the velocity vector of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: setOrientation
functions.signature: (id_val, fx, fy, fz, ux, uy, uz)
functions.description: Sets the orientation of a source using forward and up vectors.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.name: getOrientation
functions.description: Returns the orientation vectors of a source.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Audio source or numeric source ID.

functions.returns: number, number, number, number, number, number
functions.returnType: number, number, number, number, number, number

functions.name: setDopplerScale
functions.description: Sets the global Doppler effect intensity multiplier.

functions.name: getDopplerScale
functions.description: Returns the current global Doppler effect scale.

functions.name: setDistanceModel
functions.description: Sets the distance attenuation model for spatial audio.

functions.name: getDistanceModel
functions.description: Returns the current distance attenuation model name.

functions.name: setMeter
functions.description: Sets the master peak level for metering purposes.

functions.name: getMeter
functions.description: Returns the current master peak level for VU-meter displays.

functions.name: newMidiPlayer
functions.description: Creates a new MIDI player instance, optionally loading a file immediately.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Optional relative path to a .mid file to load.

functions.name: newSoundData
functions.description: Creates a new SoundData object from a file path or blank buffer for procedural audio.

functions.name: setMidiSoundFont
functions.description: Sets the midi sound font for Lua scripts in this module.

parameters.description: Path-like input used by this call.

functions.name: hasMidiSoundFont

functions.name: clearMidiSoundFont

functions.name: newDecoder

functions.description: New queueable source for Lua scripts in this module.

functions.name: queueSource
functions.description: Queue source for Lua scripts in this module.

functions.name: getFreeBufferCount

modules.name: automation
modules.description: `lurek.automation` -- Automation bindings for loading simulator scripts, controlling playback, inspecting state, saving macros, and waiting on Lua predicates.

functions.name: load
functions.description: Loads an automation script from a Lua table of steps and optional metadata.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Script name used by `start`, macros, and lookup calls.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Script data table with a `steps` array and optional `meta.description` string.

functions.name: unload
functions.description: Unloads a named automation script.

functions.name: hasScript
functions.description: Returns whether a script is loaded.

functions.name: getScripts
functions.description: Returns the names of loaded automation scripts.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Starts playback of a loaded automation script.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops the current automation script.

functions.name: pause
functions.description: Pauses automation playback. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: resume
functions.description: Resumes automation playback. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Advances automation playback and dispatches generated input events.

functions.name: isRunning
functions.description: Returns whether automation playback is running.

functions.name: isPaused
functions.description: Returns whether automation playback is paused.

functions.name: isComplete
functions.description: Returns whether the current automation script completed.

functions.name: isFailed
functions.description: Returns whether the current automation script failed.

functions.name: getLastError
functions.description: Returns the last automation error message when one exists.

functions.name: setCondition
functions.description: Sets a named boolean condition used by automation steps.

functions.name: getCondition
functions.description: Returns a named automation condition value.

functions.name: getCurrentStep
functions.description: Returns the current step index of the active script.

functions.name: getStepCount
functions.description: Returns the number of steps in the active script.

functions.name: getCurrentScript
functions.description: Returns the current script name when a script is active.

functions.name: getElapsedTime
functions.description: Returns elapsed playback time for the current script.

functions.name: loadFromToml
functions.description: Loads an automation script from TOML text.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Script name used by `start`, macros, and lookup calls.

functions.name: getStepLimit
functions.description: Returns the configured step limit for a loaded script.

functions.name: setStepLimit
functions.description: Sets the maximum step count for a loaded script.

functions.name: saveMacro
functions.description: Saves a loaded script as a named macro.

parameters.name: script_name
parameters.description: Loaded script name to copy into the macro store.

functions.name: playMacro
functions.description: Starts playback of a saved macro. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: hasMacro
functions.description: Returns whether a macro is saved. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: listMacros
functions.description: Returns the names of saved macros. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: setPlaybackSpeed
functions.description: Sets automation playback speed multiplier.

functions.name: getPlaybackSpeed
functions.description: Returns automation playback speed multiplier.

functions.name: setHighlightMode
functions.description: Enables or disables automation highlight mode.

functions.name: isHighlightMode
functions.description: Returns whether automation highlight mode is enabled.

functions.name: waitUntil
functions.description: Suspends automation updates until a predicate returns true or a timeout elapses.

parameters.name: predicate
parameters.description: Function called each update; true resolves the wait.

modules.name: camera
modules.description: `lurek.camera` -- Camera bindings for 2D transforms, targets, bounds, screen conversion, paths, zoom tweens, parallax factors, effects, constraints, presets, and camera rigs.

functions.name: new
functions.description: Creates a 2D camera with optional virtual viewport size.

functions.name: newCamera
functions.description: Creates a 2D camera with optional virtual viewport size.

functions.name: newRig
functions.description: Creates an empty named camera rig. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

modules.name: compute
modules.description: `lurek.compute` -- Compute bindings for multidimensional arrays, numeric operations, reductions, spatial filters, analytics, linear algebra, FFT helpers, and parallel threshold tuning.

functions.name: newArray
functions.description: Creates a zero-filled array with the requested shape and data type.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description: Array table of positive dimension sizes.

functions.name: zeros
functions.description: Creates a zero-filled array with the requested shape and data type.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description: Array table of positive dimension sizes.

functions.name: ones
functions.description: Creates a one-filled array with the requested shape and data type.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description: Array table of positive dimension sizes.

functions.name: range
functions.description: Creates a one-dimensional range array.

functions.name: fromTable
functions.description: Creates an array from a flat Lua table and optional shape.

parameters.name: shape
parameters.description: Optional array table of positive dimension sizes.

functions.name: gaussianKernel
functions.description: Creates a square Gaussian kernel array.

functions.name: rotate2dMatrix
functions.description: Creates a 2D rotation matrix. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: affine2d
functions.description: Creates a 2D affine transform matrix.

functions.name: fft
functions.description: Computes the FFT of real-valued samples.

functions.name: ifft
functions.description: Computes the inverse FFT of complex frequency pairs.

parameters.name: freqs
parameters.description: Array table of complex pairs with `re` and `im` fields.

functions.name: fftMagnitude
functions.description: Computes FFT magnitudes for real-valued samples.

functions.name: getParThreshold
functions.description: Returns the global compute parallelism threshold.

functions.name: setParThreshold
functions.description: Sets the global compute parallelism threshold and returns the previous value.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: New threshold; values below one are clamped to one.

modules.name: data
modules.description: `lurek.data` -- Data bindings for binary packing, compression, encoding, hashing, byte buffers, data views, TOML conversion, ring buffers, and structured writers.

functions.name: pack
functions.description: Packs Lua values into a binary string using a format string.

parameters.description: Values to pack according to the format.

functions.name: unpack
functions.description: Unpacks values from a binary string using a format string.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Optional zero-based byte offset; defaults to zero.

functions.name: getPackedSize
functions.description: Computes the packed byte size for values and a format string.

parameters.description: Values measured according to the format.

functions.name: compress
functions.description: Compresses a binary string using a named compression format.

functions.name: decompress
functions.description: Decompresses a binary string using a named compression format.

functions.name: compressChunks
functions.description: Compresses a string or table of strings as a chunked byte stream.

parameters.name: chunks
parameters.description: Binary string or array table of binary strings.

functions.name: decompressChunks
functions.description: Decompresses a string or table of strings as a chunked byte stream.

parameters.name: chunks
parameters.description: Binary string or array table of binary strings.

functions.name: encode
functions.description: Encodes a binary string using a named text encoding format.

functions.name: decode
functions.description: Decodes a string using a named text encoding format.

functions.name: hash
functions.description: Hashes a binary string with a named algorithm.

functions.name: crc32
functions.description: Computes CRC32 for a binary string.

functions.name: newByteData
functions.description: Creates ByteData from a size or string.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Integer size for zeroed bytes, or string used as initial bytes.

functions.name: newDataView
functions.description: Creates a DataView over a binary string slice.

parameters.name: raw
parameters.description: Binary byte string backing the view.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Optional zero-based start offset; defaults to zero.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Optional view size in bytes; defaults to the remaining bytes.

functions.name: write
functions.description: Writes binary values into a byte string using a format string.

parameters.description: Values to write according to the format.

functions.name: read
functions.description: Reads binary values from a byte string using a format string.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Optional zero-based byte offset; defaults to zero.

functions.name: size
functions.description: Measures fixed byte size for a binary format string.

functions.name: parseToml
functions.description: Parses TOML text into Lua tables and scalar values.

functions.name: encodeToml
functions.description: Encodes a Lua table into TOML text. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Lua table to encode as TOML.

functions.name: newRingBuffer
functions.description: Creates a fixed-capacity ring buffer for Lua values.

parameters.name: capacity
parameters.description: Maximum value count; must be greater than zero.

functions.name: toMsgPack
functions.description: Encodes a Lua value into the current structured binary interchange payload.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Lua value to encode through the serial table converter.

functions.name: fromMsgPack
functions.description: Decodes a structured binary interchange payload back into Lua values.

functions.name: newWriter
functions.description: Creates an empty binary data writer.

modules.name: dataframe
modules.description: `lurek.dataframe` -- DataFrame bindings for tabular rows, columns, grouping, joins, SQL queries, lazy pipelines, databases, vectorized frames, serialization, and statistics.

functions.name: newDataFrame
functions.description: Creates an empty dataframe. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newDatabase
functions.description: Creates an empty dataframe database.

functions.name: fromTable
functions.description: Creates a dataframe from an array table of row tables.

parameters.name: rows

functions.name: fromRows

functions.name: fromJSON
functions.description: Parses a dataframe from JSON text. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.description: Parses a dataframe from binary data.

functions.description: Creates a random dataframe from column definitions.

parameters.name: defs_tbl
parameters.description: Array table of `{name, hint}` column definitions.

functions.name: toVec
functions.description: Converts a dataframe to a vectorized frame.

functions.name: fromVec

modules.name: debugbridge
modules.description: `lurek.debugbridge` -- Debug bridge bindings for starting the local TCP bridge, polling debugger requests, print capture, performance data, screenshots, protocol metadata, and hot reload flags.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Starts the localhost debug bridge server on a port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: TCP port to bind on `127.0.0.1`; defaults to 19740 and must be at least 1024.

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stops the debug bridge server and joins its server thread.

functions.name: isRunning
functions.description: Returns whether the debug bridge server is currently running.

functions.name: getPort
functions.description: Returns the debug bridge TCP port. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: getClientCount
functions.description: Returns the number of connected debug bridge clients.

functions.name: poll
functions.description: Polls pending debugger requests, evaluates supported methods, and queues responses.

functions.name: capturePrint
functions.description: Captures a print message and broadcasts it to debug bridge clients.

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: Optional source line; defaults to zero.

functions.name: getPrintHistory
functions.description: Returns captured print history entries.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Optional number of newest entries; nil or zero returns all entries.

functions.name: clearPrintHistory
functions.description: Clears captured print history. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: setMaxPrintHistory
functions.description: Sets the maximum retained print history entry count.

functions.name: getPerformance
functions.description: Returns debug bridge performance metrics.

functions.name: requestScreenshot
functions.description: Requests a screenshot from the runtime.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Screenshot scale clamped from 1 to 8; defaults to 1.

functions.name: isScreenshotRequested
functions.description: Returns whether a screenshot request is pending.

functions.name: broadcast
functions.description: Queues a JSON string payload broadcast for debug bridge clients.

parameters.name: json_data
parameters.description: Payload string wrapped as JSON for clients.

functions.name: getProtocolInfo
functions.description: Returns debug bridge protocol version, capabilities, and handshake nonce.

functions.name: consumeHotReloadRequest
functions.description: Returns and clears the pending hot reload request flag.

modules.name: devtools
modules.description: `lurek.devtools` -- Developer tooling bindings for logs, profiling, frame stats, file watching, console state, watch expressions, snapshots, REPL, and debugger-style eval helpers.

functions.name: log
functions.description: Adds a message to the devtools log using an explicit severity level.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Log level name such as `trace`, `debug`, `info`, `warn`, `error`, or `fatal`.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: trace
functions.description: Adds a trace-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: debug
functions.description: Adds a debug-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: info
functions.description: Adds an info-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: warn
functions.description: Adds a warning-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: error
functions.description: Adds an error-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: fatal
functions.description: Adds a fatal-level diagnostic message to the devtools log.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text stored in the in-memory log history.

functions.name: setLogLevel
functions.description: Sets the minimum severity that remains visible in devtools log output.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: Log level name parsed by the devtools logger; unknown names are ignored.

functions.name: getLogLevel
functions.description: Returns the minimum severity currently used by devtools log output.

functions.name: setLogConsole
functions.description: Enables or disables mirroring devtools log entries to the console.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to emit future log entries to console output.

functions.name: getLogConsole
functions.description: Returns whether devtools log entries are mirrored to the console.

functions.name: setLogFile
functions.description: Sets the file path used by devtools file logging state.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path recorded as the active devtools log target.

functions.name: getLogFile
functions.description: Returns the file path currently stored as the devtools log target.

functions.name: getLogHistory
functions.description: Returns recent devtools log entries as structured tables.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Optional number of newest entries to return; omitted returns the logger default.

functions.name: clearLog
functions.description: Clears all in-memory devtools log entries.

functions.name: setProfilingEnabled
functions.description: Enables or disables collection of CPU profiling zones.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to record profiling zones into future profiler frames.

functions.name: isProfilingEnabled
functions.description: Returns whether CPU profiling zone collection is currently enabled.

functions.name: profilePush
functions.description: Starts a named profiling zone on the current profiler stack.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Profiling zone name shown in reports and snapshots.

functions.name: profilePop
functions.description: Ends the current profiling zone on the profiler stack.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional zone name accepted for API compatibility and ignored by the profiler.

functions.name: profileFrame
functions.description: Closes the current profiling frame and stores its zone tree for later inspection.

functions.name: getProfileFrameCount
functions.description: Returns how many profiling frames are currently stored.

functions.name: getProfileData
functions.description: Returns the profiler zone tree for a retained frame.

parameters.name: frame
parameters.description: Optional frame index understood by the profiler; omitted reads the newest frame alias used by the backend.

functions.name: resetProfile
functions.description: Clears profiler state, active zones, and retained profiling frames.

functions.name: recordFrameTime
functions.description: Records one CPU frame duration sample for devtools frame statistics.

functions.name: getFrameStats
functions.description: Returns aggregate CPU frame timing statistics from recorded samples.

functions.name: recordGpuFrameTime
functions.description: Records one GPU frame duration sample for devtools frame statistics.

functions.name: getGpuFrameStats
functions.description: Returns aggregate GPU frame timing statistics from recorded samples.

functions.name: getFrameHistory
functions.description: Returns retained CPU frame duration samples in insertion order.

functions.name: setFrameHistorySize
functions.description: Sets the maximum number of CPU frame duration samples retained by devtools.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of frame samples to keep.

functions.name: getFrameHistorySize
functions.description: Returns the current CPU frame history capacity.

functions.name: watch
functions.description: Adds a path to the module-level devtools file watcher.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or directory path to poll for changes.

functions.name: unwatch
functions.description: Removes a path from the module-level devtools file watcher.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Previously watched file or directory path.

functions.name: getWatchedPaths
functions.description: Returns all paths currently watched by the module-level file watcher.

functions.name: scan
functions.description: Polls module-level file watches and returns paths that changed since the previous scan.

functions.name: clearWatches
functions.description: Removes every path from the module-level file watcher.

functions.name: getWatchInterval
functions.description: Returns the polling interval hint used by devtools watch UIs.

functions.name: setWatchInterval
functions.description: Sets the polling interval hint used by devtools watch UIs.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Watch interval in seconds, clamped to at least 0.01.

functions.name: getCallStack
functions.description: Returns Lua call stack frames using the Lua debug library.

parameters.name: max_depth
parameters.description: Optional maximum number of frames to return; defaults to 20 and is capped at 100.

functions.name: eval
functions.description: Evaluates Lua code in the current state and returns success plus values or failure plus an error message.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Lua source code evaluated through the current Lua VM.

functions.name: openConsole
functions.description: Marks the devtools console as open for UI state tracking.

functions.name: isConsoleOpen
functions.description: Returns whether the devtools console is marked open.

functions.name: openEntityInspector
functions.description: Marks the devtools entity inspector as open for UI state tracking.

functions.name: isEntityInspectorOpen
functions.description: Returns whether the devtools entity inspector is marked open.

functions.name: exposeWatch
functions.description: Registers a watch expression callback for snapshots and watch panels.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Display name for the watch entry.

parameters.name: getter
parameters.description: Callback invoked with no arguments when watch values are collected.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional category label used by devtools UIs.

functions.name: removeWatch
functions.description: Removes a previously exposed watch expression by id.

functions.name: getWatches
functions.description: Evaluates exposed watch callbacks and returns their current values.

functions.name: snapshot
functions.description: Captures a combined devtools snapshot containing frame stats, watch values, profile data, and recent logs.

functions.name: profilerReport
functions.description: Aggregates retained profiler frames into per-zone timing rows.

functions.name: newFileWatcher
functions.description: Creates a dedicated file watcher userdata for one path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File or directory path watched by the returned handle.

functions.name: newRepl
functions.description: Creates a REPL console userdata with bounded command history.

parameters.name: max_history
parameters.description: Optional maximum number of history entries; defaults to 200.

modules.name: docs
modules.description: `lurek.docs` -- Documentation tooling bindings for live API reflection, editable catalogs, quality reports, schema validation, and export helpers that produce editor and Markdown artifacts from Lua-visible API metadata.

functions.name: scan
functions.description: Reflects the live `lurek` table and builds a catalog of callable APIs.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional scan options table reserved for future filters.

functions.name: scanModule
functions.description: Reflects one live `lurek.<module>` table and builds a catalog for that module.

functions.name: loadToml
functions.description: Loads a TOML documentation catalog file and converts its entries into an API catalog.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to a TOML file containing an `entries` table.

functions.name: loadAll
functions.description: Loads all TOML documentation catalog files from a directory and combines their entries.

functions.name: describe
functions.description: Adds or updates the description for one editable catalog entry.

parameters.name: qualified_name
parameters.description: Full dotted API name to update or create.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description text stored on the catalog entry.

functions.name: setParamInfo
functions.description: Replaces parameter metadata for one editable catalog entry.

parameters.name: qualified_name
parameters.description: Full dotted API name whose parameters are updated.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Array table of parameter rows with name, type, description, optional, and optional default fields.

functions.name: setReturnInfo
functions.description: Replaces return-value metadata for one editable catalog entry.

parameters.name: qualified_name
parameters.description: Full dotted API name whose return metadata is updated.

parameters.name: returns
parameters.description: Array table of return rows with type and description fields.

functions.description: Returns the editable in-memory documentation catalog.

functions.name: resetCatalog
functions.description: Clears the editable in-memory documentation catalog.

functions.description: Compares a documentation catalog with the live reflected `lurek` API table.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog to validate against live reflection; omitted validates an empty catalog.

functions.name: validateModule
functions.description: Compares one module's documentation catalog entries with the live reflected module table.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog whose entries are filtered to the module.

functions.description: Lists source files in a directory for simple documentation staleness checks.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Catalog argument accepted for API symmetry with validation helpers.

parameters.name: source_dir
parameters.description: Directory scanned for `.rs` and `.lua` source files.

functions.name: quality
functions.description: Computes documentation quality for a supplied catalog or the editable in-memory catalog.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog to score; omitted scores the editable catalog.

functions.name: qualityModule
functions.description: Computes documentation quality for entries belonging to one module.

parameters.name: module_name
parameters.description: Module name used to filter entries before scoring.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog to score; omitted scores the editable catalog.

functions.description: Returns documented and live API counts for the full `lurek` table.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog used for documented entry count.

functions.name: coverageModule
functions.description: Returns documented and live API counts for one module.

parameters.name: catalog_ud
parameters.description: Optional catalog used for documented entry count.

functions.name: exportCompletions
functions.description: Exports catalog completion metadata to a file.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Output file path for completion data.

functions.name: exportHover
functions.description: Exports catalog hover metadata to a file.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Output file path for hover data.

functions.name: exportSignatures
functions.description: Exports catalog signature metadata to a file.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Output file path for signature data.

functions.name: exportAll
functions.description: Exports all editor documentation artifacts for a catalog into a directory.

parameters.name: output_dir
parameters.description: Directory that receives all generated artifacts.

functions.name: exportMarkdown
functions.description: Writes a Markdown API reference from catalog entries.

functions.name: exportCheatsheet
functions.description: Writes a compact text cheatsheet from catalog entries.

functions.name: schema

parameters.description: Rule table keyed by field name; `__strict` enables strict validation.

functions.name: schemaFromToml

parameters.description: Optional module name to reflect; omitted reflects every table-valued module.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional prefix used to build qualifiedName values.

modules.name: event

functions.name: exit
functions.description: Requests engine shutdown with an optional process exit code.

functions.name: poll
functions.description: Creates a polling function that returns the next queued event each time it is called.

functions.name: clear
functions.description: Clears all pending events from the shared event queue.

functions.description: Creates an isolated signal dispatcher for Lua callbacks.
