functions.description: Creates a procedural map generator from a group and either a size preset or explicit dimensions.

parameters.name: presetOrWidth
parameters.description: Size preset (`"small"`, `"medium"`, `"large"`) or width in tiles.

parameters.name: segmentSizeOrHeight
parameters.description: Segment size (if preset) or height in tiles.

parameters.name: segmentSize
parameters.description: Segment size when using explicit dimensions.

functions.name: loadTMX
functions.description: Parses a TMX (Tiled XML) string and returns a table describing the map structure.

functions.name: fromLDtk
functions.description: Loads a tilemap from an LDtk JSON string, optionally targeting a specific level.

parameters.name: levelName
parameters.description: Level name to load, or nil for the first level.

functions.name: newLargeMapRenderer
functions.description: Creates a chunk-based large-map renderer for efficient rendering of very large maps.

modules.name: timer
modules.description: `lurek.timer` - Provides time management with delta time, fixed timestep, cooldowns, delays, intervals, and frame counting.

functions.name: getDelta
functions.description: Returns the time in seconds elapsed since the last frame. Use this to make movement and animations frame-rate independent.

functions.name: getFPS
functions.description: Returns the current frames-per-second count. Useful for performance monitoring overlays and debug HUDs.

functions.name: getTime
functions.description: Returns the total elapsed game time in seconds since the engine started. Useful for time-based animations, effects, and shader uniforms.

functions.name: getAverageDelta
functions.description: Returns the smoothed average delta time in seconds over a recent window of frames. More stable than getDelta for display or adaptive logic.

functions.name: getFrameCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of frames rendered since the engine started.

functions.name: step
functions.description: Advances the internal clock by one tick and returns the delta time for that tick. Typically called by the engine loop; game scripts rarely need this.

functions.name: getMicroTime
functions.description: Returns high-resolution elapsed time in seconds since engine start. Useful for precise benchmarking and profiling.

functions.name: getPhysicsDelta
functions.description: Returns the fixed timestep used for physics simulation in seconds. The default is typically 1/60.

functions.name: setPhysicsDelta
functions.description: Sets the fixed timestep for physics simulation. Clamped between 1/240 and 1/10 seconds. Lower values increase accuracy but cost more CPU.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Desired fixed delta time in seconds.

functions.name: getPhysicsMaxSteps
functions.description: Returns the maximum number of physics steps allowed per frame. Prevents the spiral of death when the game runs slowly.

functions.name: setPhysicsMaxSteps
functions.description: Sets the maximum number of physics steps allowed per frame. Clamped between 1 and 64. Higher values improve accuracy under lag but cost more CPU.

functions.name: sleep
functions.description: Blocks the current thread for the given number of seconds. Use sparingly — this halts the entire game loop. Intended for loading screens or synchronization.

functions.name: newScheduler
functions.description: Creates a new LScheduler instance for managing timed and frame-based callbacks independently from the global timer. Each scheduler has its own time scale and event list.

functions.name: chain
functions.description: Creates a scheduler pre-loaded with a sequence of delayed callbacks. Each step is a table with an optional `delay` (seconds) and optional `func` (callback). Delays accumulate so each step fires after the sum of all preceding delays. Returns the scheduler for manual update calls.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Array of step tables, each with optional fields `delay` (number) and `func` (function).

functions.name: afterReal
functions.description: Schedules a one-shot callback based on real (wall-clock) time, unaffected by game pausing or time scaling. Use for UI fade-outs, notifications, or anything that should run on real time.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Real-time delay in seconds before the callback fires.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke when the real-time deadline is reached.

functions.name: tickRealTimers
functions.description: Checks all real-time timers and fires any whose deadline has passed. Returns the number of callbacks that fired. Call this once per frame after afterReal scheduling.

functions.name: setSmoothingFactor
functions.description: Sets the exponential smoothing factor used by getSmoothedDelta. Lower values produce smoother (more lagged) results; higher values track changes faster. Clamped to [0.01, 1.0].

functions.name: getSmoothedDelta
functions.description: Returns an exponentially smoothed delta time in seconds, reducing frame-to-frame jitter. Call once per frame for consistent results. The smoothing factor is set via setSmoothingFactor.

functions.name: waitSeconds
functions.description: Yields the current coroutine for the given number of real-time seconds. Must be called from within a coroutine. The coroutine is resumed automatically when tickWaits is called and the deadline has passed.

functions.name: waitFrames
functions.description: Yields the current coroutine for the given number of frames. Must be called from within a coroutine. The coroutine is resumed automatically when tickWaits is called and the target frame count has been reached.

functions.name: tickWaits
functions.description: Checks all pending waitSeconds and waitFrames coroutines, resumes any whose deadline or frame target has been reached, and cleans up completed entries. Returns the number of coroutines that were resumed. Call once per frame.

modules.name: tween
modules.description: `lurek.tween` - Provides value tweening with easing functions, sequences, parallel groups, and property animation for smooth game transitions.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Advances all active tweens, sequences, parallels, and springs by the given delta time. Call once per frame.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since the last frame.

functions.name: tween
functions.description: Creates and starts a property tween that smoothly interpolates numeric fields on the target table over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration in seconds for the tween.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The table whose fields will be animated.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping field names to their target end values.

functions.name: sequence
functions.description: Creates a new empty tween sequence. Chain `.tween()`, `.delay()`, and `.callback()` steps, then call `:start()`.

functions.name: parallel
functions.description: Creates a new empty parallel tween group. Add tweens with `:tween()` or `:add()`, then call `:start()` to run them simultaneously.

functions.name: delay
functions.description: Creates a one-shot delay. After the specified seconds elapse, the optional callback is invoked.

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Optional callback fired when the delay completes.

functions.name: cancelAll
functions.description: Immediately cancels all active tweens, sequences, parallels, and springs managed by the tween engine.

functions.name: getActiveCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of currently active tweens, sequences, and parallels.

functions.name: registerEasing
functions.description: Registers a custom easing function by name. The function receives a progress value (0..1) and must return an eased value.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name for the custom easing.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Easing function `f(t) -> number` where t is 0..1.

functions.name: getEasingNames
functions.description: Returns an array of all available easing function names, including both built-in and custom-registered easings.

functions.name: newState
functions.description: Creates a standalone tween state for manual interpolation. Useful when you need eased progress without automatic property updates.

functions.name: to
functions.description: Creates and starts a property tween with a different parameter order: target first, then fields, duration, easing.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The table whose fields will be animated.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping field names to their target end values.

functions.name: tweenChain
functions.description: Creates a sequence from a table of step descriptors. Each step is a table with `duration`, `target`, `fields`, optional `easing`, optional `callback`, or a `delay` key for pauses.

parameters.name: steps
parameters.description: Array of step tables describing the chain.

functions.name: tweenColor
functions.description: Creates and starts a color tween that smoothly interpolates r, g, b, and/or a fields on the target table.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Target color values as `{r=, g=, b=, a=}`. Only present keys are tweened.

functions.name: spring
functions.description: Creates a spring-physics animation that smoothly drives table fields toward target values with bounce and settle behavior.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The table whose fields will be animated by the spring.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping field names to their spring target values.

modules.name: ui
modules.description: `lurek.ui` - Provides immediate-mode and retained-mode UI widgets including buttons, sliders, text inputs, panels, and layout containers.

functions.name: newButton
functions.description: Creates a new button widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newLabel
functions.description: Creates a new label widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newTextInput
functions.description: Creates a new text input widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newCheckbox
functions.description: Creates a new checkbox widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newSlider
functions.description: Creates a new slider widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newProgressBar
functions.description: Creates a new progress bar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newComboBox
functions.description: Creates a new combo box (drop-down) widget.

functions.name: newList
functions.description: Creates a new list box widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newPanel
functions.description: Creates a new panel widget (container).

functions.name: newLayout
functions.description: Creates a new layout container widget.

functions.name: newScrollPanel
functions.description: Creates a new scrollable panel widget.

functions.name: newNinePatch
functions.description: Creates a new nine-patch widget for scalable bordered images.

functions.name: newTabBar
functions.description: Creates a new tab bar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newSeparator
functions.description: Creates a new separator widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newSpacer
functions.description: Creates a new spacer widget for spacing between other widgets.

functions.name: newToast
functions.description: Creates a new toast notification widget.

functions.name: newTreeView
functions.description: Creates a new tree view widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newRadioButton
functions.description: Creates a new radio button widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newScrollBar
functions.description: Creates a new scroll bar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newWindow
functions.description: Creates a new GUI window widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newSplitPanel
functions.description: Creates a new split panel widget with two resizable sub-panels.

functions.name: newDockPanel
functions.description: Creates a new dock panel widget for docking child widgets to sides.

functions.name: newToolbar
functions.description: Creates a new toolbar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newMenuBar
functions.description: Creates a new menu bar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newMenuItem
functions.description: Creates a new menu item widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newDialog
functions.description: Creates a new dialog widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newStatusBar
functions.description: Creates a new status bar widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newAccordion
functions.description: Creates a new accordion widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newTooltipPanel
functions.description: Creates a new tooltip panel widget.

functions.name: newColorPicker
functions.description: Creates a new color picker widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: newTable
functions.description: Creates a new table widget for tabular data display.

functions.name: newImageWidget
functions.description: Creates a new image display widget.

functions.name: setTheme
functions.description: Applies a theme to the UI context. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: getTheme
functions.description: Returns whether a theme is currently set.

functions.name: getRoot
functions.description: Returns the root panel widget. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: setFocus
functions.description: Sets keyboard focus to a widget, or clears focus if nil.

parameters.name: widget
parameters.description: The widget table to focus, or nil to clear.

functions.name: getFocus
functions.description: Returns the index of the currently focused widget, or nil.

functions.name: focusNext
functions.description: Moves keyboard focus to the next focusable widget.

functions.name: focusPrev
functions.description: Moves keyboard focus to the previous focusable widget.

functions.name: clearFocus
functions.description: Clears keyboard focus from all widgets.

functions.name: addToast
functions.description: Adds a toast notification to the queue.

parameters.name: toast_table
parameters.description: Table with message (string) and optional duration (number).

functions.name: getToastCount
functions.description: Returns the number of active toast notifications.

functions.name: mousepressed
functions.description: Delivers a mouse press event to the UI.

functions.name: mousereleased
functions.description: Delivers a mouse release event to the UI.

functions.name: mousemoved
functions.description: Delivers a mouse move event to the UI.

functions.name: keypressed
functions.description: Delivers a key press event to the UI.

functions.name: textinput
functions.description: Delivers a text input event to the UI.

functions.name: wheelmoved
functions.description: Delivers a mouse wheel event to the UI.

functions.name: update
functions.description: Updates the UI context and dispatches pending events to callbacks.

functions.name: draw
functions.description: Invokes custom draw callbacks for all widgets that have one registered.

functions.name: newCustomWidget
functions.description: Creates a new custom widget with optional initial configuration.

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Optional table with x, y, width, height, id, visible, enabled fields.

functions.name: getWidgetCount
functions.description: Returns the total number of widgets in the UI context.

functions.name: drawToImage
functions.description: Renders the entire UI to an image buffer.

functions.name: parseWidgetState
functions.description: Validates and normalizes a widget state string.

functions.name: newSpinBox
functions.description: Creates a new spin box (numeric stepper) widget.

functions.name: newSwitch
functions.description: Creates a new toggle switch widget.

functions.name: newBadge
functions.description: Creates a new badge widget for displaying counts.

functions.name: setDefaultTheme
functions.description: Applies the built-in default theme to the UI context.

functions.name: setViewport
functions.description: Sets the viewport size for the UI context.

functions.name: flushCache
functions.description: Flushes internal UI caches. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: beginDrag
functions.description: Begins a drag operation on a widget.

parameters.name: widget
parameters.description: The widget table or widget index.

functions.name: getActiveDrag
functions.description: Returns the widget index currently being dragged, or nil.

functions.name: dropOn
functions.description: Drops the currently dragged widget onto a target widget.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target widget table or widget index.

functions.name: endDrag
functions.description: Ends the current drag operation without dropping.

functions.name: update_bindings
functions.description: Updates data bindings for widgets that reference binding keys.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: A table mapping binding keys to values.

functions.name: loadLayout
functions.description: Loads a UI layout from a Lua table definition.

functions.name: loadLayoutFile
functions.description: Loads a UI layout from a TOML file. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the TOML layout file.

functions.name: renderToImage
functions.description: Renders the UI to a PNG file. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

modules.name: window
modules.description: `lurek.window` - Provides window management with resizing, fullscreen, title, icon, DPI scaling, and display mode control.

functions.name: setTitle
functions.description: Sets the window title bar text. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: The new window title to display.

functions.name: getTitle
functions.description: Returns the current window title bar text.

functions.name: getWidth
functions.description: Returns the current window width in logical (DPI-independent) pixels.

functions.name: getHeight
functions.description: Returns the current window height in logical (DPI-independent) pixels.

functions.name: getDimensions
functions.description: Returns the current window width and height in logical pixels.

functions.name: setFullscreen
functions.description: Enables or disables fullscreen mode. Supports "desktop" (borderless) and "exclusive" types.

functions.name: getFullscreen
functions.description: Returns the current fullscreen state and type.

functions.name: isOpen
functions.description: Returns whether the window is currently open. Always returns true while the game is running.

functions.name: setVSync
functions.description: Sets the vertical sync mode. Controls how frame presentation is synchronized with the display.

functions.name: getVSync
functions.description: Returns the current VSync mode. This function is exposed to Lua scripts.

functions.name: hasFocus
functions.description: Returns whether the window currently has keyboard focus.

functions.name: hasMouseFocus
functions.description: Returns whether the mouse cursor is inside the window.

functions.name: isMinimized
functions.description: Returns whether the window is currently minimized to the taskbar.

functions.name: isMaximized
functions.description: Returns whether the window is currently maximized.

functions.name: isVisible
functions.description: Returns whether the window is currently visible on screen.

functions.name: minimize
functions.description: Minimizes the window to the taskbar.

functions.name: maximize
functions.description: Maximizes the window to fill the screen.

functions.name: restore
functions.description: Restores the window from minimized or maximized state to its previous size and position.

functions.name: getPosition
functions.description: Returns the window position on screen in pixels.

functions.name: setPosition
functions.description: Moves the window to the specified screen position.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-coordinate for the window's top-left corner.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-coordinate for the window's top-left corner.

functions.name: getDisplayCount
functions.description: Returns the number of connected displays (monitors).

functions.name: getDisplays
functions.description: Returns a list of all connected displays with their properties. Each entry contains index, name, position (x, y), resolution (width, height), scale factor, refresh rate, and whether it is the primary monitor.

functions.name: getCurrentDisplay
functions.description: Returns the index of the display that currently contains the window.

functions.name: setDisplay
functions.description: Moves the window to the specified display. Throws an error if the index is negative.

parameters.name: display
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the target display.

functions.name: getDesktopDimensions
functions.description: Returns the desktop resolution of a specific display, or the current display if none is specified.

parameters.name: display
parameters.description: Zero-based display index. Uses the current display if omitted.

functions.name: getDPIScale
functions.description: Returns the current DPI scale factor of the window. A value of 2.0 means the display uses 2x scaling (e.g., Retina).

functions.name: toPixels
functions.description: Converts a value from logical (DPI-independent) units to physical pixel units using the current DPI scale.

functions.name: fromPixels
functions.description: Converts a value from physical pixel units to logical (DPI-independent) units using the current DPI scale.

functions.name: setIcon
functions.description: Sets the window icon from an image file. The file must exist in the game's filesystem. Supports PNG and other common image formats.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the icon image file.

functions.name: setMode
functions.description: Sets the window display mode with a specific resolution and optional flags. Use this to resize the window and configure fullscreen or VSync at the same time.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: The desired window width in pixels.

parameters.name: h
parameters.description: The desired window height in pixels.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: Optional table with fields: fullscreen (boolean), fullscreentype (string), vsync (number).

functions.name: getMode
functions.description: Returns the current window display mode: width, height, and a flags table containing fullscreen state, fullscreen type, and VSync mode.

functions.name: windowConfig
functions.description: Applies multiple window settings at once from a configuration table. Supports title, width, height, fullscreen, fullscreentype, vsync, position (x, y), scaleMode, and display index.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Configuration table with optional fields: title (string), width (number), height (number), fullscreen (boolean), fullscreentype (string), vsync (number), x (number), y (number), scaleMode (string), display (number).

functions.name: close
functions.description: Closes the window and signals the engine to shut down.

functions.name: requestAttention
functions.description: Requests user attention by flashing the taskbar icon. Useful for notifying the player when the window is in the background.

functions.name: flash
functions.description: Flashes the window briefly to attract the user's attention.

functions.name: getFullscreenModes
functions.description: Returns a list of all supported fullscreen video modes across all monitors. Each entry contains width, height, and refresh rate.

functions.name: getDisplayName
functions.description: Returns the human-readable name of a display. Returns "Unknown" if the display cannot be identified.

parameters.name: display
parameters.description: Zero-based display index. Uses the current display if omitted.

functions.name: getPixelDimensions
functions.description: Returns the window dimensions in actual physical pixels, accounting for DPI scaling.

functions.name: showMessageBox
functions.description: Displays a native OS message box dialog. Blocks execution until the user dismisses it.

functions.name: focus
functions.description: Requests keyboard focus for the window. No-op if already focused.

functions.name: getNativeDPIScale
functions.description: Returns the native DPI scale factor reported by the operating system.

functions.name: getDisplayOrientation
functions.description: Returns the display orientation based on the window's aspect ratio.

functions.name: getSafeArea
functions.description: Returns the safe drawing area of the window. On desktop this is the full window area. Useful for compatibility with mobile-style layout code.

functions.name: getSystemTheme
functions.description: Returns the operating system's current color theme. Desktop currently returns "unknown".

functions.name: isHighDPIAllowed
functions.description: Returns whether high-DPI rendering is allowed. Currently always returns false on desktop.

functions.name: getScaleInfo
functions.description: Returns detailed scaling information including scale factors, offsets, and logical game dimensions. Useful for coordinate conversion between screen space and game space.

functions.name: getScaleMode
functions.description: Returns the current content scale mode name (e.g., "stretch", "letterbox", "pixel-perfect").

functions.name: setScaleMode
functions.description: Sets the content scale mode. Controls how the game's logical resolution maps to the window size.

functions.name: getGameWidth
functions.description: Returns the logical game width as defined by the current scale mode and game configuration.

functions.name: getGameHeight
functions.description: Returns the logical game height as defined by the current scale mode and game configuration.

functions.name: isFullscreen
functions.description: Returns whether the window is currently in fullscreen mode.

functions.name: isResizable
functions.description: Returns whether the window can be resized by the user.

functions.name: onDpiChange
functions.description: Registers a callback function that is called whenever the DPI scale factor changes (e.g., when the window is moved to a different monitor). Only one callback can be active at a time; setting a new one replaces the previous.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback receiving the new DPI scale as a number.

functions.name: pollDpiChange
functions.description: Checks if the DPI scale has changed since the last poll and fires the onDpiChange callback if so. Call this once per frame in your update loop to detect monitor changes.

functions.name: openFileDialog
functions.description: Opens a native file picker dialog and returns the selected file paths. Blocks until the user picks file(s) or cancels.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional config table with fields: title (string), defaultPath (string), multiple (boolean), filters (table of {name, extensions}).

classes.name: BiomeClassifier
classes.description: Lua-visible wrapper around the biome classification engine, used to assign biome types based on height, moisture, and temperature.

methods.name: classify
methods.description: Classify a single point into a biome type based on its environmental parameters.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Elevation value (0.0–1.0) of the terrain point.

methods.name: classifyMap
methods.description: Classify an entire grid of points into biome types in bulk.

parameters.name: heights
parameters.description: Flat array of height values (length = width*height).

parameters.name: moisture
parameters.description: Flat array of moisture values (length = width*height).

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Optional flat array of temperature values. If omitted, temperature is ignored.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Check whether this object matches a given type name.

classes.name: LAIBlackboard
classes.description: Lua handle for a typed AI blackboard storing local key-value facts.

methods.name: setNumber
methods.description: Stores a numeric fact under the given blackboard key.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Numeric value stored for later numeric reads.

methods.name: getNumber
methods.description: Returns a numeric blackboard fact or the provided fallback when the key is missing or not numeric.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Fallback value used when the key has no numeric entry; defaults to zero.

methods.name: setBool
methods.description: Stores a boolean fact under the given blackboard key.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Boolean value stored for later boolean reads.

methods.name: getBool
methods.description: Returns a boolean blackboard fact or the provided fallback when the key is missing or not boolean.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Fallback value used when the key has no boolean entry; defaults to false.

methods.name: setString
methods.description: Stores a string fact under the given blackboard key.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: String value stored for later string reads.

methods.name: getString
methods.description: Returns a string blackboard fact or the provided fallback when the key is missing or not a string.

parameters.name: default
parameters.description: Fallback value used when the key has no string entry; defaults to an empty string.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Returns whether the blackboard contains any entry for the given key.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the given key from the blackboard if it exists.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes every local entry from this blackboard.

methods.name: getKeys
methods.description: Returns every local blackboard key in an array-style Lua table.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the number of entries currently stored in this blackboard.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this blackboard handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this blackboard handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `AIBlackboard`, `Blackboard`, and `Object`.

classes.name: LAIDirector
classes.description: Lua handle for an AI director that tracks encounter tension and pacing factors.

methods.name: pushEvent
methods.description: Adds an event intensity sample to the director tension model.

parameters.name: intensity
parameters.description: Event intensity added to current tension.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances director tension decay and phase evaluation.

methods.name: tension
methods.description: Returns the current director tension value.

methods.name: phase
methods.description: Returns the current director phase name.

methods.name: spawnRateFactor
methods.description: Returns the spawn-rate multiplier derived from current tension and phase.

methods.name: lootFactor
methods.description: Returns the loot multiplier derived from current tension and phase.

methods.name: ambientIntensity
methods.description: Returns the ambient intensity derived from current tension and phase.

methods.name: setTension
methods.description: Directly sets the director tension value.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets director tension and phase state to defaults.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this AI director handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this AI director handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LAIDirector` and `Object`.

classes.name: LAIFlowField
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for an AI flow field over a path grid.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns flow field width. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns flow field height. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: hasGoal
methods.description: Returns whether a goal is set. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setGoal
methods.description: Sets the one-based flow field goal.

methods.name: getGoal
methods.description: Returns the one-based flow field goal when set.

methods.name: getDirection
methods.description: Returns flow direction for a one-based cell.

methods.name: getDistance
methods.description: Returns distance to goal for a one-based cell.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this AI flow field handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this AI flow field handle matches a supported type name.

classes.name: LAILod
classes.description: Lua handle for distance-based AI level-of-detail tier selection.

methods.name: tierFor
methods.description: Returns the LOD tier for an agent position relative to a reference position.

parameters.name: rx
parameters.description: Reference X position, usually camera or player position.

parameters.name: ry
parameters.description: Reference Y position, usually camera or player position.

methods.name: shouldUpdate
methods.description: Returns whether a tier should update on a given frame counter.

methods.name: tierCount
methods.description: Returns the number of configured AI LOD tiers.

methods.name: tierName
methods.description: Returns the name of an AI LOD tier when the index is valid.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this AI LOD handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this AI LOD handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LAILod` and `Object`.

classes.name: LAIWorld
classes.description: Lua handle for an AI world that owns named agents, global blackboard data, and custom callback registrations.

methods.name: addAgent
methods.description: Creates a named agent in this world and returns a handle that can edit its movement and decision state.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique agent name used by later lookup, tags, custom callbacks, and squad membership references.

methods.name: getAgent
methods.description: Returns the named agent handle when it exists in this world.

methods.name: removeAgent
methods.description: Removes an agent from this world by using an existing agent handle.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Agent handle whose stored name identifies the world entry to remove.

methods.name: getAgentCount
methods.description: Returns the number of agents currently stored in this world.

methods.name: getGlobalBlackboard
methods.description: Returns a blackboard snapshot containing the world's shared AI facts.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances the world simulation and invokes custom decision callbacks for agents that use a custom model.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Elapsed simulation time in seconds for this update step.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this AI world handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this AI world handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `AIWorld` and `Object`.

classes.name: LAabbTree
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for an AABB tree spatial index.

methods.name: insert
methods.description: Inserts an AABB by id. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes an AABB by id. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: query
methods.description: Queries ids intersecting an AABB. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: queryPoint
methods.description: Queries ids containing a point. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an AABB by id. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: contains
methods.description: Returns whether the tree contains an id.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the number of items in the tree.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Returns whether the tree has no items.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all items from the tree. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this AABB tree handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this AABB tree handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LAabbTree` and `Object`.

classes.name: LAccordion
classes.description: Adds accordion-specific methods to an accordion widget table.

methods.name: addSection
methods.description: Adds a collapsible section to this accordion.

parameters.name: content_idx
parameters.description: Optional widget index for the section content.

methods.name: getSectionCount
methods.description: Returns the number of sections in this accordion.

methods.name: toggleSection
methods.description: Toggles the expanded state of an accordion section by its 1-based index.

methods.name: isSectionExpanded
methods.description: Returns whether an accordion section is expanded.

methods.name: isExclusive
methods.description: Returns whether this accordion is in exclusive mode (only one section open at a time).

methods.name: setExclusive
methods.description: Sets exclusive mode. When true, expanding one section collapses all others.

methods.name: getSectionTitle
methods.description: Returns the title of an accordion section by its 1-based index.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string of this widget (e.g. "LButton", "LSlider").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this widget matches the given type name, including base types "LWidget" and "Object".

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to check against.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: setSize
methods.description: Sets the width and height of this widget in pixels.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the width and height of this widget.

methods.name: getRect
methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Shows or hides this widget. Hidden widgets are not drawn and do not receive input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently visible.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this widget. Disabled widgets appear grayed out and ignore input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently enabled and can receive input.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Assigns a string identifier to this widget for lookup with findById.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the string identifier assigned to this widget.

methods.name: setTooltip
methods.description: Sets the tooltip text shown when the user hovers over this widget.

methods.name: getTooltip
methods.description: Returns the tooltip text of this widget.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns the current interaction state of this widget (e.g. "normal", "hovered", "pressed", "disabled").

methods.name: addChild
methods.description: Adds a child widget to this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.name: removeChild
methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to remove.

methods.name: getChildCount
methods.description: Returns the number of direct child widgets attached to this widget.

methods.name: getChildren
methods.description: Returns a table of lightweight child widget references, each containing an _idx field.

methods.name: findById
methods.description: Searches this widget's subtree for a child with the given ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The widget ID to search for.

methods.name: setOnClick
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget is clicked.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnChange
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget's value changes.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnDraw
methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: _self
parameters.description: The widget (ignored, kept for method-call syntax).

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.name: setPadding
methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.name: setMargin
methods.description: Sets the outer margin of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top margin in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getMargin
methods.description: Returns the outer margin of this widget.

methods.name: setZOrder
methods.description: Sets the z-order (draw priority) of this widget. Higher values draw on top.

methods.name: getZOrder
methods.description: Returns the z-order (draw priority) of this widget.

methods.name: setMinSize
methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMinSize
methods.description: Returns the minimum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setMaxSize
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMaxSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setAnchor
methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Distance from parent's left edge, or nil.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Distance from parent's right edge, or nil.

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.description: Distance from parent's bottom edge, or nil.

methods.name: setAnchorCenter
methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor
methods.description: Removes all anchor constraints from this widget.

methods.name: setFlexGrow
methods.description: Sets the flex-grow factor controlling how much extra space this widget receives in a layout.

methods.name: getFlexGrow
methods.description: Returns the flex-grow factor of this widget.

methods.name: setFlexShrink
methods.description: Sets the flex-shrink factor controlling how much this widget shrinks when layout space is insufficient.

methods.name: getFlexShrink
methods.description: Returns the flex-shrink factor of this widget.

methods.name: bind
methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.name: attachToEntity

classes.name: LAgent
classes.description: Lua handle for a named agent stored inside an AI world.

methods.description: Sets this agent's world position when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.description: New X position in world units.

parameters.description: New Y position in world units.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns this agent's world position or the origin when the agent has been removed.

methods.name: setVelocity
methods.description: Sets this agent's velocity vector when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: New X velocity in world units per second.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: New Y velocity in world units per second.

methods.name: getVelocity
methods.description: Returns this agent's velocity vector or zero velocity when the agent has been removed.

methods.name: setMaxSpeed
methods.description: Sets this agent's maximum movement speed when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Maximum speed in world units per second.

methods.name: getMaxSpeed
methods.description: Returns this agent's maximum movement speed or the default speed for a missing agent.

methods.description: Sets this agent's maximum steering force when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Maximum steering force applied during steering calculations.

methods.name: getMaxForce
methods.description: Returns this agent's maximum steering force or the default force for a missing agent.

methods.name: setPriority
methods.description: Sets this agent's integer priority when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.name: p
parameters.description: Priority value used by game-side AI scheduling or ordering logic.

methods.name: getPriority

methods.description: Installs a Lua callback as this agent's decision model and stores it in the callback registry.

parameters.description: Function called during world updates with `(agent, blackboard, dt)` for this agent.

methods.name: addTag

methods.name: removeTag
methods.description: Removes a tag string from this agent when the agent still exists in its world.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag name to remove from the agent tag set.

methods.name: hasTag
methods.description: Returns whether this agent currently has the given tag.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Tag name to check in the agent tag set.

methods.name: getBlackboard
methods.description: Returns a blackboard snapshot for this agent or an empty blackboard when the agent has been removed.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this agent handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this agent handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `Agent` and `Object`.

classes.name: LAnimation
classes.description: Lua-side animation object containing frame rectangles, named clips, playback state, and blend state.

methods.name: addFrame
methods.description: Adds one frame rectangle to this animation.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Frame X coordinate in texture pixels.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Frame Y coordinate in texture pixels.

methods.name: addFramesFromGrid
methods.description: Adds frames by slicing a texture grid.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Zero-based grid cell index where import begins.

methods.name: addFramesFromRects
methods.description: Adds frames from an array of rectangle tables.

parameters.name: rects
parameters.description: Array of tables with numeric `x`, `y`, `w`, and `h` fields.

methods.name: addClip
methods.description: Adds a named clip using existing frame indices.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Clip name used by playback and state machines.

parameters.name: indices_tbl
parameters.description: Array of frame indices that make up the clip.

parameters.name: fps
parameters.description: Playback speed in frames per second.

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: True when playback should wrap at the end.

methods.name: setClipMode
methods.description: Changes the playback mode for an existing clip.

methods.name: getClipMode
methods.description: Returns the playback mode name for a clip when it exists.

methods.name: addClipFromGrid
methods.signature: LAnimation:addClipFromGrid(name, tw, th, fw, fh, start, count, fps, looping)
methods.description: Adds frames from a texture grid and creates a clip that references the new frames.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Zero-based grid cell index where import begins.

parameters.name: fps
parameters.description: Playback speed in frames per second.

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: True when playback should wrap at the end.

methods.name: play
methods.description: Starts playback of a named clip. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: stop
methods.description: Stops playback and resets animation playback state.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses animation playback without changing the current clip.

methods.name: resume
methods.description: Resumes playback of a paused animation.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances animation playback and records any frame or clip events.

methods.name: getQuad
methods.description: Returns the current frame rectangle as a table.

methods.name: pollEvents
methods.description: Drains animation events produced since the previous poll.

methods.name: isPlaying
methods.description: Returns whether this animation is currently playing.

methods.name: isLooping
methods.description: Returns whether the current clip loops.

methods.name: getClip
methods.description: Returns the current clip name when a clip is active.

methods.name: getSpeed
methods.description: Returns the animation playback speed multiplier.

methods.name: setSpeed
methods.description: Sets the animation playback speed multiplier.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Playback speed multiplier used by future updates.

methods.name: getFrameCount
methods.description: Returns the number of frame rectangles stored in this animation.

methods.name: getClipCount
methods.description: Returns the number of named clips stored in this animation.

methods.name: getCurrentFrame
methods.description: Returns the current frame index. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setFrame
methods.description: Sets the current frame index directly.

methods.name: crossfade
methods.description: Starts a crossfade from the current clip to another clip.

methods.name: getBlendState
methods.description: Returns current crossfade rectangles and blend factor when a crossfade is active.

methods.name: drawToImage
methods.description: Rasterizes the current animation frame into an image userdata.

methods.name: drawPreviewGrid
methods.description: Rasterizes all animation frames into a preview grid image.

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Number of columns in the preview grid.

parameters.name: cell_size
parameters.description: Size of each preview cell in pixels.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this animation handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this animation handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LAnimation` and `Object`.

classes.name: LApiCatalog
classes.description: Provides Lua methods for querying, merging, filtering, and exporting catalog data.

methods.name: getModules
methods.description: Returns every module represented in this catalog.

methods.description: Returns catalog entries, optionally limited to one module.

parameters.description: Optional module name used to filter entries.

methods.name: getEntry
methods.description: Returns one catalog entry by qualified API name.

parameters.description: Full dotted API name to find.

methods.description: Returns type names documented for one module.

methods.name: getTypeMethods
methods.description: Returns method entries associated with a qualified type name.

parameters.name: qualified_name
parameters.description: Qualified type name used as the method prefix.

methods.description: Counts entries in the catalog, optionally for one module.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Optional module name used to limit the count.

methods.name: merge
methods.description: Merges another catalog into this catalog and returns a new catalog value.

parameters.name: other
parameters.description: Catalog whose entries replace matching qualified names or append new entries.

methods.name: filter
methods.description: Builds a new catalog containing entries accepted by a Lua predicate.

parameters.name: predicate
parameters.description: Callback called with each `LDocEntry`; truthy return keeps the entry.

methods.name: search
methods.description: Searches names, qualified names, and descriptions with a case-insensitive substring query.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text matched against catalog metadata.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Converts this catalog into plain Lua tables for lightweight inspection.

methods.name: toJSON
methods.description: Serializes this catalog to formatted JSON.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this API catalog handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this API catalog handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LApiCatalog` and `Object`.

classes.name: LBandit

methods.description: Resets all bandit arm statistics. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: armCount
methods.description: Returns the number of arms in this bandit.

methods.name: totalPulls

classes.name: LBarChart
classes.description: Lua-exposed bar chart for data visualization.

methods.description: Adds a category with values for each series.

methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

classes.name: LBehaviorTree
classes.description: Lua handle for a behavior tree root and its most recent execution status.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Sets the behavior tree root by moving a node handle into the tree.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Node handle to consume as the new tree root.

methods.name: getLastStatus
methods.description: Returns the last behavior tree status string recorded by the tree.

methods.name: getDebugState
methods.description: Returns behavior tree debug counters and status in a Lua table.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this behavior tree handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this behavior tree handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `BehaviorTree` and `Object`.

methods.name: addSequence
methods.description: Create a sequence composite node. All children must succeed for this node to succeed.

methods.name: addSelector
methods.description: Create a selector (fallback) composite node. Succeeds if any child succeeds.

methods.name: addParallel
methods.description: Create a parallel composite node that runs all children simultaneously.

parameters.name: minSuccess
parameters.description: Minimum successful children required for this node to succeed.

methods.name: addInverter
methods.description: Create a decorator node that inverts its child's result (success ↔ failure).

methods.name: addRepeat
methods.description: Create a decorator node that repeats its child a fixed number of times.

methods.name: addLeaf
methods.description: Create a leaf (action) node that will invoke a named callback function on tick.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The leaf name (must match a setLeaf registration).

methods.name: addChild
methods.description: Attach a child node to a parent composite or decorator node.

parameters.name: childId
parameters.description: The child node ID to attach.

methods.name: setRoot
methods.description: Designate a node as the tree's root. Tick evaluation starts here.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The node ID to set as root.

methods.name: setLeaf
methods.description: Register or replace the callback function for a named leaf. The function must return "success", "failure", or "running".

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function returning a status string.

methods.name: tick
methods.description: Execute one tick of the behavior tree from the root. Returns the root node's status.

methods.name: resetState
methods.description: Reset the tree's running state. Use between encounters or when restarting AI logic.

methods.name: nodeCount
methods.description: Return the total number of nodes in the tree.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all nodes and leaf functions, resetting the tree to empty.

classes.name: LBezierCurve

methods.description: Sets a control point by one-based index.

methods.description: Returns the number of control points in this curve.

classes.name: LBlackboard
classes.description: Lua-facing shared key-value blackboard supporting bool/number/string values with watchers for reactive game logic.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Set a key to a value (boolean, number, string, or nil to clear). Notifies registered watchers if value changed.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to store. Pass nil to clear the key.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieve the value stored under a key. Returns nil if the key does not exist.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key name to look up.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a key exists on the blackboard.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove a single key from the blackboard.

methods.name: keys
methods.description: Return an array of all keys currently stored on the blackboard.

methods.name: watch
methods.description: Register a watcher callback that fires whenever the specified key changes. Use `"*"` to watch all keys.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key to watch, or `"*"` for all changes.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Called with (key, newValue) when a change occurs.

methods.name: unwatch
methods.description: Remove a previously registered watcher by its ID.

methods.name: getRevision
methods.description: Return the current revision counter. Increments on every value change.

methods.name: snapshot
methods.description: Return a table containing all current key-value pairs as a snapshot. Useful for serialization or debug display.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all keys and values from the blackboard.

methods.name: listLayers

methods.description: Returns whether this blend layer set handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LBlendLayerSet` and `Object`.

classes.name: LBody
classes.description: A handle to a single physics body in the world, providing per-body manipulation methods.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique numeric ID of this body within the world.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the current world-space position of this body.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Teleports the body to a new world-space position (does not apply physics forces).

methods.name: getX
methods.description: Returns only the X component of the body's position.

methods.name: getY
methods.description: Returns only the Y component of the body's position.

methods.name: getVelocity
methods.description: Returns the body's current linear velocity.

methods.name: setVelocity
methods.description: Directly sets the body's linear velocity.

methods.name: getAngle
methods.description: Returns the body's rotation angle in radians.

methods.name: setAngle
methods.description: Sets the body's rotation angle directly.

methods.name: getAngularVelocity
methods.description: Returns the body's angular (rotational) velocity.

methods.name: setAngularVelocity
methods.description: Sets the body's angular velocity directly.

parameters.name: omega
parameters.description: Angular velocity in radians per second.

methods.name: getMass
methods.description: Returns the body's total mass (computed from density and fixture areas).

methods.name: setMass
methods.description: Overrides the body's mass directly.

methods.name: getType
methods.description: Returns the body's type as a string.

methods.name: setType
methods.description: Changes the body's type at runtime.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the body's bounding width (from its primary shape).

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the body's bounding height (from its primary shape).

methods.name: getFriction
methods.description: Returns the body's friction coefficient.

methods.name: setFriction
methods.description: Sets the body's friction coefficient.

methods.name: getRestitution
methods.description: Returns the body's restitution (bounciness) value.

methods.name: setRestitution
methods.description: Sets the body's restitution (bounciness) value.

methods.name: getLayer
methods.description: Returns the body's collision layer bitmask.

methods.name: setLayer
methods.description: Sets the body's collision layer bitmask (which layers this body belongs to).

methods.name: getMask
methods.description: Returns the body's collision mask (which layers this body can collide with).

methods.name: setMask
methods.description: Sets the body's collision mask (which layers this body can collide with).

methods.name: applyImpulse
methods.description: Applies an instantaneous linear impulse to the body's center of mass.

methods.name: applyForce
methods.description: Applies a continuous force to the body's center of mass (accumulates over the step).

methods.name: applyTorque
methods.description: Applies a rotational torque to the body.

methods.name: applyForceAtPoint
methods.description: Applies a force at a specific world point, generating both linear and angular acceleration.

parameters.name: px
parameters.description: Application point X in world coordinates.

parameters.name: py
parameters.description: Application point Y in world coordinates.

methods.name: applyAngularImpulse
methods.description: Applies an instantaneous angular impulse (spin) to the body.

methods.name: getGravityScale
methods.description: Returns the gravity scale multiplier for this body (1.0 = normal gravity).

methods.name: setGravityScale
methods.description: Sets a per-body gravity scale multiplier (0 = no gravity, 2 = double gravity, -1 = inverted).

methods.name: isFixedRotation
methods.description: Returns whether the body's rotation is locked.

methods.name: setFixedRotation
methods.description: Locks or unlocks the body's rotation. Useful for player characters.

methods.name: getLinearDamping
methods.description: Returns the linear damping factor (velocity decay rate, like air resistance).

methods.name: setLinearDamping
methods.description: Sets the linear damping factor (higher = more velocity decay per step).

methods.name: getAngularDamping
methods.description: Returns the angular damping factor (rotational decay rate).

methods.name: setAngularDamping
methods.description: Sets the angular damping factor (higher = rotation decays faster).

methods.name: isBullet
methods.description: Returns whether continuous collision detection (bullet mode) is enabled for this body.

methods.name: setBullet
methods.description: Enables or disables continuous collision detection to prevent fast-moving tunneling.

methods.name: isSleepingAllowed
methods.description: Returns whether the body is allowed to enter sleep state when at rest.

methods.name: setSleepingAllowed
methods.description: Controls whether the body can enter sleep state. Disable for bodies that must stay active.

methods.name: destroy
methods.description: Destroys this body, removing it from the world along with all fixtures and joints.

methods.name: isSleeping
methods.description: Returns whether this body is currently in the sleeping (inactive) state.

methods.name: wakeUp
methods.description: Wakes the body from sleep, making it active in the simulation again.

methods.name: sleep
methods.description: Forces the body into sleep state, pausing its simulation until disturbed.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LBody").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks if this object is of a given type name.

classes.name: LChannel
classes.description: Creates a new unbounded channel for sending typed values between threads.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to test against (`"LChannel"`, `"Channel"`, or `"Object"`).

methods.name: push
methods.description: Pushes a value onto the channel. Blocks on bounded channels if the channel is full.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to send through the channel.

methods.name: pop
methods.description: Removes and returns the next value from the channel without blocking.

methods.name: peek
methods.description: Returns the next value from the channel without removing it.

methods.name: demand
methods.description: Blocks until a value is available on the channel or the optional timeout expires.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum seconds to wait. If omitted, waits indefinitely.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the number of values currently queued in the channel.

methods.name: getCapacity
methods.description: Returns the maximum capacity of a bounded channel, or `nil` for unbounded channels.

methods.name: isBounded
methods.description: Checks whether this channel has a fixed capacity limit.

methods.name: tryPush
methods.description: Attempts to push a value onto a bounded channel without blocking.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all pending values from the channel.

methods.name: supply
methods.description: Pushes a value and blocks until a consumer pops it (synchronous handoff).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to hand off to a consumer.

methods.name: pushTable
methods.description: Pushes a table value onto the channel, raising an error if the value is not a table.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The table to send through the channel.

methods.name: popTable
methods.description: Pops the next value from the channel only if it is a table, discarding non-table values.

methods.name: pushBytes
methods.description: Pushes raw binary data onto the channel as a byte blob.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The binary data to send (Lua strings can hold arbitrary bytes).

methods.name: popBytes
methods.description: Pops the next value from the channel only if it is a byte blob, discarding non-bytes values.

classes.name: LCommandQueue
classes.description: Lua handle for a command queue that stores ordered callback-backed commands.

methods.name: enqueue
methods.description: Adds a command callback to the back of the queue.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Command type label stored for inspection.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked by command execution logic outside this wrapper.

methods.name: pushFront
methods.description: Adds a command callback to the front of the queue.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Command type label stored for inspection.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked by command execution logic outside this wrapper.

methods.name: replace
methods.description: Replaces the queue contents with one command callback.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Command type label stored for inspection.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked by command execution logic outside this wrapper.

methods.name: cancelCurrent
methods.description: Cancels the currently active command when one exists.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes every queued command. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the number of commands currently queued.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Returns whether the command queue has no commands.

methods.name: getCurrentType
methods.description: Returns the type label of the current command when one exists.

methods.description: Returns the current command target coordinates.

methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this command queue handle.

methods.description: Returns whether this command queue handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `CommandQueue` and `Object`.

classes.name: LCommandStack
classes.description: Lua-facing undo/redo command stack. Records executed actions with optional undo functions for full history navigation.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Execute a named command immediately, recording it in history. Discards any redo history ahead of the current position.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: A descriptive name for the command (shown in history).

parameters.name: execFn
parameters.description: The function that performs the action.

parameters.name: undoFn
parameters.description: An optional function that reverses the action. If omitted, command cannot be undone.

methods.name: undo
methods.description: Undo the most recent command by calling its undo function. Moves the pointer back in history.

methods.name: redo
methods.description: Redo a previously undone command by re-calling its execute function. Moves the pointer forward.

methods.name: canUndo
methods.description: Check whether an undo operation is possible (there is a command with an undo function behind the pointer).

methods.name: canRedo
methods.description: Check whether a redo operation is possible (there are commands ahead of the pointer).

methods.name: getHistorySize
methods.description: Return the total number of commands in the history (both undone and available for redo).

methods.name: getCurrentName
methods.description: Return the name of the most recently executed (or undone-to) command, or nil if history is empty.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Discard all command history and free associated callbacks.

methods.description: Advance the debounce timer. If the wait period elapsed since last trigger, fires the callback and returns true.

methods.name: getFireCount

classes.name: LDepthSorter
classes.description: Depth sorter exposed to Lua as `LDepthSorter`. Collects draw callbacks or drawable objects with numeric depth values and flushes them in back-to-front order for correct painter's-algorithm rendering. Ideal for sorting sprites, particles, and layered game objects within a single scene.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Register a draw callback at a given depth value. When `flush` is called, all registered callbacks execute in back-to-front order (lowest depth drawn first, highest depth drawn last / on top). Use this for simple draw calls like sprite rendering where each entity has a depth/z-layer.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A zero-argument draw function invoked during flush.

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: Numeric z-depth controlling draw order — lower values are drawn behind higher values.

methods.name: addObject
methods.description: Register a game object table for depth-sorted rendering. The object must expose a numeric `depth` field and a `drawSorted(self)` method. During `flush`, each object's `drawSorted` is called in depth order, making this ideal for entity-based architectures where objects manage their own drawing.

parameters.name: obj
parameters.description: A game object table with a numeric `depth` field and a `drawSorted(self)` method.

methods.name: sort
methods.description: Sort all registered entries by depth without executing any callbacks. Call this only if you need to inspect the sorted order before drawing; `flush` already sorts automatically.

methods.name: flush
methods.description: Sort all entries by depth, execute every callback or object's `drawSorted` method in back-to-front order, then clear the sorter for the next frame. This is the standard one-call render path — call it once per frame inside your scene's `draw` or `render` callback.

methods.name: setStable
methods.description: Enable or disable stable sorting. When stable, items sharing the same depth value retain their insertion order, which prevents visual flickering between overlapping sprites at the same layer. Unstable sort is slightly faster but may swap equal-depth items between frames.

parameters.name: stable
parameters.description: True for stable sort (deterministic order at equal depth), false for unstable (faster but may flicker).

methods.name: isStable
methods.description: Returns whether the sorter uses stable sorting.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Discard all pending entries without executing any draw callbacks. Use this when a scene is interrupted, reset, or destroyed before its normal `flush` call.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the number of draw entries currently queued for the next `flush` call. Useful for debugging or deciding whether to skip an empty render pass.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string `"LDepthSorter"`.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Check whether this object matches a given type name. Accepts `"LDepthSorter"` or `"Object"`.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to test against.

methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: setAnchor
methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right

methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor

methods.name: getFlexShrink

methods.name: bind
methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.name: attachToEntity
methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LDoorManager
classes.description: Lua-visible door manager that controls sliding doors within a raycaster map.

methods.name: addDoor
methods.description: Registers a new sliding door at the given grid cell.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Grid column of the door cell.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Grid row of the door cell.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: How fast the door opens/closes (units per second).
