methods.description: Begins opening the door at the given index. The door animates over time via `update()`.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the door to open.

methods.name: closeDoor
methods.description: Begins closing the door at the given index. The door animates over time via `update()`.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the door to close.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances all door animations by the given delta time. Call once per frame.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since last frame.

methods.name: getDoor
methods.description: Returns a table describing the door at the given index, or nil if index is out of range.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the door to query.

methods.name: count
methods.description: Returns the total number of registered doors.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LDrawLayer
classes.description: Z-ordered draw callback layer for sorting draw calls by depth before flushing.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Enqueues a draw callback at the given z-depth. Callbacks execute when flush() is called.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: Z-depth value used for sorting (lower draws first).

methods.name: flush
methods.description: Sorts all queued callbacks by z-depth and executes them in order, then empties the layer.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Discards all queued callbacks without executing them.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the number of callbacks currently queued.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LEmotionModel
classes.description: Lua handle for decaying named emotion intensities.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds an emotion definition with resting value, decay, and visibility threshold.

parameters.name: min_vis
parameters.description: Minimum value considered visible or active.

methods.name: trigger
methods.description: Adds an amount to a named emotion. This method is available to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount added to the current emotion value.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns the current value of a named emotion.

methods.name: dominant
methods.description: Returns the strongest active emotion name when one is available.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Returns whether a named emotion is currently active.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances emotion decay over elapsed time.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets all emotions toward their default state.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this emotion model handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LEmotionModel` and `Object`.

classes.name: LEventBus
classes.description: Lua-facing publish/subscribe event bus allowing decoupled communication between game systems.

methods.name: on
methods.description: Subscribe a callback to a named event. Higher priority listeners fire first.

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event name to listen for.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The function to invoke when the event fires.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Listener priority (default 0). Higher values execute first.

methods.name: off
methods.description: Unsubscribe a listener by its subscription ID. Removes the callback from the event bus.

methods.name: emit
methods.description: Emit an event, invoking all subscribed listeners in priority order with optional payload arguments.

parameters.description: Additional arguments passed to each listener callback.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all listeners subscribed to a specific event name.

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event name whose listeners will be removed.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all listeners from every event on this bus. Resets the bus to empty.

methods.name: getListenerCount
methods.description: Return the number of active listeners for a given event name.

methods.name: getEvents
methods.description: Return an array of all event names that have at least one listener.

classes.name: LFactory
classes.description: Lua-facing factory pattern for creating typed game objects from registered constructor functions.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Register a constructor function for a given type name. Future `create()` calls with this type will invoke it.

parameters.name: ctor
parameters.description: A constructor function that returns a new instance.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Create a new object by type name, passing additional arguments to the constructor.

parameters.description: Extra arguments forwarded to the constructor.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a constructor is registered for the given type name.

methods.name: alias
methods.description: Create an alias that maps to an existing type name. `create(alias)` will use the canonical constructor.

methods.name: getTypes
methods.description: Return an array of all registered type names.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Unregister a type and discard its constructor function.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all registered types and constructors, resetting the factory.

classes.name: LFunnel
classes.description: Lua-facing batching funnel that collects events over a time window and flushes them together.

methods.name: onFlush
methods.description: Set the callback invoked when the funnel flushes. Receives an array of {tag, value} entries.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a table array of batched entries.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Push a tagged event into the funnel. May trigger an immediate flush if the max entry count is reached.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: A category label for the event.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advance the funnel's time window. Flushes and invokes the callback if the window elapsed.

methods.name: flush
methods.description: Force an immediate flush of all pending entries, invoking the callback.

methods.name: discard
methods.description: Discard all pending entries without flushing or calling the callback.

methods.name: pendingCount
methods.description: Return the number of entries waiting to be flushed.

methods.name: getFlushCount
methods.description: Return the total number of times this funnel has flushed since creation.

methods.description: Creates a new graph containing a subset of nodes.

parameters.name: nodes
parameters.description: Array table of `LGraphNode` handles to include.

methods.name: hasCycle
methods.description: Returns whether this graph contains a cycle.

methods.name: topologicalSort
methods.description: Returns nodes in topological order when the graph is acyclic.

methods.name: mst
methods.description: Computes a minimum spanning tree using Kruskal and returns edge ids.

methods.name: colorGraph
methods.description: Computes graph coloring and returns color indices by node id.

methods.name: isBipartite
methods.description: Returns whether this graph is bipartite.

methods.name: astar
methods.description: Runs A* pathfinding between two nodes.

methods.name: processDemand
methods.description: Processes graph supply and demand once and dispatches generated callbacks.

methods.name: getStats
methods.description: Returns graph counts and aggregate supply-demand statistics.

methods.name: on
methods.description: Registers a callback for a named graph event generated during simulation.

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Event name from the valid graph event list.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Lua callback invoked with event-specific handles and values.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this graph handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this graph handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LGraph`, `Graph`, and `Object`.

methods.name: addNode
methods.description: Add a node to the graph with an optional label and payload value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Optional payload stored with the node.

methods.name: removeNode
methods.description: Remove a node and all its connected edges. Returns true if the node existed.

methods.name: getNodeValue
methods.description: Retrieve the payload value stored on a node. Returns nil if no payload.

methods.name: addEdge
methods.description: Add a directed (or undirected) edge between two nodes with optional weight and label.

methods.name: removeEdge
methods.description: Remove an edge by its ID. Returns true if it existed.

methods.name: neighbors
methods.description: Return an array of node IDs directly connected to the given node.

methods.name: bfs
methods.description: Perform a breadth-first search from a node. Returns visited node IDs in BFS order.

methods.name: dfs
methods.description: Perform a depth-first search from a node. Returns visited node IDs in DFS order.

methods.name: isConnected
methods.description: Check whether there is any path from one node to another.

methods.name: hasNode
methods.description: Check whether a node with the given ID exists in the graph.

methods.name: nodeCount
methods.description: Return the total number of nodes in the graph.

methods.name: edgeCount
methods.description: Return the total number of edges in the graph.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all nodes, edges, and payloads from the graph.

classes.name: LGraphEdge
classes.description: Lua-side edge handle referencing one edge id inside a graph.

methods.name: getType
methods.description: Returns the edge type string used by routing and filters.

methods.description: Sets the edge type string used by routing and filters.

methods.description: Returns the source node for this edge.

methods.description: Sets this edge's maximum concurrent item capacity.

methods.description: Returns this edge's throughput value.

methods.name: setThroughput
methods.description: Sets this edge's throughput value.

methods.name: setTravelTime
methods.description: Sets the travel time for items moving across this edge.

methods.name: getWeight
methods.description: Returns the pathfinding weight for this edge.

methods.name: setWeight
methods.description: Sets the pathfinding weight for this edge.

methods.description: Returns this edge's speed modifier.

methods.name: setSpeedModifier
methods.description: Sets this edge's speed modifier. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.description: Sets this edge's cooldown timer value.

methods.description: Returns whether this edge allows travel in both directions.

methods.description: Sets whether this edge allows travel in both directions.

methods.description: Enables or disables this edge for routing and simulation.

methods.description: Returns graph items currently traveling along this edge.

methods.description: Allows an item type to traverse this edge.

methods.description: Removes an item type from this edge's allow-list.

methods.description: Clears this edge's item type allow-list.

methods.description: Returns whether an item type may traverse this edge.

classes.name: LGraphItem
classes.description: Lua-side item handle referencing one item id inside a graph.

methods.name: getType
methods.description: Returns the item type string used by filters, conversions, supplies, and demands.

methods.description: Sets the total decay lifetime for this item.

methods.description: Returns this item's routing or queue priority.

methods.name: setPriority
methods.description: Sets this item's routing or queue priority.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns where this item is stored: a node, an edge plus progress, or no values when unplaced.

methods.description: Returns whether this graph item handle matches a supported type name.

classes.name: LGuiTable
classes.description: Adds GUI-table-specific methods to a table widget.

methods.name: getColumnCount
methods.description: Returns the number of columns in this table widget.

methods.description: Adds a row to this table widget. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.description: Returns the 1-based index of the currently selected row, or nil.

methods.description: Sets the selected row by its 1-based index, or nil to deselect.

methods.description: Returns whether columns in this table can be sorted by clicking headers.

methods.description: Sets whether columns in this table can be sorted by clicking headers.

methods.description: Registers a callback invoked when a table row is selected.

methods.description: Returns the width and height of this widget.

methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.description: Shows or hides this widget. Hidden widgets are not drawn and do not receive input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently visible.

methods.description: Enables or disables this widget. Disabled widgets appear grayed out and ignore input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently enabled and can receive input.

methods.description: Assigns a string identifier to this widget for lookup with findById.

methods.description: Sets the tooltip text shown when the user hovers over this widget.

methods.description: Returns the tooltip text of this widget.

methods.description: Returns the current interaction state of this widget (e.g. "normal", "hovered", "pressed", "disabled").

parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.

methods.description: Returns the number of direct child widgets attached to this widget.

methods.description: Returns a table of lightweight child widget references, each containing an _idx field.

methods.description: Searches this widget's subtree for a child with the given ID.

methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget is clicked.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget's value changes.

parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.description: Sets the outer margin of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top margin in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getMargin
methods.description: Returns the outer margin of this widget.

methods.description: Sets the z-order (draw priority) of this widget. Higher values draw on top.

methods.name: getZOrder
methods.description: Returns the z-order (draw priority) of this widget.

methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.description: Returns the minimum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setMaxSize
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMaxSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum width and height of this widget.

methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Distance from parent's left edge, or nil.

parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Distance from parent's right edge, or nil.

parameters.description: Distance from parent's bottom edge, or nil.

methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor
methods.description: Removes all anchor constraints from this widget.

methods.name: setFlexGrow
methods.description: Sets the flex-grow factor controlling how much extra space this widget receives in a layout.

methods.name: getFlexGrow
methods.description: Returns the flex-grow factor of this widget.

methods.name: setFlexShrink
methods.description: Sets the flex-shrink factor controlling how much this widget shrinks when layout space is insufficient.

methods.name: getFlexShrink
methods.description: Returns the flex-shrink factor of this widget.

methods.name: bind
methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LInfluenceMap
classes.description: Lua handle for a grid-based influence map with named layers.

methods.name: addLayer
methods.description: Adds an influence layer with the given name if it does not already exist.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Layer name used by later influence operations.

methods.name: hasLayer
methods.description: Returns whether an influence layer exists.

methods.name: setInfluence
methods.description: Sets one cell value in a named influence layer using one-based cell coordinates.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Influence value to store in the cell.

methods.name: getInfluence
methods.description: Returns one cell value from a named influence layer using one-based cell coordinates.

methods.name: stampInfluence
methods.description: Applies a radial influence stamp to a named layer in world coordinates.

parameters.name: wx
parameters.description: World X coordinate of the stamp center.

parameters.name: wy
parameters.description: World Y coordinate of the stamp center.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Influence value applied at the center.

parameters.name: falloff
parameters.description: Falloff exponent or multiplier; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: propagate
methods.description: Propagates influence values across neighboring cells on a named layer.

methods.name: decay
methods.description: Multiplies a named layer by a decay factor.

parameters.name: factor
parameters.description: Decay factor applied to every cell.

methods.name: clearLayer
methods.description: Clears every value in a named influence layer.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Clears every influence value in every layer.

methods.name: getMaxPosition
methods.description: Returns the cell position with the highest value on a named layer.

methods.name: getMinPosition
methods.description: Returns the cell position with the lowest value on a named layer.

methods.name: queryRect
methods.description: Returns influence values inside a world-space rectangle on a named layer.

parameters.name: wx
parameters.description: Rectangle X coordinate in world units.

parameters.name: wy
parameters.description: Rectangle Y coordinate in world units.

methods.name: blend
methods.description: Blends two source layers into a destination layer using independent weights.

parameters.name: weight_a
parameters.description: Weight applied to the first source layer.

parameters.name: weight_b
parameters.description: Weight applied to the second source layer.

parameters.name: dest
parameters.description: Destination layer name that receives the blended values.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the influence map width in cells.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the influence map height in cells.

methods.name: getCellSize
methods.description: Returns the world size represented by each influence map cell.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this influence map handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this influence map handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `InfluenceMap` and `Object`.

classes.name: LList
classes.description: Lua-facing dynamic array list with indexed access, insertion, removal, and search.

methods.description: Insert a value at the beginning of the list.

methods.description: Get the value at a 1-based index. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.description: Replace the value at a 1-based index. Errors if index is 0 or out of range.

methods.description: Insert a value at a 1-based index, shifting subsequent items right.

methods.description: Remove and return the value at a 1-based index. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.description: Remove and return the last value. Returns nil if empty.

methods.description: Remove and return the first value. Returns nil if empty.

methods.description: Find the 1-based index of the first occurrence of a value. Returns nil if not found.

methods.description: Reverse the order of all items in the list in-place.

methods.description: Return the number of items in the list.

methods.description: Check whether the list is empty. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all items from the list. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LMCTSEngine
classes.description: Lua handle for Monte Carlo tree search over Lua-defined game states and actions.

methods.name: search
methods.description: Runs MCTS from a root state using Lua callbacks for actions, transitions, and evaluation.

parameters.name: root_state
parameters.description: Opaque integer state identifier supplied by game code.

parameters.name: get_actions_fn
parameters.description: Function called with a state and returning an array of integer actions.

parameters.name: apply_fn
parameters.description: Function called with `(state, action)` and returning the next state integer.

parameters.name: eval_fn
parameters.description: Function called with a state and returning a numeric score.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this MCTS engine handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this MCTS engine handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LMCTSEngine` and `Object`.

classes.name: LMap
classes.description: Lua-facing string-keyed dictionary (map) with keys(), values(), entries(), and merge operations.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Set a key-value pair in the map. Replaces any existing value for the same key.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieve the value for a key. Returns nil if the key does not exist.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a key exists in the map.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove a key from the map. Returns true if it was present.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the number of key-value pairs.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the map has no entries.

methods.name: keys
methods.description: Return an array of all keys in the map.

methods.name: values
methods.description: Return an array of all values in the map.

methods.name: entries
methods.description: Return an array of {key, value} tables for all entries.

methods.name: merge
methods.description: Copy all entries from another LMap into this map. Existing keys are overwritten.

parameters.name: other
parameters.description: The source map to merge from.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all entries from the map. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LMapBlock
classes.description: Lua-side handle wrapping a `MapBlock` used for procedural map generation. A block is a tile grid with edge-matching sides.

methods.name: setTile
methods.description: Sets a tile GID at a position within the block.

methods.name: getTile
methods.description: Returns the tile GID at a position within the block.

methods.name: setSide
methods.description: Sets the side ID for an edge segment, used for edge matching in map generation.

methods.name: getSide
methods.description: Returns the side ID for an edge segment.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the block width in tiles. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the block height in tiles. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getDimensions
methods.description: Returns both width and height of the block in tiles.

methods.name: getLayerCount
methods.description: Returns the number of tile layers in this block.

methods.name: getSegmentSize
methods.description: Returns the segment size used for edge matching.

methods.name: getWidthInSegments
methods.description: Returns the block width measured in segments.

methods.name: getHeightInSegments
methods.description: Returns the block height measured in segments.

methods.name: setName
methods.description: Sets the block's name for identification during map generation.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the block's name. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setWeight
methods.description: Sets the selection weight for this block during random placement.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Relative weight (higher = more likely to be chosen).

methods.name: getWeight
methods.description: Returns the current selection weight.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.description: Lua-side handle wrapping a `MapGen` procedural map generator that assembles blocks into a tilemap.

methods.description: Runs the map generator, optionally using a specific script, seed, and layer name, returning a new tilemap.

parameters.name: scriptIdx
parameters.description: Script index in the group (1-based), or nil for default.

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed, or nil for random.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LMapGroup
classes.description: Lua-side handle wrapping a `MapGroup` that holds a collection of map blocks and generation scripts.

methods.description: Adds a map block to this group for use in generation.

methods.name: getBlockCount
methods.description: Returns how many blocks are in this group.

methods.name: removeBlock
methods.description: Removes a block from the group by index.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the group name. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: addScript
methods.description: Attaches a map-generation script to this group.

methods.name: getScriptCount
methods.description: Returns how many scripts are attached to this group.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LMapScript
classes.description: Lua-side handle wrapping a `MapScript` that defines a sequence of procedural generation steps.

methods.name: getStepCount
methods.description: Returns the number of generation steps in this script.

methods.name: addStep
methods.description: Appends a generation step. The step table must have a `type` field and optional parameters.

parameters.name: stepDef
parameters.description: Step definition with `type` and parameters like `x`, `y`, `w`, `h`, `gid`, `chance`, etc.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LMediator
classes.description: Lua-facing mediator for channel-based message passing between decoupled game systems.

methods.name: on
methods.description: Register a handler callback on a named channel. Returns an ID for unregistration.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The handler to invoke when a message is sent to this channel.

methods.name: off
methods.description: Unregister a handler from a channel by its ID.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Send a message to all handlers on a specific channel with optional payload arguments.

parameters.description: Additional arguments passed to each handler.

methods.name: broadcast
methods.description: Send a message to all handlers on all channels. Every registered handler receives the payload.

methods.name: handlerCount
methods.description: Return the number of handlers registered on a specific channel.

methods.name: channels
methods.description: Return an array of all channel names that have at least one handler.

methods.name: removeChannel
methods.description: Remove an entire channel and all its handlers.

parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.

methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: _self

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LMesh
classes.description: Custom vertex mesh for advanced 2D geometry rendering with per-vertex color and UV data.

methods.name: getVertexCount
methods.description: Returns the number of vertices in this mesh.

methods.name: getVertex
methods.description: Returns the data for a single vertex by 1-based index.
methods.returns: number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number
methods.returnType: number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number

methods.name: setVertex
methods.description: Updates a single vertex by 1-based index. Table format: {x, y, u, v, r, g, b, a}.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Vertex data: {x, y, u, v, r, g, b, a}.

methods.name: setTexture
methods.description: Assigns or removes a texture for this mesh. Pass nil to clear the texture.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Image to use as the mesh texture, or nil to remove.

methods.name: release
methods.description: Releases the mesh resource. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LMidiPlayer
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper around a MIDI file player with per-channel control and tempo scaling.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads a MIDI file from the given path relative to the game directory.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Loads MIDI data from a raw byte string in memory.

methods.name: isLoaded
methods.description: Returns whether a MIDI file is currently loaded and ready to play.

methods.name: getFilePath
methods.description: Returns the file path of the currently loaded MIDI file.

methods.name: setSoundFont
methods.description: Sets a custom SoundFont file for MIDI synthesis (stub, not yet implemented).

methods.name: getSoundFontPath
methods.description: Returns the path of the currently set SoundFont (stub, not yet implemented).

methods.name: useDefaultSoundFont
methods.description: Reverts to the built-in default SoundFont (stub, not yet implemented).

methods.name: play
methods.description: Starts MIDI playback from the current position using the audio output stream.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses MIDI playback at the current position.

methods.name: stop
methods.description: Stops MIDI playback and resets position to the beginning.

methods.name: isPlaying
methods.description: Returns whether the MIDI player is currently playing.

methods.name: isPaused
methods.description: Returns whether the MIDI player is currently paused.

methods.name: seek
methods.description: Seeks to a specific position in the MIDI file.

methods.name: tell
methods.description: Returns the current playback position of the MIDI player in seconds.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns the total duration of the loaded MIDI file in seconds.

methods.name: setLooping
methods.description: Enables or disables looping for MIDI playback.

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: True to loop, false to play once.

methods.name: isLooping
methods.description: Returns whether MIDI looping is enabled.

methods.name: setVolume
methods.description: Sets the master volume for MIDI playback.

methods.name: getVolume
methods.description: Returns the current master volume of the MIDI player.

methods.name: setBus
methods.description: Routes this MIDI player's output through the specified audio bus.

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Bus to route through, or nil for direct output.

methods.name: getBus
methods.description: Returns the audio bus this MIDI player is routed through.

methods.name: setTempo
methods.description: Sets the playback tempo in beats per minute.

methods.name: getTempo
methods.description: Returns the current effective tempo in beats per minute.

methods.name: getOriginalTempo
methods.description: Returns the original tempo of the MIDI file as authored.

methods.name: setTempoScale
methods.description: Sets a tempo multiplier relative to the original speed.

methods.name: getTempoScale
methods.description: Returns the current tempo scale multiplier.

methods.name: getTicksPerBeat
methods.description: Returns the MIDI file's resolution in ticks per beat (PPQN).

methods.name: setChannelVolume
methods.description: Sets the volume for a specific MIDI channel (1-16).

methods.name: getChannelVolume
methods.description: Returns the volume of a specific MIDI channel.

methods.name: setChannelMuted
methods.description: Mutes or unmutes a specific MIDI channel.

parameters.name: muted
parameters.description: True to mute, false to unmute.

methods.name: isChannelMuted
methods.description: Returns whether a specific MIDI channel is muted.

methods.name: setChannelInstrument
methods.description: Sets the General MIDI instrument program for a channel.

methods.name: getChannelInstrument
methods.description: Returns the current GM instrument program for a channel.

methods.name: getChannelCount
methods.description: Returns the number of active MIDI channels in the loaded file.

methods.name: soloChannel
methods.description: Solos a specific MIDI channel, muting all others.

methods.name: unsoloAll
methods.description: Removes solo from all channels, restoring normal playback.

methods.name: getTrackCount
methods.description: Returns the number of tracks in the loaded MIDI file.

methods.name: getTrackName
methods.description: Returns the name of a MIDI track by 1-based index.

methods.name: setTrackMuted
methods.description: Mutes or unmutes a specific MIDI track.

parameters.name: muted
parameters.description: True to mute, false to unmute.

methods.name: isTrackMuted
methods.description: Returns whether a specific MIDI track is muted.

methods.name: getNoteCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of note events in the loaded MIDI file.

methods.name: setOnNoteOn
methods.description: Registers a callback for MIDI note-on events (stub, not yet implemented).

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Callback function or nil to clear.

methods.name: setOnNoteOff
methods.description: Registers a callback for MIDI note-off events (stub, not yet implemented).

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Callback function or nil to clear.

methods.name: setOnEnd
methods.description: Registers a callback invoked when MIDI playback finishes (stub, not yet implemented).

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Callback function or nil to clear.

methods.name: getSampleRate
methods.description: Returns the output sample rate used for MIDI synthesis.

methods.name: setSampleRate
methods.description: Sets the output sample rate for MIDI synthesis.

methods.name: getChannels
methods.description: Returns the number of output audio channels for MIDI synthesis.

methods.name: setChannels
methods.description: Sets the number of output audio channels for MIDI synthesis.

methods.description: Returns the type name of this object for runtime type-checking.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LObjectPool
classes.description: Lua-facing object pool for reusing pre-allocated game objects (bullets, particles, enemies) to avoid per-frame allocations.

methods.description: Add an object to the pool's idle set, making it available for future acquisition.

parameters.description: The object to store in the pool.

methods.description: Take an idle object from the pool and mark it active. Returns nil if the pool is empty.

methods.description: Return an active object back to the pool's idle set so it can be reused.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The object to release back into the pool.

methods.name: getActiveCount
methods.description: Return the number of objects currently checked out from the pool.

methods.name: getAvailableCount
methods.description: Return the number of idle objects ready for acquisition.

methods.name: getTotalCount
methods.description: Return the total number of objects managed by this pool (active + idle).

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Destroy all objects (active and idle) and reset the pool to empty.

methods.description: Set a value by key and notify all subscribers watching that key.

methods.description: Retrieve the current value for a key. Returns nil if not set.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The property name to look up.

methods.name: subscribe
methods.description: Subscribe to changes on a specific key. The callback receives (key, newValue) on each change.

parameters.description: Called with (key, newValue) when the property changes.

parameters.name: once
parameters.description: If true, automatically unsubscribe after the first notification.

methods.name: unsubscribe
methods.description: Remove a subscription by its ID. The callback will no longer fire.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Return the total number of active subscriptions across all keys.

parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to remove.

methods.description: Returns the number of direct child widgets attached to this widget.

methods.description: Returns a table of lightweight child widget references, each containing an _idx field.

methods.description: Searches this widget's subtree for a child with the given ID.

parameters.description: The widget ID to search for.

methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget is clicked.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnChange
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget's value changes.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnDraw
methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: _self
parameters.description: The widget (ignored, kept for method-call syntax).

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.description: Sets the outer margin of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top margin in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getMargin
methods.description: Returns the outer margin of this widget.

methods.name: getZOrder
methods.description: Returns the z-order (draw priority) of this widget.

methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMinSize
methods.description: Returns the minimum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setMaxSize
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMaxSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum width and height of this widget.

methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Distance from parent's left edge, or nil.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Distance from parent's right edge, or nil.

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.description: Distance from parent's bottom edge, or nil.

methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor
methods.description: Removes all anchor constraints from this widget.

methods.name: setFlexGrow
methods.description: Sets the flex-grow factor controlling how much extra space this widget receives in a layout.

methods.name: getFlexGrow
methods.description: Returns the flex-grow factor of this widget.

methods.name: setFlexShrink
methods.description: Sets the flex-shrink factor controlling how much this widget shrinks when layout space is insufficient.

methods.name: getFlexShrink
methods.description: Returns the flex-shrink factor of this widget.

methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LPipeline
classes.description: A full pipeline that orchestrates multiple steps with dependency resolution, error modes, and async scheduling.

methods.name: addStep
methods.description: Adds an existing step object to this pipeline. The step will be scheduled according to its declared dependencies.

methods.name: removeStep
methods.description: Removes a step from the pipeline by name. Any other steps that depend on it may fail or be skipped.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the step to remove.

methods.name: getStep
methods.description: Retrieves a step object by name, or nil if no step with that name exists in this pipeline.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the step to find.

methods.name: getSteps
methods.description: Returns a table containing all step objects currently in this pipeline.

methods.name: getStepCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of steps in this pipeline.

methods.name: getStepsByTag
methods.description: Returns all steps that have the specified tag assigned.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all steps from the pipeline, resetting it to an empty state.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates the pipeline structure, checking for missing dependencies and circular references.

methods.name: getExecutionOrder
methods.description: Computes the topologically sorted execution order of all steps, respecting dependencies.

methods.name: getParallelGroups
methods.description: Groups steps into parallel execution tiers. Steps within the same group have no mutual dependencies and can run concurrently.

methods.name: run
methods.description: Executes all pipeline steps synchronously in dependency order. Blocks until all steps complete, fail, or are cancelled.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: An optional shared context table passed to every step callback. A fresh table is created if omitted.

methods.name: runAsync
methods.description: Starts asynchronous (coroutine-based) execution of the pipeline. Call update(dt) each frame to advance steps.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: An optional shared context table. A fresh table is created if omitted.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances an async pipeline by one frame tick. Resumes coroutines, checks dependencies, and fires callbacks. Call every frame after runAsync().

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since last frame.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels all pending and waiting steps. Steps already running or completed are unaffected.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the pipeline and all steps back to their initial pending state, clearing context and async state.

methods.name: isRunning
methods.description: Returns whether the pipeline is currently in async execution mode (started via runAsync and not yet finished).

methods.name: isComplete
methods.description: Returns whether all steps have reached a terminal state (completed, failed, skipped, or cancelled).

methods.name: setErrorMode
methods.description: Sets how the pipeline handles step failures. "abort" stops on first failure; "continue" runs remaining steps.

methods.name: getErrorMode
methods.description: Returns the current error mode of the pipeline as a string.

methods.name: getResult
methods.description: Returns the current pipeline result summary table, or nil if no steps exist. Useful for inspecting state after run or during async execution.

methods.name: getContext
methods.description: Returns the shared context table used by the current or most recent pipeline execution, or nil if none exists.

methods.name: setOnComplete
methods.description: Registers a callback invoked when the entire pipeline finishes execution. Receives the result table.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving the result table. Pass nil to remove.

methods.name: setOnStepComplete
methods.description: Registers a callback invoked each time any step completes successfully. Receives (stepName, context).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving (stepName, context). Pass nil to remove.

methods.name: setOnStepError
methods.description: Registers a callback invoked each time any step fails. Receives (stepName, errorMessage).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving (stepName, errorMessage). Pass nil to remove.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the name of this pipeline. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setName
methods.description: Changes the name of this pipeline. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Serializes the pipeline configuration into a plain Lua table for inspection or persistence.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LPipeline").

methods.name: addConditional
methods.description: Convenience method to create and add a step with dependencies and a condition in one call.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: Predicate function; step runs only if it returns true.

methods.name: addBranch
methods.description: Adds a branching construct: evaluates a predicate, then runs either the "then" or "else" callback based on the result.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Base name for the branch (generates internal guard/then/else sub-steps).

parameters.name: deps
parameters.description: Array of dependency step names that must complete before the branch evaluates.

parameters.name: when
parameters.description: Predicate function receiving context; returns true for the "then" path.

parameters.name: thenFn
parameters.description: Callback executed if the predicate returns true.

parameters.name: elseFn
parameters.description: Callback executed if the predicate returns false. Defaults to a no-op.

methods.name: onProgress
methods.description: Registers a progress callback invoked after each step finishes (regardless of outcome). Receives (stepName, statusString).

methods.name: onEvent
methods.description: Registers a low-level event callback for all pipeline lifecycle events. Receives (eventName, stepName, status, detail).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving (eventName, stepName, status, detail).

methods.name: toAscii
methods.description: Returns an ASCII art diagram of the pipeline's dependency graph for debugging and visualization.

methods.name: addSubPipeline
methods.description: Embeds another pipeline's steps into this pipeline under an alias prefix, with optional outer dependencies.

parameters.name: subPipeline
parameters.description: The pipeline whose steps will be merged in.

parameters.name: alias
parameters.description: A prefix applied to all merged step names to avoid collisions.

parameters.name: deps
parameters.description: Optional array of step names that all merged steps depend on.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object is of a given type name. Accepts "LPipeline", "Pipeline", or "Object".

classes.name: LPipelineStep
classes.description: A single executable step within a pipeline, wrapping callback, condition, retry, and error hooks.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the unique name of this pipeline step.

methods.name: setCallback
methods.description: Sets the main execution function for this step. Called when the step runs.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving the pipeline context table and optionally returning a result value.

methods.name: setCondition
methods.description: Sets a predicate function that determines whether this step should execute. If the predicate returns false, the step is skipped.

parameters.name: condition
parameters.description: A function receiving the context table and returning a boolean. Pass nil to remove the condition.

methods.name: setDelay
methods.description: Sets a delay in seconds before this step begins execution after its dependencies are satisfied.

methods.name: getDelay
methods.description: Returns the configured delay for this step.

methods.name: setTimeout
methods.description: Sets a maximum execution time for this step. If exceeded in async mode, the step may be considered failed.

methods.name: getTimeout
methods.description: Returns the configured timeout for this step, or 0 if none is set.

methods.name: setRetryCount
methods.description: Sets how many times this step should be retried after a failure before being marked as failed.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of retry attempts (0 means no retries).

methods.name: getRetryCount
methods.description: Returns the configured retry count for this step.

methods.name: setRetryDelay
methods.description: Sets the delay in seconds between retry attempts for this step.

methods.name: setAsync
methods.description: Marks this step as asynchronous. Async steps run as coroutines and can yield between frames.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to enable coroutine-based async execution.

methods.name: isAsync
methods.description: Returns whether this step is configured for asynchronous coroutine execution.

methods.name: setOptional
methods.description: Marks this step as optional. Optional steps do not cause pipeline failure if they fail.

parameters.name: optional
parameters.description: True to mark the step as optional.

methods.name: isOptional
methods.description: Returns whether this step is marked as optional.

methods.name: setOnError
methods.description: Sets an error handler callback invoked when this step fails after all retries are exhausted.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: A function receiving (stepName, errorMessage). Pass nil to remove.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Stores a key-value metadata pair on this step. Useful for passing configuration between steps.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Retrieves a metadata value previously stored with setData.

methods.name: setTag
methods.description: Assigns a tag string to this step for grouping and filtering purposes.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: A category tag for this step.

methods.name: getTag
methods.description: Returns the tag assigned to this step, or nil if none is set.

methods.name: dependsOn
methods.description: Declares that this step depends on another step (by name or reference). The dependency must complete before this step runs.

parameters.name: dep
parameters.description: The dependency step name or step object.

methods.name: getDependencies
methods.description: Returns a list of step names that this step depends on.

methods.name: getDependencyCount
methods.description: Returns the number of dependencies this step has.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the current execution status of this step as a string ("pending", "waiting", "running", "completed", "failed", "skipped", "cancelled").

methods.name: getError
methods.description: Returns the error message if this step failed, or nil if it has not failed.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns how long this step took to execute in seconds (measured from start to completion or failure).

methods.name: getAttempt
methods.description: Returns the current attempt number (1-based). Increases with each retry.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LPipelineStep").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object is of a given type name. Accepts "LPipelineStep", "PipelineStep", or "Object".

classes.name: LPointLight
classes.description: Lua-visible point light that illuminates nearby raycaster tiles and sprites with colored light and falloff.

methods.name: x
methods.description: Returns the X world position of this light.

methods.name: y
methods.description: Returns the Y world position of this light.

methods.name: radius
methods.description: Returns the light's falloff radius in world units.

methods.name: intensity
methods.description: Returns the brightness multiplier of this light.

methods.name: color
methods.description: Returns the RGB color components of this light.

methods.name: set
methods.signature: (x, y, r, g, b, radius, intensity)
methods.description: Overwrites all properties of this point light in a single call.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LPointLight").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

methods.name: getTypeName
methods.description: Returns the built-in or custom effect type name.

methods.name: isBuiltIn
methods.description: Returns whether this effect uses one of the engine built-in effect types.

methods.name: isEnabled

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this effect. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setParameter

methods.name: getParameter

parameters.name: default

methods.name: hasParameter

methods.name: getParameterNames

methods.name: getEffectType

methods.name: getType

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this post-processing effect handle.

methods.name: typeOf

parameters.name: name

parameters.name: v

methods.name: setIntensity

methods.name: setRadius
methods.description: Sets the `radius` shader parameter.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Radius value passed to the effect shader.

methods.name: setStrength

parameters.name: v

methods.name: setScanlineStrength

methods.name: setOffset

parameters.name: v

methods.name: setBrightness
methods.description: Sets the `brightness` shader parameter.

parameters.name: v

methods.name: setContrast
methods.description: Sets the `contrast` shader parameter.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Contrast value passed to the effect shader.

methods.name: setSaturation

parameters.name: v

methods.name: enableAutoUniforms

methods.name: disableAutoUniforms
methods.description: Disables automatic time and resolution uniforms for this effect.

methods.name: isAutoUniforms

classes.name: LPostFxStack
classes.description: Lua-side handle for an ordered post-processing stack.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Appends an effect to the end of this stack.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first matching effect handle from this stack.

methods.name: insert
methods.description: Inserts an effect at a one-based stack position.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: One-based insertion position, clamped to the stack length.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables the effect pass at a one-based stack position.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: New enabled flag for the pass.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether the effect pass at a one-based position is enabled.

methods.name: getEffectCount
methods.description: Returns the number of effect handles in this stack.

methods.name: getEffect
methods.description: Returns the effect handle at a one-based position.

methods.name: getEnabledEffects
methods.description: Returns effect handles whose stack passes are enabled.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the stack render width. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the stack render height. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getDimensions
methods.description: Returns the stack render dimensions.

methods.name: resize
methods.description: Resizes the post-processing stack render target dimensions.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the number of effect handles in this stack.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Returns whether this stack has no effects.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all effects and pass state from this stack.

methods.name: dedup
methods.description: Removes duplicate effect handles while preserving first occurrences.

methods.name: isCapturing
methods.description: Returns whether this stack is currently capturing draw commands.

methods.name: beginCapture
methods.description: Starts post-effect capture and queues a renderer begin-capture command.

methods.name: endCapture
methods.description: Ends post-effect capture and queues a renderer end-capture command.

methods.name: apply
methods.description: Queues this stack's enabled post-effect passes for renderer application.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this post-processing stack handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this stack handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `PostFxStack` and `Object`.

methods.name: setFeedback
methods.description: Sets the stack feedback blend factor and clamps it to 0.0 through 1.0.

methods.name: getFeedback
methods.description: Returns the current stack feedback blend factor.

methods.name: clearFeedback
methods.description: Resets the stack feedback blend factor to zero.

classes.name: LPriorityQueue
classes.description: Lua-facing priority queue that orders elements by numeric priority (highest first).

methods.name: push
methods.description: Add an item with a numeric priority. Higher priority items are dequeued first.

methods.name: pop
methods.description: Remove and return the highest-priority item. Returns nil if the queue is empty.

methods.name: peek
methods.description: Return the highest-priority item without removing it. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the number of items currently in the queue.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the queue contains no items.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all items from the queue. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LProgressBar
classes.description: Adds progress-bar-specific methods to a progress bar widget table.

methods.name: setValue
methods.description: Sets the current fill value of this progress bar, clamped to its range.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns the current value of this progress bar.

methods.name: getProgress
methods.description: Returns the normalized progress as a fraction (0.0 to 1.0) of the current range.

methods.name: setRange
methods.description: Sets the minimum and maximum bounds for this progress bar.

methods.name: getMin
methods.description: Returns the minimum value of this progress bar's range.

methods.name: getMax
methods.description: Returns the maximum value of this progress bar's range.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string of this widget (e.g. "LButton", "LSlider").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this widget matches the given type name, including base types "LWidget" and "Object".

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to check against.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: setSize
methods.description: Sets the width and height of this widget in pixels.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the width and height of this widget.

methods.name: getRect
methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Shows or hides this widget. Hidden widgets are not drawn and do not receive input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently visible.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this widget. Disabled widgets appear grayed out and ignore input.

parameters.name: v
