classes.name: LPromise
classes.description: Lua-visible handle representing an asynchronous computation that will produce a single result value.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to test against (`"Promise"` or `"Object"`).

methods.name: isDone
methods.description: Checks whether the asynchronous computation has completed.

methods.name: result
methods.description: Returns the result value of the completed promise.

methods.name: getError
methods.description: Returns the error message from the promise, if it terminated with an error.

methods.name: chain
methods.description: Creates a new promise that runs the given code with the parent promise's result as its first argument.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Lua source code to execute in the chained worker thread.
Additional arguments forwarded after the parent result.

classes.name: LProvinceGrid
classes.description: Lua-side handle for a province id grid decoded from an image.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the province grid width. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the province grid height. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getAt
methods.description: Returns the province id stored at grid coordinates.

methods.name: provinceCount
methods.description: Returns the number of distinct provinces in the grid.

methods.name: adjacencies
methods.description: Returns province adjacency records and shared border pixel counts.

methods.name: provinceSpans
methods.description: Returns horizontal province spans by row.

methods.name: borderSegments
methods.description: Returns border line segments between neighboring provinces.

methods.name: getPolygons
methods.description: Returns polygon rings for every province.

methods.name: getPolygonsSimplified
methods.description: Returns simplified polygon rings for every province.

methods.name: drawShapes
methods.description: Queues filled polygon draw commands for province shapes, optionally culled to a viewport.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this province grid handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this province grid handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LProvinceGrid` and `Object`.

methods.name: serializeShapeData
methods.description: Serializes province span and border shape data into a binary Lua string.

methods.name: deserializeShapeData
methods.description: Decodes serialized province shape data into span and segment tables.

classes.name: LProvinceRegistry
classes.description: Handle to a named province registry, exposing spatial queries, style mutations, rendering, and change tracking to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the string name used to identify this registry in the province system.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns the width of the province grid in cells (pixels of the source PNG).

methods.name: getHeight
methods.description: Returns the height of the province grid in cells (pixels of the source PNG).

methods.name: getAt
methods.description: Returns the province ID at the given grid cell coordinates. Returns 0 if the cell is unowned (sea, wasteland, etc.).

methods.name: fitCamera
methods.description: Computes camera position and zoom so the entire province map fits within the given screen dimensions.

parameters.name: pixel_size
parameters.description: Size of one map cell in screen pixels (default 1.0).

methods.name: screenToMap
methods.description: Converts screen-space pixel coordinates to map-space floating-point coordinates using the current camera transform.

parameters.name: cam_x
parameters.description: Camera center x in map space.

parameters.name: cam_y
parameters.description: Camera center y in map space.

methods.name: screenToProvince
methods.description: Converts screen-space coordinates directly to a province ID. Returns nil if the cursor is outside the map or over an unowned cell.

parameters.name: cam_x
parameters.description: Camera center x in map space.

parameters.name: cam_y
parameters.description: Camera center y in map space.

methods.name: provinceCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of distinct provinces in this registry (excluding ID 0).

methods.name: provinceIds
methods.description: Returns a sequential table of all province IDs in this registry.

methods.name: adjacencies
methods.description: Returns all adjacency pairs in the registry. Each entry has `province_a` and `province_b` fields representing two neighboring provinces.

methods.name: provinceSpans
methods.description: Returns the raw span data for all provinces. Each span is a horizontal run of cells belonging to one province, useful for custom rendering or spatial analysis.

methods.name: borderSegments
methods.description: Returns all border line segments between adjacent provinces. Each segment is a line from (x0,y0) to (x1,y1) separating province_a from province_b.

methods.name: getRevision
methods.description: Returns the current change revision counter. Incremented on every mutation (color, terrain, border, fog changes). Use with `getChangesSince` for incremental updates.

methods.name: getProvince
methods.description: Returns a snapshot table describing a single province: its ID, revision, style (political_color, terrain_type, border_style, fog_state, visibility_state), centroid, and custom attributes.

methods.name: getNeighbors
methods.description: Returns a table of province IDs that share a border with the given province.

methods.name: getBorderClass
methods.description: Returns the border classification string between two adjacent provinces (e.g. "river", "mountain", "sea"), or nil if no class is set.

methods.name: setBorderClass
methods.description: Sets the border classification between two adjacent provinces. Used to control border rendering style (e.g. rivers drawn as blue lines).

methods.name: setPoliticalColor
methods.description: Sets the political map color for a province. Used in political map mode rendering and change tracking.

methods.name: setTerrainType
methods.description: Sets the terrain type index for a province. Terrain type controls which fill color or texture is used in terrain map mode.

methods.name: setBorderStyle
methods.description: Sets the border rendering style index for a province. Controls line thickness, color, or pattern when borders are drawn.

methods.name: setFogState
methods.description: Sets the fog-of-war state for a province. Typically 0 = revealed, 1 = fogged, 2 = hidden. Controls rendering opacity or overlay.

methods.name: setVisibilityState
methods.description: Sets the visibility state for a province. Used for strategic visibility layers separate from fog (e.g. scouted vs. unscouted).

methods.name: setAttr
methods.description: Sets a custom string attribute on a province. Attributes are returned in the `attrs` table of `getProvince` and can store arbitrary game metadata.

methods.name: setCapital
methods.description: Sets the capital marker position for a province. The capital is drawn as a small icon during `render` when `draw_capitals` is enabled.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Capital x position in map space.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Capital y position in map space.

methods.name: setLabelLine
methods.description: Sets the label baseline for a province. The label text is rendered along the line from (ax,ay) to (bx,by), allowing curved or angled province names.

parameters.name: ax
parameters.description: Start x of the label line in map space.

parameters.name: ay
parameters.description: Start y of the label line in map space.

parameters.name: bx
parameters.description: End x of the label line in map space.

parameters.name: by
parameters.description: End y of the label line in map space.

methods.name: setLabelText
methods.description: Sets the display name text for a province. Rendered on the map when `draw_labels` is enabled in `render` options.

methods.name: importMetadataFromFiles
methods.description: Bulk-imports province metadata (colors, capitals, labels, terrain) from external files (PNG color map, CSV color table, TOML province definitions, marker PNG). Returns a summary of how many provinces were mapped.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Options table with fields: color_map_png (string, required), color_csv (string, required), marker_png (string?), province_toml (string?), water_terrain_tokens (table?), water_terrain_type (number?), land_terrain_type (number?), set_political_colors (boolean?), set_label_text (boolean?), set_capitals (boolean?), set_label_lines (boolean?), marker_options (table?).

methods.name: render
methods.description: Renders the province map to the screen using the current camera and style settings. Generates draw commands for fills, borders, labels, and capitals based on the provided options.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Render options: map_mode (string?), x/y/zoom/pixel_size/screen_w/screen_h (number?), draw_fills/draw_borders/draw_labels/draw_capitals (boolean?), border_width (number?), hovered_id/selected_id (number?).

methods.name: getChangesSince
methods.description: Returns all province changes that occurred after the given revision. Each entry contains the revision number and a change record describing what was modified (political_color, terrain_type, border_style, fog_state, visibility_state, or border_class).

parameters.name: revision
parameters.description: The revision to query from (exclusive). Pass the last known revision to get only new changes.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string for this userdata object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name. Returns true for "LProvinceRegistry" and "Object".

classes.name: LQLearner
classes.description: Lua handle for a Q-learning table with configurable exploration and learning parameters.

methods.name: chooseAction
methods.description: Chooses an action for a one-based state index using the learner's exploration policy.

methods.name: bestAction
methods.description: Returns the highest-valued action for a one-based state index without exploration.

methods.name: learn
methods.description: Applies one Q-learning update from a transition and reward.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: One-based action index taken in the previous state.

methods.name: getQValue
methods.description: Returns the stored Q-value for a one-based state and action pair.

methods.name: setQValue
methods.description: Sets the stored Q-value for a one-based state and action pair.

methods.name: endEpisode
methods.description: Ends the current learning episode and applies episode bookkeeping.

methods.name: getEpisodeCount
methods.description: Returns how many learning episodes have been completed.

methods.name: getStateCount
methods.description: Returns the number of states represented by this learner.

methods.name: getActionCount
methods.description: Returns the number of actions represented by this learner.

methods.name: setLearningRate
methods.description: Sets the Q-learning alpha learning rate.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Learning rate used by future updates.

methods.name: getLearningRate
methods.description: Returns the Q-learning alpha learning rate.

methods.name: setDiscountFactor
methods.description: Sets the Q-learning gamma discount factor.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: Discount factor used by future updates.

methods.name: getDiscountFactor
methods.description: Returns the Q-learning gamma discount factor.

methods.name: setExplorationRate
methods.description: Sets the exploration rate used by action selection.

methods.name: getExplorationRate
methods.description: Returns the exploration rate used by action selection.

methods.name: setExplorationDecay
methods.description: Sets the exploration decay multiplier applied across episodes.

methods.name: getExplorationDecay
methods.description: Returns the exploration decay multiplier.

methods.name: serialize
methods.description: Serializes the Q-learner state to a JSON string.

methods.name: deserialize
methods.description: Replaces the Q-learner state from a JSON string.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this Q-learner handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this Q-learner handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `QLearner` and `Object`.

classes.name: LQuad
classes.description: Rectangular sub-region of a texture, used for sprite sheets and atlas-based rendering.

methods.name: getViewport
methods.description: Returns the quad's viewport rectangle within the source texture.

methods.name: setViewport
methods.description: Updates the quad's viewport rectangle.

methods.name: getTextureDimensions
methods.description: Returns the full dimensions of the source texture this quad references.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LQualityReport
classes.description: Provides Lua accessors for documentation quality scoring results.

methods.name: getOverallScore
methods.description: Returns the aggregate documentation quality score.

methods.name: getGrade
methods.description: Returns the letter grade derived from the aggregate documentation score.

methods.name: getModuleScores
methods.description: Returns per-module documentation quality scores.

methods.name: getWorst
methods.description: Returns the lowest-scoring documentation entries.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Optional maximum number of entries to return; defaults to 10.

methods.name: getBest
methods.description: Returns the highest-scoring documentation entries.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Optional maximum number of entries to return; defaults to 10.

methods.name: getByGrade
methods.description: Returns documentation entries whose calculated grade matches a grade string.

parameters.name: grade
parameters.description: Grade string produced by the docs quality backend.

methods.name: getSummary
methods.description: Returns a human-readable summary of overall and per-module quality scores.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Converts this quality report into a plain Lua table.

methods.name: toJSON
methods.description: Serializes this quality report to formatted JSON.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this quality report handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this quality report handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LQualityReport` and `Object`.

classes.name: LQueue
classes.description: Lua-facing FIFO queue with optional capacity limit. Supports enqueue/dequeue from both ends.

methods.name: enqueue
methods.description: Add a value to the back of the queue. Returns false if at capacity.

methods.name: enqueueFront
methods.description: Add a value to the front of the queue (priority insertion). Returns false if at capacity.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to insert at the front.

methods.name: dequeue
methods.description: Remove and return the front value. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: dequeueBack
methods.description: Remove and return the back value. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: front
methods.description: Return the front value without removing it. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: back
methods.description: Return the back value without removing it. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: peekAt
methods.description: Return the value at a 1-based index without removing it. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.name: insertAt
methods.description: Insert a value at a 1-based index in the queue. Returns false if at capacity.

methods.name: removeAt
methods.description: Remove and return the value at a 1-based index. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the current number of items in the queue.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the queue is empty. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: isFull
methods.description: Check whether the queue has reached its capacity limit.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all items from the queue. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: toArray
methods.description: Return all queue items as an array table (front to back).

parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LRandomGenerator
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for a deterministic random generator.

methods.name: random
methods.description: Returns a random floating-point value from the generator.

methods.name: randomFloat
methods.description: Returns a random floating-point value in a range.

methods.name: randomInt
methods.description: Returns a random integer in a range.

methods.name: randomNormal
methods.description: Returns a normally distributed random value.

methods.name: getSeed
methods.description: Returns this generator seed. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setSeed
methods.description: Resets this generator to a seed value.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns this generator serialized state string.

methods.name: setState
methods.description: Restores this generator from a serialized state string.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this random generator handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this random generator handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LRandomGenerator` and `Object`.

classes.name: LRaycaster
classes.description: Lua-visible raycaster map that holds cell data, per-cell textures, and provides raycasting,.

methods.name: setCell
methods.description: Sets the wall type value at a grid cell. Non-zero values are solid walls.

parameters.name: val
parameters.description: Wall type (0 = empty, 1+ = wall texture index).

methods.name: getCell
methods.description: Returns the wall type value at a grid cell.

methods.name: setCells
methods.description: Replaces the entire map grid with a flat array of cell values (row-major order).

parameters.name: cells
parameters.description: Flat array of numbers with width*height elements.

methods.name: isBlocked
methods.description: Returns true if the grid cell is a solid wall (non-zero value).

methods.name: width
methods.description: Returns the map width in grid cells.

methods.name: height
methods.description: Returns the map height in grid cells.

methods.name: setFloorTextureCell
methods.description: Assigns a per-cell floor texture override. Pass nil to remove the override.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: Texture image, integer id, or nil to clear.

methods.name: getFloorTextureCell
methods.description: Returns the raw texture id assigned to this floor cell, or nil if none.

methods.name: setCeilingTextureCell
methods.description: Assigns a per-cell ceiling texture override. Pass nil to remove the override.

parameters.name: texture
parameters.description: Texture image, integer id, or nil to clear.

methods.name: getCeilingTextureCell
methods.description: Returns the raw texture id assigned to this ceiling cell, or nil if none.

methods.name: setLoweredFloorCell
methods.description: Marks a cell as a lowered floor (pit) with its own texture, depth, tint, and blocking flag.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Options table {texture, depth?, r?, g?, b?, blocked?} or nil to clear.

methods.name: getLoweredFloorCell
methods.description: Returns the lowered floor configuration at a cell, or nil if the cell is normal.

methods.name: isWalkBlocked
methods.description: Returns true if the cell blocks walking (solid wall OR blocked lowered-floor cell).

methods.name: tryMove
methods.description: Attempts to move from (px,py) by (dx,dy) with wall-slide collision. Returns the final position.

parameters.name: px
parameters.description: Current X position in world space.

parameters.name: py
parameters.description: Current Y position in world space.

methods.name: gridMove
methods.description: Performs a discrete grid-step movement in one of 4 cardinal directions with collision.

methods.name: castRay
methods.description: Casts a single ray from (ox,oy) at the given angle and returns hit info or nil.

methods.name: castRays
methods.description: Casts multiple rays across a field of view and returns an array of hit tables.

methods.name: castRaysFlat
methods.description: Casts multiple rays and returns only the corrected distances as a flat array.

methods.name: lineOfSight
methods.description: Tests whether there is a clear line of sight between two world points (no walls in between).

methods.name: revealCellsFromRays
methods.signature: LRaycaster:revealCellsFromRays(ox, oy, angle, fov, count, maxDist, [step])
methods.description: Casts rays across the FOV and returns a list of grid cells that are visible (for fog-of-war).

methods.name: computeTileLight
methods.description: Computes the combined lighting color at a tile from ambient and point lights, accounting for walls.

parameters.name: lights
parameters.description: Array of point-light tables {x, y, radius, r?, g?, b?, intensity?}.

methods.name: buildMinimapWindow
methods.description: Generates a grid of minimap tile samples around a center point with lighting info.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Tile radius around the center to sample.

methods.name: setWallAlpha
methods.description: Sets the transparency for a specific wall tile type, enabling see-through walls.

parameters.name: tileType
parameters.description: The cell value (1..255) whose alpha to change.

methods.name: getWallAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current transparency value for a wall tile type.

methods.name: castRayMulti
methods.description: Casts a single ray that passes through transparent walls, returning multiple hits.

parameters.name: maxHits
parameters.description: Maximum number of hits to collect (default 4, max 8).

methods.name: castFloorRow
methods.signature: LRaycaster:castFloorRow(camX, camY, dirX, dirY, planeX, planeY, row)
methods.description: Computes floor/ceiling texture UV coordinates for a single scanline row.

parameters.name: row
parameters.description: Scanline row offset from screen center.

methods.name: projectSprite
methods.signature: (sx, sy, px, py, pa, fov, screen_w)
methods.description: Projects a world-space sprite to screen coordinates for billboard rendering.

methods.name: drawTopDown
methods.description: Renders a top-down debug view of the map with the player's position and direction.

methods.name: drawView
methods.signature: (px, py, angle, fov, w, h, max_dist)
methods.description: Renders a first-person raycaster view to a raw image buffer (no textures, flat-shaded).

methods.name: drawDepthMap
methods.signature: LRaycaster:drawDepthMap(px, py, angle, fov, numRays, w, h, maxDist)
methods.description: Renders a grayscale depth map showing distance-to-wall for each column.

methods.name: drawLineOfSight
methods.description: Renders a debug image showing the line-of-sight ray between two world points.

methods.name: drawCameraSweep
methods.signature: (x, y, fov, max_dist, num_frames, fw, fh)
methods.description: Renders multiple frames of a rotating camera sweep as a single combined image.

methods.name: buildScene
methods.description: Builds a complete textured raycaster scene for GPU rendering. Stores the output internally.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Scene params {px, py, angle, fov, rays, max_dist, screen_w, screen_h, ambient?, shade_dist?, floor_r/g/b?, ceiling_r/g/b?, camera_height?, horizon_offset?}.

parameters.name: lights
parameters.description: Array of point-light tables {x, y, radius, r?, g?, b?, intensity?}.

parameters.name: sprites
parameters.description: Array of sprite tables {x, y, texture, size?}.

parameters.name: wallTextures
parameters.description: Map of cell_value -> texture for wall surfaces.

methods.name: buildSceneWithModels
methods.description: Builds a textured raycaster scene with additional 3D .obj model instances projected into the view.

parameters.name: models
parameters.description: Array of model instance tables {model, x, y, rotation?, scale?}.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LRaycaster").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LRectPacker
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for a rectangle packer.

methods.name: pack
methods.description: Attempts to pack a rectangle and returns its placement coordinates.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears packed rectangles from this packer.

methods.name: occupancy
methods.description: Returns occupied area ratio. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getPacked
methods.description: Returns packed rectangle records.

classes.name: LRelationshipManager
classes.description: Lua-facing relationship manager for tracking numeric values and named levels between entity pairs.

methods.name: defineType
methods.description: Define a relationship type with named levels (e.g. "friendship" with levels ["hostile", "neutral", "friendly"]).

parameters.name: levels
parameters.description: Array of level name strings in order.

parameters.name: defaultLevel
parameters.description: The default level for new pairs.

methods.name: removeType
methods.description: Remove a relationship type definition.

methods.name: typeNames
methods.description: Return all defined relationship type names.

methods.name: setValue
methods.description: Set the numeric relationship value between two entity IDs.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Get the numeric relationship value between two entity IDs.

methods.name: adjustValue
methods.description: Add a delta to the relationship value between two entities.

methods.name: setLevel
methods.description: Set the named level for a relationship type between two entities.

methods.name: getLevel
methods.description: Get the named level for a relationship type between two entities.

methods.name: removePair
methods.description: Remove all relationship data between two entities.

methods.name: pairCount
methods.description: Return the total number of tracked entity pairs.

classes.name: LReplConsole
classes.description: Lua-side REPL console handle with bounded history.

methods.name: eval
methods.description: Evaluates Lua code through this REPL console and records it in history.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Lua source code evaluated in the active Lua VM.

methods.name: history
methods.description: Returns this REPL console's recorded command history.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears this REPL console's command history.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the number of entries stored in this REPL console history.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this REPL console handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this REPL console handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LReplConsole` and `Object`.

classes.name: LRing
classes.description: Lua-facing fixed-size ring buffer for numeric or string values. Oldest entries are overwritten when full.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Push a number or string value into the ring. Overwrites the oldest entry if the ring is full.

methods.name: latest
methods.description: Return the most recently pushed entry as a table with id, tag, value, and text fields. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: toArray
methods.description: Return all entries in the ring as an ordered array of tables (oldest to newest).

methods.name: sum
methods.description: Return the sum of all numeric values in the ring. Non-numeric entries contribute zero.

methods.name: average
methods.description: Return the arithmetic mean of all numeric values in the ring.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the number of entries currently in the ring.

methods.name: isFull
methods.description: Check whether the ring has reached its maximum capacity.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all entries from the ring. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LRingBuffer
classes.description: Lua-side fixed-capacity FIFO buffer that stores registry-protected Lua values.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Pushes a value into the ring buffer and evicts the oldest value when full.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Lua value to store in the buffer.

methods.name: pop
methods.description: Removes and returns the oldest value.

methods.name: peek
methods.description: Returns the oldest value without removing it.

methods.name: peekNewest
methods.description: Returns the newest value without removing it.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Returns the number of values currently stored.

methods.name: capacity
methods.description: Returns the ring buffer capacity. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Returns whether the ring buffer has no values.

methods.name: isFull
methods.description: Returns whether the ring buffer is at capacity.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes every stored value and releases registry keys.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Returns stored values in oldest-to-newest order.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this ring buffer handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this ring buffer handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LRingBuffer` and `Object`.

classes.name: LSaveManager
classes.description: Manages persistent game state: registering data collectors/restorers, serializing to named.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Register a named data section with a collector and restorer function pair.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique section name identifying this chunk of save data (e.g. "player", "inventory").

parameters.name: collectFn
parameters.description: Called with no arguments during save; must return the data to persist for this section.

parameters.name: restoreFn
parameters.description: Called with the saved value during load; responsible for applying it back to game state.

methods.name: unregister
methods.description: Remove a previously registered data section by name, cleaning up its collector and restorer callbacks.

methods.name: setSchemaVersion
methods.description: Set the current schema version number for saves produced by this game build.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Integer schema version (must increase with each breaking data format change).

methods.name: getSchemaVersion
methods.description: Return the current schema version number set for this save manager.

methods.name: addMigration
methods.description: Register a migration function that transforms save data from one schema version to the next.

parameters.name: fromVersion
parameters.description: The schema version this migration upgrades FROM (it produces fromVersion+1).

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Receives the full save data table and must return the transformed table.

methods.name: collect
methods.description: Invoke all registered collectors and return the assembled save-data table without writing to disk.

methods.name: restore
methods.description: Apply a previously collected save-data table back into game state by invoking all registered restorers.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: A save-data table (as produced by collect or loaded from disk).

methods.name: markDirty
methods.description: Mark the save state as dirty, indicating unsaved changes exist.

methods.name: isDirty
methods.description: Check whether unsaved changes exist since the last save or load.

methods.name: enableAutoSave
methods.description: Enable periodic auto-saving: when the dirty flag is set, the system writes to the target slot every interval seconds.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Time in seconds between auto-save checks (e.g. 30.0 for every 30 seconds).

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: The slot name to auto-save into (e.g. "autosave").

methods.name: disableAutoSave
methods.description: Disable the periodic auto-save timer. Manual saves via save() still work.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advance the auto-save timer by dt seconds. Call this once per frame from your game loop.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since the last frame.

methods.name: setSummary
methods.description: Set a human-readable summary string stored alongside save metadata (e.g. "Level 5 – Forest").

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Short description of the current game progress.

methods.name: getSummary
methods.description: Get the current summary string that will be embedded in the next save.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Completely reset the save manager: unregister all sections, clear migrations, hooks, compression, and dirty state.

methods.name: setCompress
methods.description: Enable or disable LZ4 compression for save files. Compressed saves are smaller on disk.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to compress future saves, false to write plain text.

methods.name: isCompressed
methods.description: Check whether save compression is currently enabled.

methods.name: onBeforeSave
methods.description: Set a hook function called immediately before each save operation begins.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback receiving the slot name as its argument, or nil to clear.

methods.name: onAfterLoad
methods.description: Set a hook function called immediately after a save file is successfully loaded and all restorers have run.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback receiving the slot name as its argument, or nil to clear.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Persist all registered data sections to the named slot file on disk.

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: Slot name (e.g. "slot1", "quicksave"). The file is stored as save/slot_<name>.sav.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Load game state from a named slot file. Decompresses if needed, applies migrations, calls restorers, then fires onAfterLoad.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Permanently delete a save slot file from disk. This action cannot be undone.

methods.name: exists
methods.description: Check whether a save slot file exists on disk without reading its contents.

methods.name: getSlots
methods.description: List all save slots found on disk with their metadata (version, timestamp, summary).

methods.name: getSlotInfo
methods.description: Read metadata for a single save slot without loading its full game state.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Return the type name string for this userdata object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Check whether this object matches a given type name. Supports "LSaveManager" and "Object".

classes.name: LScatterPlot
classes.description: Lua-exposed scatter plot for data visualization.

methods.name: addSeries
methods.description: Adds a data series to this scatter plot.

methods.name: setXRange
methods.description: Sets the X-axis range for this scatter plot.

methods.name: setYRange
methods.description: Sets the Y-axis range for this scatter plot.

methods.name: drawToImage
methods.description: Renders this scatter plot to an image buffer.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LScheduler
classes.description: A Lua-exposed event scheduler that fires callbacks after timed delays or frame counts, with support for repeating intervals, named entries, pausing, and time-scaling.

methods.name: after
methods.description: Schedules a one-shot callback to fire after the given delay in seconds. Returns an event ID that can be used to cancel, pause, or query the event.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Time in seconds before the callback fires.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke when the delay elapses.

methods.name: afterFrames
methods.description: Schedules a one-shot callback to fire after the given number of frames. Returns an event ID for management.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of frames to wait before the callback fires.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke when the frame count elapses.

methods.name: afterNamed
methods.description: Schedules a named one-shot callback after a delay in seconds. If a callback with the same name already exists, the old one is cancelled and replaced. Useful for debouncing or resettable delays.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name for this scheduled event.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: Time in seconds before the callback fires.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke when the delay elapses.

methods.name: every
methods.description: Schedules a repeating callback that fires at a fixed interval in seconds. Pass a positive count to limit repetitions, or omit/pass -1 to repeat indefinitely.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Time in seconds between each invocation.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke on each interval tick.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of times to fire. Defaults to -1 (infinite).

methods.name: everyFrames
methods.description: Schedules a repeating callback that fires every N frames. Pass a positive count to limit repetitions, or omit/pass -1 to repeat indefinitely.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of frames between each invocation.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke on each frame-interval tick.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of times to fire. Defaults to -1 (infinite).

methods.name: everyNamed
methods.description: Schedules a named repeating callback at a fixed interval. If a callback with the same name already exists, the old one is cancelled and replaced. Useful for restartable periodic effects like health regeneration or status ticks.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name for this repeating event.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Time in seconds between each invocation.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Callback to invoke on each interval tick.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of times to fire. Defaults to -1 (infinite).

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels a scheduled event by its ID. Returns true if the event was found and removed, false if it did not exist.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Event ID returned by after, every, or their variants.

methods.name: cancelNamed
methods.description: Cancels a named scheduled event. Returns true if the named event was found and removed.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name used when scheduling with afterNamed or everyNamed.

methods.name: cancelAll
methods.description: Cancels all scheduled events in this scheduler and frees their callbacks. Returns the number of events that were removed.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses a scheduled event so it stops accumulating time. Returns true if the event was found and paused.

methods.name: resume
methods.description: Resumes a previously paused event so it continues accumulating time. Returns true if the event was found and resumed.

methods.name: isPaused
methods.description: Checks whether a scheduled event is currently paused.

methods.name: pauseNamed
methods.description: Pauses a named scheduled event. Returns true if the named event was found and paused.

methods.name: resumeNamed
methods.description: Resumes a previously paused named event. Returns true if the named event was found and resumed.

methods.name: isPausedNamed
methods.description: Checks whether a named scheduled event is currently paused.

methods.name: getRemaining
methods.description: Returns the remaining time in seconds before the event fires. The first return value indicates whether the event was found; the second is the remaining time (0.0 if not found).

methods.name: getInterval
methods.description: Returns the interval duration in seconds for a repeating event. The first return value indicates whether the event was found; the second is the interval (0.0 if not found).

methods.name: getRepeatCount
methods.description: Returns the remaining repeat count for a repeating event. The first return value indicates whether the event was found; the second is the count (0 if not found). A value of -1 means infinite repeats.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of active scheduled events in this scheduler.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Returns true if the scheduler has no active events.

methods.name: setInterval
methods.description: Changes the interval duration in seconds for an existing repeating event. Returns true if the event was found and updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Event ID of the repeating event.

methods.name: resetEvent
methods.description: Resets the elapsed time of a scheduled event back to zero, restarting its delay or interval countdown. Returns true if the event was found and reset.

methods.name: setTimeScale
methods.description: Sets the time scale multiplier for this scheduler. A value of 2.0 makes events fire twice as fast; 0.5 makes them fire at half speed. Does not affect frame-based events.

methods.name: getTimeScale
methods.description: Returns the current time scale multiplier for this scheduler.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances all time-based events by dt seconds, fires any callbacks whose delay has elapsed, and cleans up completed one-shot events. Call this once per frame with delta time. Returns the number of callbacks that fired.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since the last update.

methods.name: updateFrames
methods.description: Advances all frame-based events by one frame, fires any callbacks whose frame count has been reached, and cleans up completed one-shot events. Call this once per frame. Returns the number of callbacks that fired.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object as a string.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name. Accepts "LScheduler" or "Object".

classes.name: LSchema
classes.description: Lua-side schema validator built from docs field rules.

methods.name: validate
methods.description: Validates a Lua table and returns a success flag plus structured error rows.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Table whose fields are checked against this schema.

methods.name: check
methods.description: Validates a Lua table and returns only the boolean result.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Table whose fields are checked against this schema.

methods.name: assert
methods.description: Validates a Lua table and raises a Lua error when schema checks fail.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Table whose fields are checked against this schema.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns this schema's display name.

methods.name: getFields
methods.description: Returns the field names declared by this schema.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this schema handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this schema handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LSchema` and `Object`.

classes.name: LScreenTransition
classes.description: Lua-side handle for a timed screen transition effect.

methods.name: play

methods.name: reverse

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances this transition timer and returns whether it remains active.

methods.name: progress

methods.name: isActive

methods.name: isDone
methods.description: Returns whether the transition has finished.

methods.name: kind
methods.description: Returns the transition kind name. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: color
methods.description: Returns the transition RGBA color.

methods.name: setColor
methods.description: Sets the transition RGBA color from a numeric array table.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Numeric color table using indices 1 through 4.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this transition handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this transition handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `ScreenTransition` and `Object`.

classes.name: LScrollBar
classes.description: Adds scroll-bar-specific methods to a scroll bar widget table.

methods.name: setScrollPosition
methods.description: Sets the scroll position of this scroll bar, clamped to the valid range.

methods.name: getContentSize
methods.description: Returns the total content size tracked by this scroll bar.

methods.name: setContentSize
methods.description: Sets the total content size that this scroll bar represents.

methods.name: getViewSize
methods.description: Returns the visible viewport size tracked by this scroll bar.

methods.name: isVertical
methods.description: Returns whether this scroll bar is oriented vertically.

methods.name: setOnChange
methods.description: Registers a callback invoked when this scroll bar's position changes.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string of this widget (e.g. "LButton", "LSlider").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this widget matches the given type name, including base types "LWidget" and "Object".

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to check against.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: setSize
methods.description: Sets the width and height of this widget in pixels.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the width and height of this widget.

methods.name: getRect
methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Shows or hides this widget. Hidden widgets are not drawn and do not receive input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently visible.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this widget. Disabled widgets appear grayed out and ignore input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently enabled and can receive input.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Assigns a string identifier to this widget for lookup with findById.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the string identifier assigned to this widget.

methods.name: setTooltip
methods.description: Sets the tooltip text shown when the user hovers over this widget.

methods.name: getTooltip
methods.description: Returns the tooltip text of this widget.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns the current interaction state of this widget (e.g. "normal", "hovered", "pressed", "disabled").

methods.name: addChild
methods.description: Adds a child widget to this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.name: removeChild
methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.
