classes.name: LServiceLocator
classes.description: Lua-facing service locator for registering and retrieving shared services by name at runtime.

methods.name: provide
methods.description: Register a service instance under a given name. Replaces any previously registered service with the same name.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The service object or table to store.

methods.name: locate
methods.description: Retrieve a registered service by name. Returns nil if not found.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The service name to look up.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a service with the given name is currently registered.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Unregister and discard a service by name.

methods.name: getServices
methods.description: Return an array of all registered service names.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all registered services and reset the locator.

classes.name: LSet
classes.description: Lua-facing string set with add/remove/has operations and set algebra (union, intersection).

methods.name: add
methods.description: Add a string to the set. Returns true if it was not already present.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove a string from the set. Returns true if it was present.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a string is in the set.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the number of items in the set.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the set is empty. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: toArray
methods.description: Return all set items as an array table.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all items from the set. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: union
methods.description: Return a new set containing all items from both this set and another.

parameters.name: other
parameters.description: The other set to merge with.

methods.name: intersection
methods.description: Return a new set containing only items present in both this set and another.

parameters.name: other
parameters.description: The other set to intersect with.

classes.name: LShader
classes.description: GPU shader program for custom rendering effects (post-processing, distortion, etc.).

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends a uniform value to this shader by name. Supported types: number, boolean, or table (vec2/vec3/vec4).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Uniform variable name declared in the shader.

methods.name: hasUniform
methods.description: Checks whether this shader declares a uniform with the given name.

methods.name: release
methods.description: Releases the shader resource. If active, the default shader is restored.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LShape
classes.description: Retained compound shape that accumulates drawing commands and can be rendered in one call.

methods.name: getCommandCount
methods.description: Returns the number of drawing commands accumulated in this shape.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all drawing commands from this shape, making it empty.

methods.name: setColor
methods.description: Sets the drawing color for subsequent shape commands.

methods.name: setLineWidth
methods.description: Sets the line width for subsequent line-mode shape commands.

methods.name: rectangle
methods.description: Adds a rectangle command to the shape.

methods.name: roundedRectangle
methods.description: Adds a rounded rectangle command to the shape.

methods.name: circle
methods.description: Adds a circle command to the shape. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: ellipse
methods.description: Adds an ellipse command to the shape.

methods.name: triangle
methods.signature: (mode, x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, y3)
methods.description: Adds a triangle command to the shape.

methods.name: polygon
methods.description: Adds a polygon command to the shape from a flat list of x,y coordinate pairs.

parameters.description: Flat coordinate values: x1, y1, x2, y2, ... (minimum 3 vertices / 6 values).

methods.name: line
methods.description: Adds a line segment command to the shape.

methods.name: polyline
methods.description: Adds a connected polyline command to the shape from a flat list of x,y coordinate pairs.

parameters.description: Flat coordinate values: x1, y1, x2, y2, ... (minimum 2 points / 4 values).

methods.name: arc
methods.signature: LShape:arc(mode, x, y, r, astart, aend, [segments])
methods.description: Adds an arc command to the shape. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: draw
methods.description: Renders the accumulated shape commands to the screen with optional transform.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LSignal
classes.description: Lua-side signal object storing subscriptions and Lua callback registry keys.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Registers a callback for an exact signal event name.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Lua function invoked with emitted signal arguments.

methods.name: emit
methods.description: Emits a signal event and invokes matching callbacks with the remaining arguments.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a signal callback by subscription handle.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all callbacks registered for one exact signal event name.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Removes every callback from this signal object.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the callback count for one exact signal event name.

methods.name: getTotalCount
methods.description: Returns the total callback count across all signal event names.

methods.name: once
methods.description: Registers a callback that is removed after its next matching emission.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Lua function invoked once with emitted signal arguments.

methods.name: registerWithFilter
methods.description: Registers a callback that runs only when a filter callback returns true.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Lua function invoked after the filter accepts the signal.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Lua predicate called with emitted arguments.

methods.name: connect
methods.description: Registers a callback for an exact name or wildcard signal pattern.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Exact signal event name or wildcard pattern.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Lua function invoked with emitted signal arguments.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this signal handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this signal handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LSignal`, `Signal`, and `Object`.

classes.name: LSimpleState
classes.description: Lua-facing finite state machine with enter/exit/update callbacks per state.

methods.name: addState
methods.description: Register a named state with optional enter, exit, and update callbacks.

parameters.name: callbacks
parameters.description: Table with optional fields: `enter` (function), `exit` (function), `update` (function receiving dt).

methods.name: transitionTo
methods.description: Transition to a new state. Calls the current state's `exit` and the target state's `enter` callbacks.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The state to transition to. Must be previously added.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Call the current state's update callback with the frame delta time.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since last frame.

methods.name: getCurrent
methods.description: Return the name of the currently active state, or nil if no state is set.

methods.name: hasState
methods.description: Check whether a state with the given name is registered.

methods.name: getStates
methods.description: Return an array of all registered state names.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all states and their callbacks, resetting the state machine.

classes.name: LSkeleton
classes.description: Lua-facing skeleton object providing bone hierarchy, slots, IK, skins, and animation playback.

methods.name: addBone
methods.description: Adds a root-level bone to the skeleton with optional transform properties.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional table with keys: x, y, rotation, scale_x, scale_y.

methods.name: addChildBone
methods.description: Adds a bone as a child of an existing bone, inheriting its parent's world transform.

parameters.name: parent_idx
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the parent bone.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional table with keys: x, y, rotation, scale_x, scale_y (local offsets from parent).

methods.name: addSlot
methods.description: Adds a slot attached to a specific bone, optionally assigning a default attachment name.

parameters.name: bone_idx
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the bone this slot is attached to.

parameters.name: attachment
parameters.description: Optional default attachment name for this slot.

methods.name: findBone
methods.description: Searches for a bone by name and returns its zero-based index, or nil if not found.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the bone to find.

methods.name: findSlot
methods.description: Searches for a slot by name and returns its zero-based index, or nil if not found.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the slot to find.

methods.name: updateWorldTransforms
methods.description: Recomputes world transforms for all bones in hierarchy order. Call after modifying bone locals or IK targets.

methods.name: getBoneWorld
methods.description: Returns the final world-space transform of a bone after hierarchy resolution.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the root bone world position, shifting the entire skeleton.

methods.name: boneCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of bones in the skeleton.

methods.name: slotCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of slots in the skeleton.

methods.name: drawToImage
methods.description: Renders the skeleton into an in-memory image of the given dimensions and returns it as LImage userdata.

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: Width of the output image in pixels.

parameters.name: h
parameters.description: Height of the output image in pixels.

methods.name: playAnimation
methods.description: Starts playing a named animation on this skeleton. Optionally loops.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the animation to play (must have been added via addAnimation).

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: Whether to loop the animation. Defaults to true.

methods.name: stopAnimation
methods.description: Stops the currently playing animation and resets playback state.

methods.name: updateAnimation
methods.description: Advances the current animation by a delta time, applying bone transforms to the skeleton.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Time step in seconds (e.g. from lurek.timer.getDelta()).

methods.name: getAnimationTime
methods.description: Returns the current playback time of the active animation in seconds.

methods.name: addAnimation
methods.description: Registers a SkeletonAnimation object with this skeleton so it can be played by name.

parameters.name: anim
parameters.description: The animation userdata to register. Consumed by this call.

methods.name: addIKConstraint
methods.description: Adds an inverse-kinematics constraint that controls a chain of bones to reach a target position.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name for this IK constraint (used with setIKTarget).

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Array of bone indices forming the IK chain from root to tip.

parameters.name: bend_positive
parameters.description: Whether the joint bends in the positive direction. Defaults to true.

methods.name: setIKTarget
methods.description: Sets the world-space target position for a named IK constraint. Call updateWorldTransforms after.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the IK constraint to update.

methods.name: addSkin
methods.description: Registers a new named skin on this skeleton. Skins remap slot attachments for visual variants.

methods.name: setSkin
methods.description: Activates a named skin, applying its slot-attachment mappings to the skeleton.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the skin to activate (must have been added via addSkin).

methods.name: getSkin
methods.description: Returns the name of the currently active skin, or nil if no skin is set.

methods.name: setSkinMapping
methods.description: Maps a slot to a specific attachment name within a skin. When that skin is active, the slot shows this attachment.

parameters.name: skin
parameters.description: Name of the skin to add the mapping to.

parameters.name: slot
parameters.description: Name of the slot to remap.

parameters.name: attachment
parameters.description: Attachment name to display in that slot when the skin is active.

methods.name: blendAnimation
methods.description: Blends an animation pose onto the skeleton at a given time with a weight factor for smooth transitions.

parameters.name: anim
parameters.description: The animation to sample and blend from.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: The time position to sample within the animation.

parameters.name: blend_weight
parameters.description: Blend factor from 0.0 (no effect) to 1.0 (full). Defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object is of the given type name. Supports "LSkeleton" and "Object".

classes.name: LSkeletonAnimation
classes.description: Lua-facing animation object containing bone timelines, keyframes, events, and easing curves.

methods.name: addKeyframe
methods.description: Adds a keyframe to a bone's property timeline at a specific time with a value and easing curve.

parameters.name: bone_idx
parameters.description: Zero-based index of the target bone.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time position in seconds for this keyframe.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the property at this keyframe.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns the total duration of this animation in seconds.

methods.name: addEventKey
methods.description: Inserts an event trigger at a specific time within the animation timeline.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time position in seconds when the event fires.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the event (used to identify it when querying).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Optional numeric payload for the event. Defaults to 0.

methods.name: getEvents
methods.description: Collects all events that fire within a time range. Useful for triggering sound effects or gameplay actions.

methods.name: getTimelineCount
methods.description: Returns the number of bone-property timelines in this animation.

methods.name: poseAt
methods.description: Samples all timelines at a given time and returns the computed pose as an array of bone-property-value entries.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time position in seconds to sample.

methods.name: reverse
methods.description: Creates a new animation that plays this animation's keyframes in reverse order.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this userdata object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object is of the given type name. Supports "LSkeletonAnimation" and "Object".

classes.name: LSlider
classes.description: Adds slider-specific methods to a slider widget table.

methods.name: setValue
methods.description: Sets the current value of this slider, clamped to its range.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns the current value of this slider.

methods.name: setRange
methods.description: Sets the minimum and maximum bounds for this slider.

methods.name: setStep
methods.description: Sets the step increment for this slider's value snapping.

methods.name: getMin
methods.description: Returns the minimum value of this slider's range.

methods.name: getMax
methods.description: Returns the maximum value of this slider's range.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string of this widget (e.g. "LButton", "LSlider").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this widget matches the given type name, including base types "LWidget" and "Object".

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to check against.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the local position of this widget relative to its parent.

methods.name: setSize
methods.description: Sets the width and height of this widget in pixels.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the width and height of this widget.

methods.name: getRect
methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Shows or hides this widget. Hidden widgets are not drawn and do not receive input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently visible.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this widget. Disabled widgets appear grayed out and ignore input.

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether this widget is currently enabled and can receive input.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Assigns a string identifier to this widget for lookup with findById.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the string identifier assigned to this widget.

methods.name: setTooltip
methods.description: Sets the tooltip text shown when the user hovers over this widget.

methods.name: getTooltip
methods.description: Returns the tooltip text of this widget.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns the current interaction state of this widget (e.g. "normal", "hovered", "pressed", "disabled").

methods.name: addChild
methods.description: Adds a child widget to this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to add.

methods.name: removeChild
methods.description: Removes a child widget from this widget's hierarchy.

parameters.name: child
parameters.description: The child widget table or widget index to remove.

methods.name: getChildCount
methods.description: Returns the number of direct child widgets attached to this widget.

methods.name: getChildren
methods.description: Returns a table of lightweight child widget references, each containing an _idx field.

methods.name: findById
methods.description: Searches this widget's subtree for a child with the given ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The widget ID to search for.

methods.name: setOnClick
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget is clicked.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnChange
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when this widget's value changes.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving the widget index as argument.

methods.name: setOnDraw
methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: _self
parameters.description: The widget (ignored, kept for method-call syntax).

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.name: setPadding
methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.name: setMargin
methods.description: Sets the outer margin of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top margin in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getMargin
methods.description: Returns the outer margin of this widget.

methods.name: setZOrder
methods.description: Sets the z-order (draw priority) of this widget. Higher values draw on top.

methods.name: getZOrder
methods.description: Returns the z-order (draw priority) of this widget.

methods.name: setMinSize
methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMinSize
methods.description: Returns the minimum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setMaxSize
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMaxSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setAnchor
methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Distance from parent's left edge, or nil.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Distance from parent's right edge, or nil.

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.description: Distance from parent's bottom edge, or nil.

methods.name: setAnchorCenter
methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor
methods.description: Removes all anchor constraints from this widget.

methods.name: setFlexGrow
methods.description: Sets the flex-grow factor controlling how much extra space this widget receives in a layout.

methods.name: getFlexGrow
methods.description: Returns the flex-grow factor of this widget.

methods.name: setFlexShrink
methods.description: Sets the flex-shrink factor controlling how much this widget shrinks when layout space is insufficient.

methods.name: getFlexShrink
methods.description: Returns the flex-shrink factor of this widget.

methods.name: bind
methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.name: attachToEntity
methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LSoundData
classes.description: Represents the Lua-visible LSoundData object exposed by this module.

methods.name: getSampleCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of samples stored in this sound buffer.

methods.name: getSampleRate
methods.description: Returns the playback sample rate of this sound buffer.

methods.name: getChannelCount
methods.description: Returns the number of audio channels stored in this sound buffer.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns the approximate playback duration of this sound buffer.

methods.name: getBitDepth
methods.description: Returns the sample bit depth of this sound buffer.

methods.name: getSample
methods.description: Returns the sample value at the given zero-based sample index.

methods.name: drawWaveform
methods.signature: LSoundData:drawWaveform(target, x, y, w, h, r, g, b, a)
methods.description: Draws this sound buffer as a waveform into an image buffer.

methods.name: setSample
methods.description: Overwrites the sample value at the given zero-based sample index.

classes.name: LSoundPool
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper around a pre-allocated pool of identical sound voices for rapid fire effects.

methods.name: play
methods.description: Plays the next available voice from the pool in round-robin order.

methods.name: stopAll
methods.description: Stops all voices in this sound pool immediately.

methods.name: setVolume
methods.description: Sets the volume for all voices in this pool.

methods.name: setBus
methods.description: Routes all voices in this pool through the named audio bus.

methods.name: release
methods.description: Releases all voices and frees audio resources held by this pool.

methods.name: getVoiceCount
methods.description: Returns the number of pre-allocated voices in this pool.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object for runtime type-checking.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LSource
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper around a loaded audio source (sound effect or music stream).

methods.name: play
methods.description: Starts playback of this audio source from the current position.

methods.name: stop
methods.description: Stops playback and resets the source position to the beginning.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses playback at the current position, allowing later resumption.

methods.name: resume
methods.description: Resumes playback from the position where the source was paused.

methods.name: setVolume
methods.description: Sets the volume level of this source where 0.0 is silent and 1.0 is full volume.

methods.name: getVolume
methods.description: Returns the current volume level of this audio source.

methods.name: setPitch
methods.description: Sets the playback speed multiplier, affecting both pitch and duration.

parameters.name: pitch
parameters.description: Pitch multiplier (1.0 = normal, 2.0 = double speed/octave up).

methods.name: getPitch
methods.description: Returns the current pitch multiplier of this audio source.

methods.name: setLooping
methods.description: Enables or disables looping so the source restarts automatically after finishing.

parameters.name: looping
parameters.description: True to loop continuously, false to play once.

methods.name: isLooping
methods.description: Returns whether this source is set to loop continuously.

methods.name: isPlaying
methods.description: Returns whether this source is currently playing audio.

methods.name: isPaused
methods.description: Returns whether this source is currently paused.

methods.name: isStopped
methods.description: Returns whether this source is currently stopped (not playing or paused).

methods.name: setPan
methods.description: Sets the stereo panning position of this source.

parameters.name: pan
parameters.description: Pan value from -1.0 (full left) to 1.0 (full right), 0.0 is center.

methods.name: getPan
methods.description: Returns the current stereo panning position of this source.

methods.name: clone
methods.description: Creates an independent copy of this source sharing the same audio data.

methods.name: getType
methods.description: Returns whether this source was loaded as static (fully in memory) or streaming.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns the total duration of this audio source in seconds.

methods.name: tell
methods.description: Returns the current playback position of this source in seconds.

methods.name: seek
methods.description: Seeks to a specific position in seconds within this audio source.

methods.name: setLowpass
methods.description: Applies a lowpass filter that attenuates frequencies above the cutoff.

methods.name: setHighpass
methods.description: Applies a highpass filter that attenuates frequencies below the cutoff.

methods.name: getLowpass
methods.description: Returns the current lowpass filter cutoff frequency in Hertz.

methods.name: getHighpass
methods.description: Returns the current highpass filter cutoff frequency in Hertz.

methods.name: clearFilter
methods.description: Removes all frequency filters (lowpass and highpass) from this source.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Sets the fade-in duration so the source ramps from silence to full volume on play.

methods.name: getFadeIn
methods.description: Returns the configured fade-in duration for this source.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object for runtime type-checking.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object is of the given type name or a parent type.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string of this widget (e.g. "LButton", "LSlider").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this widget matches the given type name, including base types "LWidget" and "Object".

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The type name to check against.

classes.name: LSpatialHash
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for a spatial hash index.

methods.name: insert
methods.description: Inserts an item rectangle into the spatial hash.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an item rectangle in the spatial hash.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes an item from the spatial hash.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all items from the spatial hash.

methods.name: queryRect
methods.description: Returns ids intersecting a query rectangle.

methods.name: queryCircle
methods.description: Returns ids intersecting a query circle.

methods.name: querySegment
methods.description: Returns ids intersecting a query line segment.

methods.name: getCellSize
methods.description: Returns the spatial hash cell size.

methods.name: getItemCount
methods.description: Returns the number of items in the spatial hash.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this spatial hash handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this spatial hash handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LSpatialHash` and `Object`.

classes.name: LSpinBox
classes.description: Adds spin-box-specific methods to a spin box widget table.

methods.name: setValue
methods.description: Sets the numeric value of this spin box, clamped to its range.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns the current numeric value of this spin box.

methods.name: increment
methods.description: Increases this spin box's value by one step.

methods.name: setRange
methods.description: Sets the minimum and maximum bounds for this spin box.

methods.name: setStep

classes.name: LSpring
classes.description: Lua-exposed spring physics simulation that smoothly animates table fields toward target values with configurable stiffness and damping.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Manually advances this spring by the given delta time and writes updated positions to the target table. Returns `true` if still animating, `false` if settled.

methods.name: isSettled
methods.description: Returns whether all spring axes have reached their targets within the precision threshold.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Returns whether this spring is still actively animating.

methods.name: setTarget
methods.description: Changes the spring target values for one or more axes. Re-activates the spring if it was settled.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping axis names to new target values.

methods.name: setStiffness
methods.description: Sets the spring stiffness for all axes. Higher values make the spring snap faster.

methods.name: setDamping
methods.description: Sets the spring damping for all axes. Higher values reduce oscillation and overshoot.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels this spring animation and cleans up the on-settle callback if one was registered.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the current position of the given spring axis, or `nil` if the axis does not exist.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: Name of the axis to query.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to check against (`"LSpring"` or `"Object"`).

classes.name: LSpriteAtlas
classes.description: Lua-visible wrapper around a SpriteAtlas, providing named region lookups.

methods.name: getEntry
methods.description: Looks up a named sprite region in the atlas by its original filename or tag.

methods.name: getByIndex
methods.description: Returns a sprite region by its 1-based index in the atlas.

methods.name: entryCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of entries (sprite regions) in the atlas.

methods.name: entryNames
methods.description: Returns an array of all entry names in the atlas.

methods.name: getFlipped
methods.description: Returns a copy of a named atlas entry with the specified flip flags applied.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LSpriteBatch
classes.description: Batched sprite renderer for efficiently drawing many copies of the same texture.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a sprite entry to the batch at the given position with optional transform.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all entries from the sprite batch.

methods.name: getCount
methods.description: Returns the number of sprite entries currently in the batch.

methods.name: getBufferSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum number of entries this batch can hold.

methods.name: release
methods.description: Releases the sprite batch resource.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the internal Lua type tag. This method is available to Lua scripts.

classes.name: LSpriteManager
classes.description: Lua-visible sprite manager that tracks world-space billboard sprites for sorting and projection.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new sprite to the manager at a world position with a texture name and optional scale.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a sprite by its id. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Updates the world position of an existing sprite.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Shows or hides a sprite without removing it.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: Whether the sprite should be rendered.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all sprites from the manager.

methods.name: sortAndProject
methods.description: Sorts all visible sprites by distance from the camera and returns projection data.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LSpriteManager").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LSpriteSheet
classes.description: Lua-visible wrapper around a SpriteSheet, providing grid-based frame access,.

methods.name: getFrame
methods.description: Returns the UV quad for a single frame by its 1-based index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: 1-based frame index in the sprite sheet.

methods.name: getFrameCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of frames in this sprite sheet.

methods.name: getRow
methods.description: Returns all frame quads in the given row of the sprite sheet grid.

methods.name: getColumn
methods.description: Returns all frame quads in the given column of the sprite sheet grid.

methods.name: getGroupFrames
methods.description: Returns the frame quads for a named animation group.

methods.name: getGroupNames
methods.description: Returns an array of all named animation group names defined on this sheet.

methods.name: nameGroup
methods.description: Defines a named animation group as a contiguous range of frames.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of frames in the group.

methods.name: getFrameSize
methods.description: Returns the pixel dimensions of a single frame cell.

methods.name: getGridSize
methods.description: Returns the number of columns and rows in the sprite sheet grid.

methods.name: drawToImage
methods.description: Renders the sprite sheet grid into an LImage of the given size for debugging or previews.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

classes.name: LSquad
classes.description: Lua handle for a named squad with members, leader, formation, and shared blackboard.

methods.name: getName
methods.description: Returns the squad name. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: addMember
methods.description: Adds a member name to the squad member list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Agent or game object name to append as a squad member.

methods.name: removeMember
methods.description: Removes every member entry with the given name.

methods.name: getMemberCount
methods.description: Returns the number of members in this squad.

methods.name: getMembers
methods.description: Returns all squad members in an array-style Lua table.

methods.name: setLeader
methods.description: Sets the squad leader name. This method is available to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Member or agent name to store as leader.

methods.name: getLeader
methods.description: Returns the squad leader name when one is assigned.

methods.name: setFormation
methods.description: Sets the squad formation type and optionally updates spacing.

parameters.name: ftype
parameters.description: Formation type name parsed by the engine.

methods.name: getFormation
methods.description: Returns the current squad formation type name.

methods.name: getFormationSpacing
methods.description: Returns the spacing used by squad formation positioning.

methods.name: getFormationPosition
methods.description: Returns a member's target formation position relative to the leader position.

parameters.name: member_idx
parameters.description: One-based member index in the squad.

parameters.name: leader_x
parameters.description: Leader X position in world units.

parameters.name: leader_y
parameters.description: Leader Y position in world units.

methods.name: getBlackboard
methods.description: Returns a blackboard snapshot for this squad.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this squad handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this squad handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `Squad` and `Object`.

classes.name: LStack
classes.description: Lua-facing LIFO stack with optional capacity limit. Supports push/pop from both ends.

methods.name: push
methods.description: Push a value onto the top of the stack. Returns false if the stack is at capacity.

methods.name: pushBottom
methods.description: Push a value onto the bottom of the stack. Returns false if at capacity.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to insert at the bottom.

methods.name: pop
methods.description: Remove and return the top value. Returns nil if the stack is empty.

methods.name: popBottom
methods.description: Remove and return the bottom value. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: popMany
methods.description: Pop up to `count` values from the top and return them as an array table.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to pop.

methods.name: peek
methods.description: Return the top value without removing it. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: peekBottom
methods.description: Return the bottom value without removing it. Returns nil if empty.

methods.name: peekAt
methods.description: Return the value at a 1-based index without removing it. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.name: insertAt
methods.description: Insert a value at a 1-based index in the stack, shifting items above it. Returns false if at capacity.

methods.name: removeAt
methods.description: Remove and return the value at a 1-based index. Returns nil if out of range.

methods.name: moveWithin
methods.description: Move an item from one 1-based index to another within the stack.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the current number of items in the stack.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the stack is empty. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: isFull
methods.description: Check whether the stack has reached its capacity limit (if one was set).

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all items from the stack. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: toArray
methods.description: Return all stack items as an array table (bottom to top).

classes.name: LStateMachine
classes.description: Lua handle for a finite state machine with Lua-backed state callbacks and transition guards.

methods.name: addState
methods.description: Adds a state with optional Lua lifecycle callbacks.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: State name used by transitions and direct state changes.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional table with `onEnter`, `onUpdate`, and `onExit` callback functions.

methods.name: addTransition
methods.description: Adds a transition between two states with an optional guard callback and priority.

parameters.name: guard
parameters.description: Optional function that must return true for the transition to run.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Transition priority used when multiple transitions are available; defaults to zero.

methods.name: setInitialState
methods.description: Sets the initial state and also enters it when the machine has no current state yet.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: State name to use as the initial state.

methods.name: getCurrentState
methods.description: Returns the current state name when the state machine has entered a state.

methods.name: forceState
methods.description: Immediately switches the current state and resets the time spent in state.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: State name to set as current without transition checks.

methods.name: getTimeInState
methods.description: Returns how long the machine has spent in the current state.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this state machine handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this state machine handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `StateMachine` and `Object`.

classes.name: LSteeringManager
classes.description: Lua handle for a steering behavior stack that combines movement forces for an agent.

methods.name: addSeek
methods.description: Adds a seek behavior that pulls the agent toward a target point.

parameters.name: tx
parameters.description: Target X position in world units.

parameters.name: ty
parameters.description: Target Y position in world units.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addFlee
methods.description: Adds a flee behavior that pushes the agent away from a target point inside a panic distance.

parameters.name: tx
parameters.description: Threat X position in world units.

parameters.name: ty
parameters.description: Threat Y position in world units.

parameters.name: panic_dist
parameters.description: Distance inside which fleeing is active; defaults to 200.0.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addArrive
methods.description: Adds an arrive behavior that slows the agent as it approaches a target point.

parameters.name: tx
parameters.description: Target X position in world units.

parameters.name: ty
parameters.description: Target Y position in world units.

parameters.name: slowing
parameters.description: Radius used to reduce speed near the target; defaults to 50.0.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addWander
methods.description: Adds a wander behavior that produces jittered exploratory movement.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.description: Wander circle distance in front of the agent; defaults to 40.0.

parameters.name: jitter
parameters.description: Random displacement applied per update; defaults to 5.0.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addPursue
methods.description: Adds a pursue behavior that chases another named agent when a target name is supplied.

parameters.name: target_name
parameters.description: Optional name of the agent to pursue.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addEvade
methods.description: Adds an evade behavior that moves away from another named agent when a threat name is supplied.

parameters.name: threat_name
parameters.description: Optional name of the agent to evade.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: addFlock
methods.description: Adds a flocking behavior with separation, alignment, and cohesion weights.

parameters.name: neighbor_radius
parameters.description: Radius used to find flock neighbors; defaults to 100.0.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Behavior weight applied during steering combination; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: getBehaviorCount
methods.description: Returns the number of steering behaviors configured on this manager.

methods.name: setCombineMode
methods.description: Sets how steering behavior forces are combined.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Combine mode string parsed by the steering manager.

methods.name: getCombineMode
methods.description: Returns the current steering force combination mode.

methods.name: getLastSteering
methods.description: Returns the last steering force calculated by this manager.

methods.name: calculate
methods.signature: (px, py, vx, vy, max_speed, max_force, dt)
methods.description: Calculates a steering force for the supplied agent movement state.

parameters.name: max_speed
parameters.description: Maximum allowed speed used by steering constraints.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Elapsed time in seconds for this steering step.

methods.name: setPath
methods.description: Sets a waypoint path behavior from an array of `{x, y}` tables.

parameters.name: waypoints
parameters.description: Array of waypoint tables, each containing numeric `x` and `y` fields.

parameters.name: reach_radius
parameters.description: Distance at which a waypoint is considered reached; defaults to 12.0.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Path following behavior weight; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: clearPath
methods.description: Clears the active waypoint path behavior.

methods.name: hasPath
methods.description: Returns whether this manager currently has an active waypoint path.

methods.name: getPathProgress
methods.description: Returns the current one-based waypoint index and total waypoint count.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this steering manager handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this steering manager handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `SteeringManager` and `Object`.

methods.name: setSpatialHashCellSize
methods.description: Sets the cell size used by the steering manager spatial hash.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Spatial hash cell size in world units.

methods.name: enableSpatialHash
methods.description: Enables or disables spatial hash acceleration for neighbor queries.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to use spatial hashing, false to use direct scans.

methods.name: addCustomBehavior
methods.description: Adds a custom steering behavior backed by a Lua callback.

parameters.name: func
parameters.description: Function called as `(agent, dt)` that returns an X and Y steering force.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Custom behavior weight applied to returned forces; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: applyCustomSteering
methods.description: Runs enabled custom steering callbacks for an agent and returns the weighted combined force.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Agent handle passed through to every custom steering callback.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Elapsed time in seconds passed to every custom steering callback.

classes.name: LStrategy
classes.description: Lua-facing strategy pattern allowing hot-swappable algorithm implementations by name.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Register a named strategy implementation function.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The implementation function to call when this strategy is active.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Switch to a named strategy. Future `execute()` calls will use this implementation.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Execute the currently active strategy, passing through all arguments and returning its results.

parameters.description: Arguments forwarded to the active strategy function.

methods.name: getCurrent
methods.description: Return the name of the currently active strategy, or nil if none set.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Check whether a strategy with the given name is registered.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove a named strategy. If it was the active strategy, no strategy will be selected.

methods.name: names
methods.description: Return an array of all registered strategy names.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Remove all strategies and reset the selection.

classes.name: LStrategyAI
classes.description: Lua handle for interval-based strategic goal selection.

methods.name: addGoal
methods.description: Adds a named strategic goal. This method is available to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Goal name scored by update callbacks.

methods.name: addTag
methods.description: Adds a context tag to this strategy AI.

methods.name: removeTag
methods.description: Removes a context tag from this strategy AI.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances strategy timing and scores goals when the update interval has elapsed.

parameters.name: scorer_fn
parameters.description: Function called with a goal name and returning a numeric score.

methods.name: forceEvaluate
methods.description: Immediately scores all goals and updates the active goal.

parameters.name: scorer_fn
parameters.description: Function called with a goal name and returning a numeric score.

methods.name: activeGoal
methods.description: Returns the currently active strategic goal when one is selected.

methods.name: timeUntilNext
methods.description: Returns time remaining until the next scheduled strategy evaluation.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this strategy AI handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this strategy AI handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LStrategyAI` and `Object`.

classes.name: LTerminal
classes.description: Lua-side userdata wrapping a terminal emulator grid with cell access, widgets, input, and rendering.

methods.name: set

methods.returns: number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number
methods.returnType: number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all cells in the terminal grid, resetting characters and colors to defaults.

methods.name: getDimensions
methods.description: Returns the number of columns and rows in the terminal grid.

methods.name: addWidget
methods.description: Attaches a widget to this terminal so it is rendered and receives input events.

methods.name: removeWidget
methods.description: Detaches a widget from this terminal, removing it from rendering and input handling.

methods.name: clearWidgets
methods.description: Removes all attached widgets from this terminal at once.

methods.name: getFocused
methods.description: Returns the widget that currently has keyboard focus, or nil if no widget is focused.

methods.name: keypressed

methods.name: textinput
methods.description: Forwards a text input event to the terminal for character entry into focused widgets.

methods.name: mousepressed
methods.description: Forwards a mouse press event to the terminal, converting pixel coordinates to cell coordinates.

parameters.name: py
parameters.description: Pixel Y position of the mouse click.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Renders the terminal grid and all attached widgets by emitting render commands at the given screen position.

methods.description: Overrides the cell width and height used for rendering this terminal grid.

methods.description: Removes any custom cell size override, reverting to the size derived from the active font.

methods.name: getCellSize
methods.description: Returns the current custom cell size override, or nil if no override is set.

methods.name: autoResize
methods.description: Requests the window to resize so it exactly fits the terminal grid at the current cell size.

methods.name: type

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches a given type name. Accepts "LTerminal" or "Object".

classes.name: LTerrain
classes.description: A destructible terrain map backed by a grid of solid/empty cells. Generates physics colliders on flush.

methods.name: setCell
methods.description: Sets a single terrain cell to solid or empty.

parameters.name: solid
parameters.description: True for solid, false for empty.

methods.description: Returns whether a cell is solid. This method is available to Lua scripts.

parameters.name: wy
parameters.description: Circle center Y in world coordinates.

parameters.name: solid
parameters.description: True to fill solid, false to carve empty.

methods.name: fillRect

parameters.description: Rectangle left X in world coordinates.

parameters.name: wy
parameters.description: Rectangle top Y in world coordinates.

parameters.name: solid
parameters.description: True to fill solid, false to carve empty.

methods.description: Sets all terrain cells to either solid or empty.

parameters.description: True to fill everything solid, false to clear.

methods.description: Regenerates physics colliders from the current terrain grid state. Call after modifying cells.

methods.name: isDirty
methods.description: Returns true if terrain cells have been modified since the last flush.

methods.description: Optimizes terrain by merging vertically adjacent solid cells into larger colliders.

methods.name: loadFromBytes

classes.name: LThread
classes.description: Lua-visible handle wrapping a single background worker VM that executes a Lua code string on a dedicated OS thread.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to test against (`"LThread"`, `"Thread"`, or `"Object"`).

methods.name: start
methods.description: Launches the worker thread, executing the Lua code string supplied at creation time.

parameters.description: Zero or more arguments forwarded to the worker as the `arg` table.

methods.name: wait
methods.description: Blocks the calling thread until the worker thread finishes execution.

methods.name: isRunning
methods.description: Checks whether the worker thread is still executing.

methods.name: getError
methods.description: Returns the error message from the worker thread, if it terminated with an error.

classes.name: LThreadPool
classes.description: Lua-visible handle for a fixed-size pool of worker threads that process items from a shared input channel.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to test against (`"ThreadPool"` or `"Object"`).

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Pushes a value into the pool's input channel for processing by a worker thread.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to enqueue for processing.

methods.name: collect
methods.description: Pops and returns the next result from the pool's output channel.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of worker threads in the pool.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Blocks until all workers finish or the optional timeout elapses.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Maximum seconds to wait. If omitted, waits indefinitely.

methods.name: getInputChannel
methods.description: Returns the pool's shared input channel that feeds work items to worker threads.

methods.name: getOutputChannel
methods.description: Returns the pool's shared output channel where worker threads place their results.

classes.name: LThrottle
classes.description: Lua-facing throttle that limits how often an action can fire, enforcing a minimum interval between executions.

methods.name: onFire
methods.description: Set the callback function to invoke each time the throttle fires.

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: The callback to execute on fire.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advance the throttle timer. If the interval has elapsed, fires the callback and returns true.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds since last update.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Reset the throttle timer back to zero without firing.

methods.name: getProgress
methods.description: Return how far through the current interval the throttle is (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: getFireCount
methods.description: Return the total number of times this throttle has fired since creation.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enable or disable the throttle. When disabled, update() will not accumulate time.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

classes.name: LTrail
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for a trail effect.

methods.name: pushPoint
methods.description: Adds a point to the trail. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates trail point lifetimes. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setWidth
methods.description: Sets trail start and optional end width.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Returns trail width settings. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setLifetime
methods.description: Sets trail point lifetime. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getLifetime
methods.description: Returns trail point lifetime. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setMinDistance
methods.description: Sets minimum distance between trail points.

methods.name: setHeadColor
methods.description: Sets trail head color. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setTailColor
methods.description: Sets trail tail color. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getPointCount
methods.description: Returns trail point count. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears all trail points. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: drawToImage
methods.description: Draws the trail to image data. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this trail handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this trail handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LTrail` and `Object`.

classes.name: LTraitProfile
classes.description: Lua handle for trait values with temporary modifiers and archetype lookup.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets the base value for a named trait.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Trait name to create or update.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns the current value of a named trait including active modifiers.

methods.name: getBase
methods.description: Returns the base value of a named trait without temporary modifiers.

methods.name: addModifier
methods.description: Adds a temporary or permanent modifier to a named trait.

parameters.name: trait_name
parameters.description: Trait name affected by the modifier.

parameters.name: delta
parameters.description: Value added to the trait while the modifier is active.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Modifier lifetime in seconds, or nil for engine-defined permanent duration.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source label used to remove related modifiers later.

methods.name: removeModifiers
methods.description: Removes all trait modifiers that match a source label.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances modifier timers and removes expired modifiers.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Returns whether the profile has a named trait.

methods.name: traitCount
methods.description: Returns the number of traits stored in the profile.

methods.name: archetype
methods.description: Returns the best matching archetype name when the profile can classify one.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this trait profile handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this trait profile handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LTraitProfile` and `Object`.

classes.name: LTransform
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for a 2D transform matrix.

methods.name: translate
methods.description: Applies a translation to this transform.

methods.name: rotate
methods.description: Applies a rotation to this transform.

methods.name: scale
methods.description: Applies scale to this transform. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: shear
methods.description: Applies shear to this transform. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets this transform to identity.

methods.name: setTransformation
methods.signature: LTransform:setTransformation(x, y, angle, sx, sy, ox, oy, kx, ky)
methods.description: Replaces this transform from position, rotation, scale, origin, and shear components.

methods.name: transformPoint
methods.description: Transforms a point by this transform.

methods.name: inverseTransformPoint
methods.description: Transforms a point by this transform's inverse.

methods.name: inverse
methods.description: Returns this transform's inverse.

methods.name: clone
methods.description: Returns a copy of this transform. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getMatrix
methods.description: Returns this transform matrix as a flat array table.

methods.name: decompose
methods.description: Decomposes this transform into component values.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this transform handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this transform handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name

classes.name: LTween
classes.description: Lua-side wrapper for numeric tween state.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Advances the tween clock and returns whether it is complete.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the tween clock to the beginning.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns one tween value by one-based index or all values when no index is provided.

methods.name: getAllValues
methods.description: Returns all current tween values. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: isComplete
methods.description: Returns whether this tween is complete.

methods.name: getValueCount
methods.description: Returns the number of values animated by this tween.

methods.name: getEasingName
methods.description: Returns this tween easing function name.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns this tween duration. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getTime
methods.description: Returns this tween clock time. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getClock
methods.description: Returns this tween clock time. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setTime
methods.description: Sets this tween clock time. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets this tween clock time. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: addValue
methods.description: Adds a value track to this tween. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this tween handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this tween handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LTween` and `Object`.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels this tween immediately, fires the onCancel callback if set, and resumes any coroutines waiting on it.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses this tween so it stops advancing until resumed.

methods.name: resume
methods.description: Resumes a paused tween so it continues advancing.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Returns whether this tween is still running (not cancelled or completed).

methods.name: getProgress
methods.description: Returns the eased progress of this tween as a value from 0.0 to 1.0.

methods.name: getElapsed
methods.description: Returns the number of seconds that have elapsed since the tween started.

methods.name: getDuration
methods.description: Returns the total duration of this tween in seconds.

methods.name: getRemaining
methods.description: Returns the number of seconds remaining until this tween completes.

methods.name: getFields
methods.description: Returns an array of field names being tweened on the target table.

methods.name: setRelative
methods.description: Sets whether the tween end values are relative to the start values instead of absolute.

methods.name: relative
methods.description: Chainable version of `setRelative`. Returns the tween for fluent API usage.

methods.name: await
methods.description: Yields the current coroutine until this tween completes or is cancelled. Must be called from inside a coroutine.

methods.name: setRepeat
methods.description: Sets how many times the tween should repeat after the first play. Use -1 for infinite repeat.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: Number of additional repeats (0 = play once, -1 = infinite).

methods.name: setYoyo
methods.description: Enables or disables yoyo mode, which reverses the tween direction on each repeat cycle.

methods.name: onComplete
methods.description: On complete on this LTween object. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: onUpdate
methods.description: Sets a callback to fire every frame while the tween is active. Returns the tween for chaining.

methods.name: onCancel
methods.description: Sets a callback to fire when the tween is cancelled. Returns the tween for chaining.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to check against (`"LTween"` or `"Object"`).

classes.name: LTweenParallel
classes.description: Creates a new empty parallel tween group. Add tweens with `:tween()` or `:add()`, then call `:start()` to run them simultaneously.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds an existing tween handle to this parallel group. The tween becomes owned by the group.

methods.name: tween
methods.description: Creates and adds a new tween step directly to this parallel group.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The table whose fields will be animated.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping field names to target end values.

methods.name: start
methods.description: Starts all tweens in this parallel group simultaneously.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels all tweens in this parallel group immediately.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Returns whether this parallel group is still running.

methods.name: onComplete
methods.description: Sets a callback to fire when all tweens in this parallel group have finished. Returns the group for chaining.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to check against (`"LTweenParallel"` or `"Object"`).

classes.name: LTweenSequence
classes.description: Creates a new empty tween sequence. Chain `.tween()`, `.delay()`, and `.callback()` steps, then call `:start()`.

methods.name: tween
methods.description: Appends a tween step to this sequence that animates numeric fields on the target table.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The table whose fields will be animated.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Key-value pairs mapping field names to target end values.

methods.name: delay
methods.description: Appends a delay step to this sequence. Optionally fires a callback when the delay elapses.

methods.name: callback
methods.description: Appends a callback step to this sequence that fires when reached during playback.

methods.name: start
methods.description: Starts playback of this sequence from the first step.

methods.name: cancel
methods.description: Cancels this sequence immediately and resumes any coroutines waiting on it.

methods.name: isActive
methods.description: Returns whether this sequence is still running.

methods.name: getProgress
methods.description: Returns the overall progress ratio of this sequence from 0.0 to 1.0.

methods.name: await
methods.description: Yields the current coroutine until this sequence completes or is cancelled. Must be called from inside a coroutine.

methods.name: onComplete
methods.description: Sets a callback to fire when the sequence finishes all steps. Returns the sequence for chaining.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to check against (`"LTweenSequence"` or `"Object"`).

classes.name: LTweenState
classes.description: Lua-exposed standalone tween state for manual interpolation without automatic property updates.

methods.name: tick
methods.description: Advances the tween state by the given delta time and returns the eased interpolation value (0..1).

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Delta time in seconds to advance.

methods.name: isComplete
methods.description: Returns whether this tween state has finished its full duration.

methods.name: t
methods.description: Returns the raw (un-eased) progress value from 0.0 to 1.0.

methods.name: lerp
methods.description: Linearly interpolates between two values using the current eased progress.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the tween state to the beginning so it can be replayed.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches the given type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to check against (`"LTweenState"` or `"Object"`).

classes.name: LUniverse
classes.description: Lua-side handle for one ECS universe.

methods.name: spawn
methods.description: Creates a new entity in this universe.

methods.name: kill
methods.description: Deletes an entity and removes its components from this universe.

methods.name: isAlive
methods.description: Returns whether an entity id currently exists in this universe.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Stores or replaces a component value on an entity.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Entity id that receives the component.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Lua value stored as the component payload.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns a component value from an entity.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Returns whether an entity has a named component.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a named component from an entity.

methods.name: getComponents
methods.description: Returns component names currently stored on an entity.

methods.name: query
methods.description: Returns entities that have all component names passed as varargs.

parameters.description: Component names that every returned entity must have.

methods.name: each
methods.description: Iterates entities with one component and calls a Lua callback for each match.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Component name used to select entities.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked by the ECS backend for each matching entity.

methods.name: getEntities
methods.description: Returns all live entity ids in this universe.

methods.name: getEntityCount
methods.description: Returns the number of live entities in this universe.

methods.name: addSystem
methods.description: Registers a Lua system table with optional phase, priority, name, and dependency metadata.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System table containing update, render, draw, or event methods.

parameters.name: opts
parameters.description: Optional table with priority, phase, name, and after fields.

methods.name: removeSystem
methods.description: Removes a previously registered Lua system table.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System table to remove from this universe.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Runs registered update-phase systems with a frame delta.

methods.name: render
methods.description: Runs registered render-phase systems using their render or draw callbacks.

methods.name: emit
methods.description: Calls matching event-named functions on registered systems.

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Function name looked up on each system table.
Extra values forwarded after the system and universe arguments.

methods.name: getSystemCount
methods.description: Returns the number of registered systems.

methods.name: takeSnapshotDiff

methods.name: clear

methods.name: release
methods.description: Releases universe contents by clearing all ECS state.

methods.name: addTag

methods.name: removeTag

methods.name: getEntitiesByLayer

methods.name: getEntitiesSorted

methods.name: defineTag

methods.name: queryBitmapAll

methods.name: defineBlueprint

methods.name: removeBlueprint

methods.name: listBlueprints
methods.description: Returns names of all registered blueprints.

methods.name: getBlueprintComponents
methods.description: Returns the component table stored for a blueprint.

methods.name: setParent

parameters.name: parent_id

methods.name: getParent
methods.description: Returns the parent entity id for a child entity.

parameters.name: child_id

methods.name: getChildren
methods.description: Returns child entity ids for a parent entity.

methods.name: killRecursive
methods.description: Deletes an entity and all descendant entities in its hierarchy.

methods.name: queryNot
methods.description: Returns entities that include one component set and exclude another component set.

parameters.name: with_tbl
parameters.description: Array table of required component names.

parameters.name: without_tbl
parameters.description: Array table of forbidden component names.

methods.name: serialize
methods.description: Serializes this universe into a Lua table snapshot.

methods.name: deserialize
methods.description: Replaces this universe state from a serialized Lua snapshot.

parameters.name: snapshot
parameters.description: Snapshot table previously produced by `serialize` or `snapshot`.
