parameters.description: Component name whose add events are observed.

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Callback receiving entity id and component name.

methods.name: onComponentRemoved
methods.description: Registers a callback for queued component-remove events with a given component name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Component name whose remove events are observed.

parameters.name: cb
parameters.description: Callback receiving entity id and component name.

methods.name: flushObservers
methods.description: Delivers queued component add and remove events to registered observer callbacks.

methods.name: spawnBulk
methods.description: Spawns multiple entities from a blueprint using shared optional overrides.

methods.name: addRelation

methods.description: Removes a named directed relation between two entities.

methods.name: hasRelation
methods.description: Returns whether a named directed relation exists between two entities.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this universe handle.

methods.name: typeOf

classes.name: LUtilityAI
classes.description: Lua handle for utility AI action scoring and consideration curves.

methods.name: addAction
methods.description: Adds an action scored by a Lua callback and optional momentum weight.

parameters.description: Action name returned when this action wins evaluation.

parameters.name: scorer_fn
parameters.description: Function called by evaluation to score this action.

parameters.name: weight
parameters.description: Momentum bonus or base weighting value; defaults to 1.0.

methods.name: evaluate
methods.description: Evaluates all actions and returns the winning action name when one is available.

methods.name: getActionCount
methods.description: Returns the number of actions registered in this utility AI.

methods.name: getLastAction

parameters.description: Name of the action that receives the consideration.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Consideration name used for debugging and documentation.

parameters.name: scorer_fn
parameters.description: Function that returns the raw consideration score.

parameters.name: curve_arg

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this utility AI handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this utility AI handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `UtilityAI` and `Object`.

classes.name: LValidationReport
classes.description: Provides Lua accessors for documentation validation results.

methods.name: isValid
methods.description: Returns whether the validation report has no missing live APIs.

methods.name: getMissing
methods.description: Returns live APIs that were missing from the checked catalog.

methods.name: getPhantom
methods.description: Returns catalog APIs that were not present in the live Lua table.

methods.name: getIncomplete
methods.description: Returns catalog APIs whose documentation was incomplete.

methods.name: missingCount
methods.description: Returns the number of live APIs missing from the catalog.

methods.name: phantomCount
methods.description: Returns the number of catalog APIs absent from live reflection.

methods.name: incompleteCount
methods.description: Returns the number of catalog APIs with incomplete documentation.

methods.name: getSummary
methods.description: Returns a compact text summary of missing, phantom, and incomplete counts.

methods.name: toTable
methods.description: Converts this validation report into a plain Lua table.

methods.name: toJSON
methods.description: Serializes this validation report to formatted JSON.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this validation report handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this validation report handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LValidationReport` and `Object`.

classes.name: LVecFrame
classes.description: Lua-side vectorized dataframe handle for numeric column operations.

methods.name: colAdd
methods.description: Adds a scalar to a numeric column in place.

methods.name: colSub
methods.description: Subtracts a scalar from a numeric column in place.

methods.name: colMul

methods.name: colDiv
methods.description: Divides a numeric column by a scalar in place.

methods.name: colSqrt
methods.description: Applies square root to a numeric column in place.

methods.name: colFloor
methods.description: Applies floor to a numeric column in place.

methods.name: colCeil
methods.description: Applies ceil to a numeric column in place.

methods.name: colNeg

methods.description: Reduces a numeric column with a named operation.

methods.description: Returns a vectorized frame filtered by a boolean mask table.

methods.name: ncols

classes.name: LWeightedRandom
classes.description: Lua-facing weighted random selection pool. Add items with weights and pick random selections.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Add an item with a relative weight. Higher weight = higher selection probability.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The payload value returned on pick.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove an item by its ID. Returns true if it existed.

methods.name: setWeight
methods.description: Change the weight of an existing entry.

methods.name: pick
methods.description: Pick one item using a random sample value in [0, 1). Returns its value or nil.

methods.name: pickN
methods.description: Pick multiple unique items. Requires an array of random samples.

methods.name: totalWeight
methods.description: Return the sum of all entry weights.

methods.name: len
methods.description: Return the number of entries in the pool.

methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Check whether the pool has no entries.

methods.name: clearAll
methods.description: Remove all entries from the pool. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: getRevision
methods.description: Return the revision counter. Increments on any add/remove/weight change.

classes.name: LWidget
classes.description: Lua-side userdata wrapping a terminal widget (label, button, text box, list, border, or panel).

methods.name: setPosition
methods.description: Sets the widget position in 1-based cell coordinates within the terminal grid.

methods.name: getPosition
methods.description: Returns the widget position as 1-based column and row.

methods.name: setSize
methods.description: Sets the widget dimensions in cell units, clamped to a minimum of 1x1.

methods.name: getSize
methods.description: Returns the widget dimensions as width and height in cell units.

methods.name: setVisible
methods.description: Controls whether the widget is drawn and receives input events.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: True to show, false to hide.

methods.name: isVisible
methods.description: Returns whether the widget is currently visible.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Controls whether the widget accepts user interaction (clicks, typing).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether the widget is currently enabled for user interaction.

methods.name: setTag
methods.description: Assigns an arbitrary string tag to the widget for identification or grouping.

methods.name: getTag
methods.description: Returns the current tag string assigned to the widget.

methods.name: setText
methods.description: Sets the display text of a label, button, or text box widget. Fires the onChange callback if the text actually changed.

methods.name: getText
methods.description: Returns the current text content of a label, button, or text box widget.

methods.name: setColor
methods.description: Sets the foreground color of the widget as RGBA components (0-1 range).

methods.name: getColor
methods.description: Returns the current RGBA color assigned to this widget.

methods.name: setOnClick
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when a button widget is clicked. Only valid for button widgets.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The click handler, or nil to clear.

methods.name: setMaxLength
methods.description: Sets the maximum number of characters allowed in a text box widget.

methods.name: getMaxLength
methods.description: Returns the maximum character limit of a text box widget.

methods.name: setOnChange
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when the text content of a text box widget changes. Only valid for text box widgets.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The change handler, or nil to clear.

methods.name: addItem
methods.description: Appends a text item to a list widget.

methods.name: removeItem
methods.description: Removes a list item by its 1-based index.

methods.name: clearItems
methods.description: Removes all items from a list widget.

methods.name: getItemCount
methods.description: Returns the number of items in a list widget.

methods.name: getItem
methods.description: Returns the text of a list item by its 1-based index.

methods.name: setSelected
methods.description: Sets the currently selected item in a list widget by 1-based index, or clears the selection with nil. Fires the onSelect callback if changed.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: 1-based item index, or nil to clear selection.

methods.name: getSelected
methods.description: Returns the 1-based index of the currently selected list item, or nil if nothing is selected.

methods.name: setOnSelect
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked when the selected item in a list widget changes. Only valid for list widgets.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The selection handler, or nil to clear.

methods.name: setStyle
methods.description: Sets the border drawing style for a border or panel widget.

methods.name: getStyle
methods.description: Returns the current border style name of a border or panel widget.

methods.name: setTitle
methods.description: Sets the title text displayed in the border of a border or panel widget.

methods.name: getTitle
methods.description: Returns the current title text of a border or panel widget.

methods.name: addChild
methods.description: Adds a child widget to a panel widget. The child becomes part of the panel layout and rendering.

methods.name: removeChild
methods.description: Removes a child widget from a panel, detaching it from the panel layout.

methods.name: clearChildren
methods.description: Removes all child widgets from a panel widget.

methods.name: getChildCount
methods.description: Returns the number of child widgets in a panel widget.

methods.name: getChild
methods.description: Returns a child widget from a panel by its 1-based index, or nil if the index is out of range.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name string "LWidget".

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks whether this object matches a given type name. Accepts "LWidget" or "Object".

methods.name: getRect
methods.description: Returns the computed bounding rectangle of this widget in screen coordinates after layout.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Assigns a string identifier to this widget for lookup with findById.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the string identifier assigned to this widget.

methods.name: setTooltip
methods.description: Sets the tooltip text shown when the user hovers over this widget.

methods.name: getTooltip
methods.description: Returns the tooltip text of this widget.

methods.name: getState
methods.description: Returns the current interaction state of this widget (e.g. "normal", "hovered", "pressed", "disabled").

methods.name: getChildren
methods.description: Returns a table of lightweight child widget references, each containing an _idx field.

methods.name: findById
methods.description: Searches this widget's subtree for a child with the given ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The widget ID to search for.

methods.name: setOnDraw
methods.description: Registers a custom draw callback for this widget, invoked each frame during the draw pass.

parameters.name: _self
parameters.description: The widget (ignored, kept for method-call syntax).

parameters.name: f
parameters.description: Callback receiving a rect table {x, y, w, h} with the computed bounds.

methods.name: containsPoint
methods.description: Tests whether the given screen-space point is inside this widget's bounds.

methods.name: setPadding
methods.description: Sets the inner padding of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top padding in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getPadding
methods.description: Returns the inner padding of this widget.

methods.name: setMargin
methods.description: Sets the outer margin of this widget. Accepts 1 to 4 values (top, right?, bottom?, left?) following CSS shorthand rules.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Top margin in pixels (also used as default for other sides).

methods.name: getMargin
methods.description: Returns the outer margin of this widget.

methods.name: setZOrder
methods.description: Sets the z-order (draw priority) of this widget. Higher values draw on top.

methods.name: getZOrder
methods.description: Returns the z-order (draw priority) of this widget.

methods.name: setMinSize
methods.description: Sets the minimum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMinSize
methods.description: Returns the minimum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setMaxSize
methods.description: Sets the maximum allowed width and height for this widget during layout.

methods.name: getMaxSize
methods.description: Returns the maximum width and height of this widget.

methods.name: setAnchor
methods.description: Anchors this widget to its parent's edges. Pass nil for any side to leave it unanchored.

parameters.name: left
parameters.description: Distance from parent's left edge, or nil.

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Distance from parent's top edge, or nil.

parameters.name: right
parameters.description: Distance from parent's right edge, or nil.

parameters.name: bottom
parameters.description: Distance from parent's bottom edge, or nil.

methods.name: setAnchorCenter
methods.description: Centers this widget within its parent using proportional anchor offsets (0.0 to 1.0).

methods.name: clearAnchor
methods.description: Removes all anchor constraints from this widget.

methods.name: setFlexGrow
methods.description: Sets the flex-grow factor controlling how much extra space this widget receives in a layout.

methods.name: getFlexGrow
methods.description: Returns the flex-grow factor of this widget.

methods.name: setFlexShrink
methods.description: Sets the flex-shrink factor controlling how much this widget shrinks when layout space is insufficient.

methods.name: getFlexShrink
methods.description: Returns the flex-shrink factor of this widget.

methods.name: bind
methods.description: Binds this widget to a data key for use with update_bindings.

methods.name: unbind
methods.description: Removes the data binding from this widget.

methods.name: setAlpha
methods.description: Sets the opacity of this widget, clamped to 0.0 (fully transparent) through 1.0 (fully opaque).

methods.name: getAlpha
methods.description: Returns the current opacity of this widget.

methods.name: fadeIn
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully opaque and visible.

methods.name: fadeOut
methods.description: Instantly makes this widget fully transparent and hidden.

methods.name: slideIn
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and makes it visible.

methods.name: slideOut
methods.description: Moves this widget to the given position and hides it.

methods.name: animateAlpha
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's opacity toward a target value over the given duration.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

parameters.name: hide_on_complete
parameters.description: If true, hides the widget when alpha reaches 0.

methods.name: animatePosition
methods.description: Smoothly animates this widget's position toward the target coordinates.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Animation duration in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

methods.name: isAnimating
methods.description: Returns whether this widget currently has an active animation.

methods.name: cancelAnimations
methods.description: Cancels all active animations on this widget, leaving it at its current state.

methods.name: attachToEntity
methods.description: Attaches this widget to a game entity so it follows the entity's position on screen.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: The entity ID to attach to.

methods.name: detachFromEntity
methods.description: Detaches this widget from any previously attached entity.

classes.name: LWorld
classes.description: A physics world that manages rigid bodies, joints, collision detection, and simulation stepping.

methods.name: drawDebug
methods.description: Renders a debug visualization of all physics bodies onto a software ImageData target.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The image to draw debug shapes onto.

methods.name: step
methods.description: Advances the physics simulation by a time delta and fires any registered contact callbacks.

parameters.name: dt
parameters.description: Time step in seconds (e.g. 1/60 for 60 FPS).

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Removes all bodies and joints from the world, resetting it to an empty state.

methods.name: getGravity
methods.description: Returns the current world gravity vector.

methods.name: setGravity
methods.description: Sets the world gravity vector. Affects all dynamic bodies.

parameters.name: gy
parameters.description: Vertical gravity component (positive = down in screen space).

methods.name: setMeter
methods.description: Sets the pixels-per-meter scale used to convert between pixel coordinates and physics units.

parameters.name: ppm
parameters.description: Pixels per meter (e.g. 64 means 64 px = 1 meter in physics).

methods.name: getMeter
methods.description: Returns the current pixels-per-meter scale.

methods.name: toPhysics
methods.description: Converts a pixel measurement to physics-world meters using the current meter scale.

methods.name: toPixels
methods.description: Converts a physics-world meter measurement to pixels using the current meter scale.

methods.name: getBodyCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of active bodies in the world.

methods.name: getBodyIds
methods.description: Returns a sequential table of all body IDs currently in the world.

methods.name: destroyBody
methods.description: Removes a body from the world by its ID, along with all attached fixtures and joints.

methods.name: newBody
methods.description: Creates a new physics body at the given position with the specified type.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Initial X position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Initial Y position in world coordinates.

methods.name: newCircleBody
methods.description: Creates a new body with a circle collider already attached.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Initial X position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Initial Y position in world coordinates.

methods.name: newPolygonBody
methods.description: Creates a new body with a convex polygon collider defined by vertex pairs.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Initial X position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Initial Y position in world coordinates.

methods.name: newEdgeBody
methods.signature: (x, y, x1, y1, x2, y2, bt)
methods.description: Creates a new body with an edge (line segment) collider between two local points.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Body X position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Body Y position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: x1
parameters.description: Edge start X relative to body.

parameters.name: y1
parameters.description: Edge start Y relative to body.

parameters.name: x2
parameters.description: Edge end X relative to body.

parameters.name: y2
parameters.description: Edge end Y relative to body.

methods.name: newChainBody
methods.description: Creates a new body with a chain (polyline) collider. Useful for terrain edges.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Body X position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Body Y position in world coordinates.

parameters.name: closed
parameters.description: If true, connects the last vertex back to the first.

methods.name: addFixture
methods.signature: LWorld:addFixture(bodyId, shapeType, density, friction, restitution, sensor, ...)
methods.description: Attaches a new collider shape to an existing body with material properties.

parameters.name: density
parameters.description: Mass density (affects dynamic body mass calculation).

parameters.name: sensor
parameters.description: If true, detects overlaps without generating collision response.
Shape-specific size arguments (radius, width/height, or vertex list).

methods.name: fixtureCount
methods.description: Returns how many fixtures (colliders) are attached to a body.

methods.name: setFixtureFriction
methods.description: Updates the friction coefficient of a specific fixture on a body.

parameters.name: fixtureIndex
parameters.description: Zero-based fixture index on the body.

methods.name: setFixtureRestitution
methods.description: Updates the restitution (bounciness) of a specific fixture on a body.

parameters.name: fixtureIndex
parameters.description: Zero-based fixture index on the body.

parameters.name: restitution
parameters.description: New restitution value (0 = no bounce, 1 = full bounce).

methods.name: setFixtureSensor
methods.description: Toggles whether a fixture acts as a sensor (overlap detection only, no physical response).

parameters.name: fixtureIndex
parameters.description: Zero-based fixture index on the body.

parameters.name: sensor
parameters.description: True to make it a sensor, false for solid collision.

methods.name: addRevoluteJoint
methods.description: Creates a revolute (hinge) joint connecting two bodies at an anchor point. Bodies can rotate freely around the anchor.

methods.name: addDistanceJoint
methods.signature: (a, b, ax1, ay1, ax2, ay2, len)
methods.description: Creates a distance joint that keeps two bodies at a fixed distance apart, like a rigid rod.

parameters.name: anchorAX
parameters.description: Local anchor X on body A.

parameters.name: anchorAY
parameters.description: Local anchor Y on body A.

parameters.name: anchorBX
parameters.description: Local anchor X on body B.

parameters.name: anchorBY
parameters.description: Local anchor Y on body B.

methods.name: addPrismaticJoint
methods.description: Creates a prismatic (slider) joint that constrains body B to move along an axis relative to body A.

methods.name: addWeldJoint
methods.description: Creates a weld joint that rigidly connects two bodies at an anchor point (no relative movement).

methods.name: addRopeJoint
methods.signature: (a, b, ax1, ay1, ax2, ay2, max)
methods.description: Creates a rope joint limiting the maximum distance between two anchor points on two bodies.

parameters.name: anchorAX
parameters.description: Local anchor X on body A.

parameters.name: anchorAY
parameters.description: Local anchor Y on body A.

parameters.name: anchorBX
parameters.description: Local anchor X on body B.

parameters.name: anchorBY
parameters.description: Local anchor Y on body B.

methods.name: addWheelJoint
methods.description: Creates a wheel joint simulating a suspension: allows rotation and linear movement along an axis.

methods.name: addFrictionJoint
methods.description: Creates a friction joint that applies resistance to relative motion between two bodies.

methods.name: addMotorJoint
methods.description: Creates a motor joint that drives body B toward a target offset from body A using a correction factor.

methods.name: addMouseJoint
methods.description: Creates a mouse joint that pulls a body toward a world target point with spring-like force.

parameters.name: targetX
parameters.description: Initial target X in world coordinates.

parameters.name: targetY
parameters.description: Initial target Y in world coordinates.

parameters.name: maxForce
parameters.description: Maximum force applied to reach the target.

methods.name: addPulleyJoint
methods.description: Creates a pulley joint connecting two bodies so that movement of one affects the other inversely.

methods.name: addGearJoint
methods.description: Creates a gear joint that synchronizes rotation between two bodies at an anchor.

methods.name: jointCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of joints in the world.

methods.name: getJointIds
methods.description: Returns a sequential table of all joint IDs currently in the world.

methods.name: getJointBodies
methods.description: Returns the two body IDs connected by a joint.

methods.name: destroyJoint
methods.description: Removes a joint from the world, disconnecting the two bodies it linked.

methods.name: getJointType
methods.description: Returns the type name of a joint (e.g. "revolute", "distance", "prismatic").

methods.name: setJointMotorSpeed
methods.description: Sets the motor speed on a motorized joint (revolute or prismatic).

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: Desired motor speed (radians/sec for revolute, meters/sec for prismatic).

methods.name: getJointMotorSpeed
methods.description: Returns the current motor speed setting of a joint.

methods.name: setJointLimitsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables angular/linear limits on a joint.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to enforce limits, false to allow free movement.

methods.name: setJointLimits
methods.description: Sets the lower and upper bounds for a joint's limited range of motion.

parameters.name: lower
parameters.description: Lower limit (radians or meters depending on joint type).

methods.name: getJointLimits
methods.description: Returns the lower and upper limit values for a joint.

methods.name: setMouseJointTarget
methods.description: Moves the target position of a mouse joint, causing the attached body to follow.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: New target X in world coordinates.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: New target Y in world coordinates.

methods.name: raycast
methods.description: Casts a ray from point (x1,y1) to (x2,y2) and returns the first body hit, or nil.

methods.name: raycastClosest
methods.description: Casts a directional ray from a point and returns the closest hit within max distance.

parameters.name: dx
parameters.description: Ray direction X (does not need to be normalized).

methods.name: raycastAll
methods.description: Casts a directional ray and returns all bodies hit within max distance as a table of results.

methods.name: queryAABB
methods.description: Returns all body IDs whose axis-aligned bounding boxes overlap the given rectangle.

methods.name: getBodyAtPoint
methods.description: Returns the body ID at a specific world point, or nil if no body is there.

methods.name: getCollisionEvents
methods.description: Returns all collision events from the last step as a table of {bodyA, bodyB} pairs.

methods.name: getBeginContactEvents
methods.description: Returns contact-begin events from the last step (pairs of bodies that started touching).

methods.name: getEndContactEvents
methods.description: Returns contact-end events from the last step (pairs of bodies that stopped touching).

methods.name: getContacts
methods.description: Returns all currently active contact manifolds with normals and touching state.

methods.name: getBodyContacts
methods.description: Returns all contacts involving a specific body.

parameters.name: bodyId
parameters.description: The body to query contacts for.

methods.name: setBodyType
methods.description: Changes the type of an existing body (e.g. from "dynamic" to "static").

methods.name: getBodyType
methods.description: Returns the type name of a body as a string.

methods.name: setBeginContact
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked whenever two bodies begin touching.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Called with (bodyIdA, bodyIdB) on each new contact.

methods.name: clearBeginContact
methods.description: Removes the begin-contact callback so it is no longer called.

methods.name: setEndContact
methods.description: Registers a callback function invoked whenever two bodies stop touching.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Called with (bodyIdA, bodyIdB) on each ended contact.

methods.name: clearEndContact
methods.description: Removes the end-contact callback so it is no longer called.

methods.name: setBodyData
methods.description: Attaches arbitrary Lua data to a body ID for later retrieval (e.g. entity reference, tag).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Any Lua value to associate with this body.

methods.name: getBodyData
methods.description: Retrieves the Lua data previously attached to a body, or nil if none was set.

methods.name: clearBodyData
methods.description: Removes and releases the Lua data attached to a body.

methods.name: setBodyCCD
methods.description: Enables or disables continuous collision detection (bullet mode) on a body to prevent tunneling.

methods.name: getBodyCCD
methods.description: Returns whether continuous collision detection is enabled on a body.

methods.name: setBodyOneWay
methods.description: Marks a body as a one-way platform: other bodies can pass through from the opposite side of the normal.

parameters.name: nx
parameters.description: One-way normal X (points toward the blocking side).

methods.name: clearBodyOneWay
methods.description: Removes the one-way platform behavior from a body, making it block from all directions.

methods.name: getBodyOneWay
methods.description: Returns the one-way platform normal for a body, or nil,nil if not set.

methods.name: setJointBreakForce
methods.description: Sets the maximum force a joint can withstand before it breaks and is automatically destroyed.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Break threshold force (use math.huge for unbreakable).

methods.name: getJointBreakForce
methods.description: Returns the break force threshold for a joint.

methods.name: isBodySleeping
methods.description: Returns whether a body is currently in the sleeping (inactive) state.

methods.name: wakeUpBody
methods.description: Forces a sleeping body to wake up and participate in simulation again.

methods.name: sleepBody
methods.description: Forces a body into the sleeping state, pausing its simulation until disturbed.

methods.name: setSolverIterations
methods.description: Sets the number of velocity solver iterations. Higher values improve stability at the cost of performance.

methods.name: getSolverIterations
methods.description: Returns the current number of velocity solver iterations.

methods.name: newBodies
methods.description: Batch-creates multiple bodies at once for better performance. Each entry is {x, y, type}.

methods.name: stepFixed
methods.description: Performs fixed-timestep physics stepping, consuming accumulated time. Returns the leftover time.

parameters.name: maxSteps
parameters.description: Maximum sub-steps per call to prevent spiral of death.

methods.name: addZone
methods.description: Creates a rectangular physics zone for area-based effects (custom gravity, damping overrides).

methods.name: getZoneEvents
methods.description: Returns all zone enter/leave events from the last step.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LWorld").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks if this object is of a given type name. Supports inheritance (always matches "Object").

classes.name: LZipMount
classes.description: Lua-side handle for a mounted ZIP archive view.

methods.name: readFile
methods.description: Reads a file from the ZIP mount by virtual path.

methods.name: contains
methods.description: Returns whether a virtual path exists in the ZIP mount.

methods.name: listFiles
methods.description: Returns every virtual file path in the ZIP mount.

methods.name: prefix
methods.description: Returns the virtual prefix used by this ZIP mount.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the Lua-visible type name for this ZIP mount handle.

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Returns whether this ZIP mount handle matches a supported type name.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Type name to compare against `LZipMount` and `Object`.

classes.name: LZone
classes.description: A physics zone that applies area-based effects (gravity overrides, damping) to bodies within its bounds.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique ID of this zone. This method is available to Lua scripts.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables this zone. Disabled zones have no effect on bodies.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: True to enable, false to disable.

methods.name: setPriority
methods.description: Sets the priority of this zone. Higher-priority zones take precedence when overlapping.

methods.name: setLayerMask
methods.description: Sets a bitmask controlling which body layers this zone affects.

parameters.name: mask
parameters.description: Layer bitmask (bitwise AND with body layer must be nonzero).

methods.name: setCircle
methods.description: Changes this zone's shape to a circle (overrides the initial rectangle).

methods.name: setGravityDirectional
methods.description: Sets the zone to apply a constant directional gravity to bodies inside.

methods.name: setGravityPoint
methods.description: Sets the zone to attract bodies toward a center point with a given strength.

methods.name: setGravityRepulsor
methods.description: Sets the zone to push bodies away from a center point with a given strength.

methods.name: setGravityZero
methods.description: Sets the zone to cancel all gravity for bodies inside (zero-G area).

methods.name: setLinearDampingOverride
methods.description: Overrides the linear damping of bodies inside this zone, or nil to use each body's own value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Damping override, or nil to clear.

methods.name: setAngularDampingOverride
methods.description: Overrides the angular damping of bodies inside this zone, or nil to use each body's own value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Damping override, or nil to clear.

methods.name: destroy
methods.description: Removes this zone from the world. Bodies will no longer be affected by it.

methods.name: type
methods.description: Returns the type name of this object ("LZone").

methods.name: typeOf
methods.description: Checks if this object is of a given type name.

callbacks.name: load
callbacks.description: Called once after the game script is loaded.

callbacks.name: update
callbacks.description: Called every frame. `dt` is elapsed seconds.

callbacks.name: draw
callbacks.description: Called every frame for rendering. All draw calls must happen here.

callbacks.name: keypressed
callbacks.description: Called when a keyboard key is pressed.

callbacks.name: keyreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a keyboard key is released.

callbacks.name: textinput
callbacks.description: Called when text input is received.

callbacks.name: mousepressed
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is pressed.

callbacks.name: mousereleased
callbacks.description: Called when a mouse button is released.

callbacks.name: mousemoved
callbacks.description: Called when the mouse cursor moves.

callbacks.name: wheelmoved
callbacks.description: Called on mouse wheel scroll.

callbacks.name: gamepadpressed
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is pressed.

callbacks.name: gamepadreleased
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad button is released.

callbacks.name: gamepadaxis
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad axis changes.

callbacks.name: joystickadded
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad is connected.

callbacks.name: joystickremoved
callbacks.description: Called when a gamepad is disconnected.

callbacks.name: focus
callbacks.description: Called when window gains or loses focus.

callbacks.name: visible
callbacks.description: Called when window visibility changes.

callbacks.name: resize
callbacks.description: Called when the window is resized.

callbacks.name: quit
callbacks.description: Called when the window is about to close. Return true to cancel.

callbacks.name: init
callbacks.description: Called once when the engine initialises, before the first frame.

callbacks.name: ready
callbacks.description: Called once after init, when the window and GPU are ready.

callbacks.name: process
callbacks.description: Called every frame for game logic. `dt` is elapsed seconds.

callbacks.name: process_late
callbacks.description: Called every frame after process, for late updates (camera follow, etc).

callbacks.name: process_physics
callbacks.description: Called at fixed physics timestep rate.

callbacks.name: fixedUpdate
callbacks.description: Alias for process_physics — called at fixed timestep rate.

callbacks.name: draw_ui
callbacks.description: Called every frame after draw, for UI overlay rendering.

callbacks.name: exit
callbacks.description: Called when the engine is shutting down, after quit.

callbacks.name: touchpressed
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchpressed(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch begins.

callbacks.name: touchmoved
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchmoved(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch point moves.

callbacks.name: touchreleased
callbacks.signature: function lurek.touchreleased(id, x, y, dx, dy, pressure)
callbacks.description: Called when a touch ends.

callbacks.name: textedited
callbacks.description: Called when IME composition text changes.
